subject: 🚨🚨 Socialism is coming 🚨🚨
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jacobs4congress/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4988798?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| This week in the House of Representatives we are set to vote on the President’s reckless, multi-trillion-dollar, big government socialism package.

I’m fighting against it, and Republicans are united in our battle to protect American families from the socialist nightmare the President is trying to force on the nation.

His plans are dangerously bad.

**We are already suffering under his failed leadership:

Inflation crisis
Southern border crisis
Supply chain crisis
Crime crisis
Struggling small business
Unconstitutional mandates**

What does he think will happen when he wastes TRILLIONS of YOUR DOLLARS on more of the same failed policies?

Our nation is already suffering - not only is the President flat out ignoring this, but he’s also willfully trying to make it worse.

**He’s pushing the IRS to surveil you and your family, he’s pushing to give illegal immigrants amnesty, and he’s pushing to hike taxes and waste money on the Green New Deal. **

[_**The President is incapable of learning from his mistakes. That is why we are fighting hard to stop this madness and restore sanity and accountability in our government.**_](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=c99f827ae8&e=13f35c4add)

We can’t trust Biden to act in Americans’ best interests, we need to take back the House and take away his power.

Best,
Chris Jacobs

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: 🚨🚨We beat Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
This is HUGE news... I wanted you to be among the first to hear. Joe Biden tried to tell states like Kansas that if we accepted federal COVID-19 relie Friend, **This is HUGE news... I wanted you to be among the first to hear. ** Joe Biden tried to tell states like Kansas that if we accepted federal COVID-19 relief funds, we would not be allowed to cut state taxes. **Well, I took him to court. And I am proud to announce that yesterday WE WON.** NOWHERE in the Constitution does Joe Biden get the power to micromanage states and how they tax their citizens... And Biden **certainly** lacks the ability to bully states out of providing state-level tax relief that Kansans need so desperately. This is a big win for not just Kansas, but for states all across the country. I am proud to be leading the fight against Joe Biden’s attempts to grow the size of the federal government and intrude further into our daily lives. As governor, I’ll continue to fight back against an overbearing federal government and DEFEND Kansans from the Biden administration and Washington Democrats.
I hope that you will stand with me in my fight against federal overreach. [**Will you join my team to stand strong?**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=6c33a78ce92e435ab57b3b54e65014ef&_e=UPux1QH1EVpWyyKTq33vy3FPPgJX_7rBG-km3Rwx9s-JHbOKjl0Vsr15CdTlHl2nvX4UyjhEdEl82_2DKyCZTVLmAzcSp5_cpzzjCliD2vTzjtSgsazVDgxABzCRSdpq910NBiicA66u8NvsIx1U96FkqTrKaLOw8iBfcB_YTiav0Ktk0F84Kmx3rDV8wTcEfxDBHazgHwALN6oawb4zN73wBOI71GEc4LA-SxFaMV2PoRXsgKgFD4NUWQ2aJDG7_iKP6ltO1fsspk6Lc5Cpbjrof9aokpAhGrOg-0Gfb0tTbV7bK86ogavrSXot9KMWH9qkwGLEYi2SileUXroXeToszpjPxcQMFSbNSfBbRdUA1cbX2Gg9YU66mQNi_Vo3a3gw_X920jR2fWpeCANBgnphkn7pUImlB4y1mqD2mXag4_wJ-HDKlLNIEBAF1Tv-9F6ogl3ST-QjqZN3cmN-7DtjvzYllhRnsUsDLoNIWdeiAZzWH5iCxV8uG4QTiOwI) DEREK**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=6c33a78ce92e435ab57b3b54e65014ef&_e=UPux1QH1EVpWyyKTq33vy3FPPgJX_7rBG-km3Rwx9s-JHbOKjl0Vsr15CdTlHl2nvX4UyjhEdEl82_2DKyCZTVLmAzcSp5_cpzzjCliD2vTzjtSgsazVDgxABzCRSdpq910NBiicA66u8NvsIx1U96FkqTrKaLOw8iBfcB_YTiav0Ktk0F84Kmx3rDV8wTcEfxDBHazgHwALN6oawb4zN73wBOI71GEc4LA-SxFaMV2PoRXsgKgFD4NUWQ2aJDG7_iKP6ltO1fsspk6Lc5Cpbjrof9aokpAhGrOg-0Gfb0si2kJi8ExUz9HTbQn90A5d_mCsSlZtHWVSNVniXNJretHmYI_Jm8zJ0w2ifBPYKnedcUg-uKwz_uuoQiMB--XIfhnYvfJB1PPyboisXhS-bQPU6YhfAqWOClo0j4KAex_2cRWTbznZy2cPpiY3Xqq7G36E97XgjkVv1spcZzHx6e25fNcTKSfRmM2McNG6urSnmsoz1QdL_FubvGQfIqb8) [**FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIDEN**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=6c33a78ce92e435ab57b3b54e65014ef&_e=UPux1QH1EVpWyyKTq33vy3FPPgJX_7rBG-km3Rwx9s-JHbOKjl0Vsr15CdTlHl2nvX4UyjhEdEl82_2DKyCZTVLmAzcSp5_cpzzjCliD2vTzjtSgsazVDgxABzCRSdpq910NBiicA66u8NvsIx1U96FkqTrKaLOw8iBfcB_YTiav0Ktk0F84Kmx3rDV8wTcEfxDBHazgHwALN6oawb4zN73wBOI71GEc4LA-SxFaMV2PoRXsgKgFD4NUWQ2aJDG7_iKP6ltO1fsspk6Lc5Cpbjrof9aokpAhGrOg-0Gfb0tK5bCxIhD0xsM_7XE2ynWEU7h6rDWFsYYN2kGYi7uXCzRE5Sqnl4RnY6Bny1wI24ZdO-l70xddFcmHooeWNA716LCxYVy2PA2gv3pnbdUZScCcVMn0sG8RSUPw7A01FNQWWbLlJUZ6vrlgjKe004d9DxykSpq_JYIm8fFhJAMlfs7pQ9RVkB3808zXcE74pC2aySUVbudlg_THU-iqg_xv) After just one year of living under the Biden administration, the American people – and Kansans in particular – are in desperate need of relief. clean_body: This is HUGE news... I wanted you to be among the first to hear. Joe Biden tried to tell states like Kansas that if we accepted federal COVID-19 relie Friend, This is HUGE news... I wanted you to be among the first to hear. Joe Biden tried to tell states like Kansas that if we accepted federal COVID-19 relief funds, we would not be allowed to cut state taxes. Well, I took him to court. And I am proud to announce that yesterday WE WON. NOWHERE in the Constitution does Joe Biden get the power to micromanage states and how they tax their citizens... And Biden certainly lacks the ability to bully states out of providing state-level tax relief that Kansans need so desperately. This is a big win for not just Kansas, but for states all across the country. I am proud to be leading the fight against Joe Biden’s attempts to grow the size of the federal government and intrude further into our daily lives. As governor, I’ll continue to fight back against an overbearing federal government and DEFEND Kansans from the Biden administration and Washington Democrats. I hope that you will stand with me in my fight against federal overreach. After just one year of living under the Biden administration, the American people – and Kansans in particular – are in desperate need of relief. He’s sent the prices of groceries through the roof... that’s why I’ve proposed cutting the food sales tax. Kansas families simply can’t afford to pay the bills in Joe Biden’s America. –Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: COP26: explained
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Here’s a summary of our honest takeaways and thoughts on COP26.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211116-2650-header&t=1&akid=2650%2E2526796%2EoNWKAy)
If you’ve been following Alexandria’s Instagram over the last week, you know that she’s been sharing a lot of “behind the scenes” footage from COP26 – the UN climate summit in Glasgow, Scotland.
Now that COP has officially concluded, we wanted to share some of Alexandria’s thoughts about how we should view the outcomes of the summit. We know some folks are understandably disappointed, so we want to break it down – because there is some good news here, as well as areas where we need to keep pushing.
This is a longer than usual email, but we hope you take the time to read it – because your activism is critical to what happens next.
**Before we start...what is COP?**
COP is short for the “Conference of Parties,” but essentially it’s the international climate summit hosted by the UN each year. This is the 26th year, which is why this year is COP26.1
**Is COP a joke? Is it useless?**
This is an important question. You might have heard some people say COP is a waste of time or just a lot of talk.
But Alexandria’s experience boils down to this: COP is important even if we are disappointed by it.
**Here’s why COP is important:**
If we write off COP as useless and choose to ignore it – the consequences will be huge. Because the truth is, the pressure from grassroots organizers is working.
The commitments that came out of COP were much stronger than they would have otherwise been because of the pressure from the outside.
In the negotiations, Alexandria saw global leaders at the highest levels being very concerned and nervous about public sentiment and opinion. In prior COPs and climate summits, many of these leaders were not as worried because they didn’t think people were watching.
**So what happened at COP? Tell us the good, bad, and the ugly.**
There’s good news and bad news. We’ll start with the bad news.
The ambition and timelines for action are not good enough – especially if you are under the age of 40 and will live to see the consequences. The commitment to “net zero emissions by 2050” is simply not enough.
“Net zero” does not mean zero emissions. What it means is that by 2050, we will still be emitting fossil fuels. The “net” theory goes that we will be investing in so much drawdown technology and practices that the amount that we drawdown will be equal to what we’re emitting.
That is not acceptable if we want to stick to 1.5 degrees of warming. What we are seeing in terms of climate impacts is only just the beginning. It will only get worse. This is just science.
If the pace of emissions continues, we would reach 4 degrees of warming by 2100. At that point, half of all landmass on Earth will be uninhabitable to human life due to floods, drought, wildfires, sea level rise, etc.
Governments have had 30 years to address this problem. _About half of all emissions on Earth have all been emitted since the first episode of Seinfeld aired._ We’re tired of waiting.
Here’s the good news.
There’s obvious signs the pressure from advocates is working. Much of the news from COP may feel underwhelming, but there is also some that is really promising. Consider the agreement reached by the U.S. and China. Together, these two countries account for 40% of total global emissions - yet, until COP26, we’d never agreed to work together to address climate emissions. Often, the U.S. and China are at odds on global policies. The agreement to work together is a significant step toward taking “concrete actions” to reduce global emissions.
**If governments won’t step up enough, what can we do?**
If the world is relying on governments to stop climate change, that is not going to happen. Governments are a critical aspect of solving climate change, but they are not the only ones.
Grassroots organizing is going to be very important – and not just protesting. There’s other kinds of organizing that we need to engage in to change the systems that are driving this crisis.
For example, we need to organize new ways of operating in our communities that both address climate and systemic inequities. This can look like creating working co-ops or community solar power, which we saw take off in Puerto Rico following Hurricane Maria.
These examples are crucial to providing models for how alternative and cooperative models can work, and it takes organizing to build them.
Naming the positive structures that we want to see – cooperative economies vs competitive, extractive ones – helps visualize the world we are fighting for and what we want.
**Any other key takeaways?**
The worst powers-that-be are relying and counting on us giving up. But, things are working. There is a commitment. There are many complications and challenges that threaten our transition, but it is worth it to keep going. We must keep going. Just. Don’t. Give. Up.
We can win the world that we know is possible because the world that is possible is already here. It’s just about taking the world we’re fighting for and scaling it up.
Thank you for reading this far. [If you’d like to chip in to support our movement for climate justice, you can contribute here.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211116?refcode=em20211116-2650-P_FND_EXP_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2650_2526796_oNWKAy&akid=2650%2E2526796%2EoNWKAy)
With resolve,
Team AOC
1 - [COP26](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10140?t=3&akid=2650%2E2526796%2EoNWKAy)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211116?refcode=em20211116-2650-P_FND_EXP_GND&t=4&refcode2=2650_2526796_oNWKAy&akid=2650%2E2526796%2EoNWKAy)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211116-2650-P_FND_EXP_GND&t=5&akid=2650%2E2526796%2EoNWKAy)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=2650%2E2526796%2EoNWKAy) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=2650%2E2526796%2EoNWKAy) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=2650%2E2526796%2EoNWKAy)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=2650%2E2526796%2EoNWKAy)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=2650%2E2526796%2EoNWKAy)

name: Ms. Earletta Hearn
subject: Can you help my son, Charles?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hi Peter, it’s
Earletta Hearn. My son is Charles Booker.

I recently found a photo of Charles with my mama and daddy, and I know if
they were still here they would be so proud of him.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12913?refcode=em20211116-1236&t=1001&akid=1236%2E346206%2E-8oYEs ][IMG]

But I’m not just writing to you today to share cute photos of my son
Charles (even though I have plenty!)

I’m reaching out because the team told me that we’re now at the middle of
the month and they’re racing to reach a fundraising deadline tomorrow.
They’re trying to reach 300 donors from emails alone so that the campaign
can continue amplifying CJ’s bold message for change.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12913?refcode=em20211116-1236&t=1021&akid=1236%2E346206%2E-8oYEs ]I know it would mean a lot to the team and Charles if I helped today
to raise some money for this fundraising goal. So I’m asking: Will you
chip in $5 or anything you can so my CJ can defeat Rand
Paul?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12913?refcode=em20211116-1236&t=1022&akid=1236%2E346206%2E-8oYEs ]Contribute $5

Words can’t describe how proud I am of my CJ. He’s fought the good fight
his entire life and has overcome so much.

When he was growing up our family didn’t have much. We sometimes had to
stretch to make ends meet, there were times we didn’t have light or
electricity — but by God’s grace, we survived.

When you live in one of the poorest neighborhoods in Kentucky, hardship is
no stranger. All around us, we saw families struggling to put food on the
table, mamas grieving the deaths of their children lost to gun violence,
and folks losing hope in the American Dream. It’s easy to become
discouraged, witnessing that kind of suffering. But for CJ, it lit a fire
in him.

If we want a fighter in the Senate — someone who will look out for
families like yours and mine — there’s no one better than CJ. But before
he can fight for us, we need to fight for him and make sure his team has
the funds to power their massive grassroots organizing strategy.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12913?refcode=em20211116-1236&t=1023&akid=1236%2E346206%2E-8oYEs ]So if you can afford to chip in $100, $20, or even just $1 — every
little bit counts. If we all pitch in whatever we can, we’ll reach this
goal in time for tomorrow’s deadline!

Thank you,

Mama Hearn

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211116-1236-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1236_346206_-8oYEs&akid=1236%2E346206%2E-8oYEs

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1236%2E346206%2E-8oYEs

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Beto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

I have some exciting news:

Today, I’m proud to endorse Beto O’Rourke as he runs to serve the people
of Texas as their next Governor.

The stakes couldn’t be higher in Texas. Governor Greg Abbott and the Texas
GOP have ruthlessly attacked reproductive rights, undermined democracy,
and failed to protect Texas families from the deadly Covid-19 pandemic.
Families and communities in Texas deserve so much better — and that’s why
my friend Beto is in this fight.

Beginning with Beto’s insurgent 2018 U.S. Senate campaign that engaged
millions of new voters across the Lone Star State, Beto has shown that he
has what it takes to beat Greg Abbott and transform the broken status quo
in Texas. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49596?refcode=ema20211116-162908&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=162908%2E444211%2E7VCtId ]Will you join me in supporting Beto O’Rourke by becoming a
founding donor to his campaign?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49596?refcode=ema20211116-162908&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=162908%2E444211%2E7VCtId ]Contribute $3

Governor Greg Abbott is a prime example of an elected official who
prioritizes himself and his wealthy friends over his constituents and
their families.

We’ve seen it in Abbott’s failure to address Texas’ crumbling power grid,
leading to catastrophic power outages and the death of hundreds of Texans
in the winter of 2021. We saw it when he banned mask requirements in
public schools, making Texas a national leader in child Covid deaths. And
we saw it when he signed an unconstitutional law that bans most abortions
in Texas. I’ll say it again — Texas deserves better.

But beating Republican incumbent Greg Abbott won’t be easy, especially
since Abbott and his party have gone to great lengths to make voting more
difficult than it ever should be. We’re going to need a huge amount of
grassroots resources to build the kind of people-powered movement that can
reach and mobilize millions of Texas voters.

But if anyone can win this fight and build a Texas that works for
everyone, it’s my friend, Beto.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49596?refcode=ema20211116-162908&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=162908%2E444211%2E7VCtId ]This race is our best chance to take Texas back for working people and
families. That’s why I’m personally asking if you’ll become a founding
donor today to help unseat Greg Abbott and elect Beto O’Rourke to serve
the people of Texas as their next Governor.

With voting rights, reproductive justice, and so much more on the line in
Texas, this race couldn’t be more important.

Thank you for doing your part,

Kirsten

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/49596?refcode=ema20211116-162908&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=162908%2E444211%2E7VCtId ]Donate now »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=162908%2E444211%2E7VCtId

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

subject: Thank you, Senator Leahy!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Would you please sign the card now?
| | | Team, Senator Patrick Leahy of Vermont just announced his retirement after nearly _fifty years_ of service in the United States Senate!

Senator Leahy _has ALWAYS_ stood up for what's right -- from his drive to reform campaign finance, to the key role he played confirming Justices Sotomayor and Kagan -- and now we need your help to honor his lifetime of service and advocacy for Americans of all walks of life.

**We want to deliver a card with _thousands_ of signatures from grassroots Democrats recognizing his impressive career in the U.S. Senate, so please:**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: RINO Republicans are coming after me …
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNT8tuhDAM_Bq4gYIxMRw4bLvd_3BeS6TwEAFV269vWFHOtaJMMhrP2KYHJKxt7nsQUKWiBB1gWTVgQdTCgbJCosxQjPxk1pufJw523Uo9j_nQs6oY2LLQqLUlchKkULp21DIagjz0w7YtMatvGTzSWWIsp10Hu0c7sg-HT6J5XIJ3r_SKu4p69cuRFNN_n05G2ax-JKM7dEhSSyqEcFigI1N0wlDRVY6l7FBio_K1N8u3D8FHSWn6519Wfib1GX1kAPvuTYL3ePAf40MMn-kevIlXpzItM7bcFKOYi591-rp022uxl-4ML9-rHyzdfwFHg3Hp)

| [](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNUcFu3CAQ_RrvzSuMMawPPrTZ3SSKKkVq7haGYU0K2MJ4q-3Xd-w4WymnIjQMM483vBndUCZYCTvbUEILXAKPmrJ9UVGgpCSGdkA44xkjXl6kVMkOQTqIaa8Gv-ubyhTswFRtTFVoxQtVEt2BKDtRKXUw9c41fUrjlJXfMnrGPYGaI-zBgUrv1r8PUcuwkGEugrZTiharhMsCL8822GRlslf4BbesPP48_3h4fX16eSoeaUZ5hCsG6YGgP1mN_vPbCX2_-hmtxPfVKOlHaS_hWS_X42b4nHzrsejsEQ1eWrcFp2GOCjDY6YOU7CCrPCjXIouz5raBPkmXH3y0r8oX00YbhjbCOHfOKhmmVkZoUSKqaqVJELHoJ8cQEoSEFMifh-Opv07Xt67HdBvcquJL8EMmrZngioucEMNyZoTOa6JFXhdGcl4zzqpuFxs9_rbO2YkLnOBlEbjObdPRZEt76DwjJaXriOj_EC9g-oC2t3q6v_zXKk-G_E8Mpzsu3Ua447bi-63fNBPHv6P3xd0)
---

Friend,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

Fellow Conservative,

**We can't wait for our event at Mar-a-Lago with President Trump in two weeks!**

One of the things we are most excited about is President Trump offered to reserve one ticket to our reception for the lucky supporter who wins our contest.

name: Eli Bremer
subject: It’s a Movement
body:
I’m glad you’re with us
| | | | [](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chlsdt-ykykmujid-y/)
---
[Visit our website](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chlsdt-ykykmujid-j/)
| | | [Donate Now](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chlsdt-ykykmujid-t/)
---
I wanted to take this opportunity to thank you.
I am excited and humbled at the amount of support I have received thus far, but the work is far from done.
I don't know how close you were paying attention to Virginia, but we saw an incredible governor's race in a state where the Democrat was expected to cruise to victory.
The secret in Glenn Youngkin's campaign? He started a movement.
We are well on our way to doing the same in Colorado. We have built incredible momentum.
I need your help, whether it be donations, volunteering, following along on social media, or spreading our message through word of mouth; all of it matters, and I am grateful for your support thus far! We have started a movement in Colorado, one that has already gained national attention.
With your help, we can bring common sense back to Washington.
[_Please visit my website for more information to volunteer, learn more about me, or donate!_](https://eliforcolorado.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chlsdt-ykykmujid-i/)
I am grateful to have you on board. I look forward to growing this movement with you.

| | ******Veteran, Olympian, Lifelong Republican, Fighter for Colorado,**

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: I'm nervous right now
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58790210:6iEVWe2Np:m:1:3253819041:ED82A6C579CCB3E689FB31AAFC7AD9C1:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

Both the prosecution and Kyle's defense team have finished their closing arguments, and the jury is now deliberating.

While the defense laid out the facts, the prosecution hailed the violent mob that attacked Kyle as "full of heroes" and argued with a straight face that the men who lunged at him, bashed him in the head with a skateboard, and pointed a loaded gun in his face were not serious threats to his life.

**This corrupt persecution has been extremely difficult and costly and we're reaching out with an emergency request to support his official legal defense fund.**

**[Will you please help right now? $50 or any amount will go a long a way.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58790210:6iEVWe2Np:m:1:3253819041:ED82A6C579CCB3E689FB31AAFC7AD9C1:r)**
|

|
---
Over the last 2 weeks, the truth has finally come out in a major way and many people have publicly spoken out about how wrong their initial reactions were.

And while some in the media have begun to admit mistakes, many have continued to distort and outright lie to the public. It's a disgusting thing to see.

We have been fighting an extremely uphill battle from the beginning, but with the support of thousands of our fellow Americans we have put up a big fight.

**[Everything is coming to a head right now, and so we ask you, as strongly as possible, to help with a donation of whatever you can.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58790210:6iEVWe2Np:m:1:3253819041:ED82A6C579CCB3E689FB31AAFC7AD9C1:r)**

Thank you for your unbelievable generosity.

No matter what happens, we will never, ever forget it.

Team Kyle

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi4vphuil6uq6v8q99666a6srbk7p3mamuguej38_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chgm6o76cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6on3jd2ci973aevrbu5lrf6e8p1902olp40klto_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chgm6o76cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgslnt2fdq1lgv6n5qddn0v410636uj5jt66fam8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chgm6o76cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site? Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes: President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site: \-- NO blacklists \-- NO shadow-banning \-- NO Conservative censorship This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots. But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him... name: STOP TIM RYAN NOW
subject: the Left’s golden boy: Tim Ryan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Protect Ohio Values PAC, ProtectOhioValues
body:
Tim Ryan wants people to think he is different. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8021%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=wHRdxOg8mMFSsAk1R9Hx%2bg&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

Tim Ryan wants people to think he is _different._

He wants Ohioans to think he is not your average Democrat.

And he is right, he is WORSE than your average Democrat.

Tim Ryan is running for Senate to fuel his own political ambition and continue to be the Left’s liberal lapdog in Congress.

He isn’t running to stand up for working Americans. He isn’t running to fight for YOUR rights or freedoms.

He is just another weak rubber stamp on the Radical Left’s agenda who talks like a moderate in Ohio but votes like an extreme liberal in Washington.
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18671%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B9WBpfKBUINAxFP3LilWsw&sysid=1)
**We need every strong conservative, every America First patriot, and every Republican on board to stop Tim Ryan from becoming Ohio’s next Senator. **

We can’t afford to let the Democrats keep the Senate in their control...

Until President Biden is OUT of office, we have to hold his feet to the fire. And the best way to do that is to take back the Senate.

_**[Can you chip in RIGHT NOW to help defeat Tim Ryan and send an America First conservative to Washington?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18672%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E14M1IWB2DTl6yXi3K7MuQ&sysid=1)**_

Thank you,

STOP TIM RYAN NOW
Protect Ohio Values
|

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Trump Exposes FDA Disease Cure Coverup
body:
He exposed the FDA and Big Pharma, declaring their “ridiculous system... has been broken for decades.”
_Sponsored message_

President Donald J. Trump **risked everything.** He exposed the FDA and Big Pharma, declaring their "ridiculous system... has been broken for decades." His remarks _shocked_ the current medical establishment's "swamp creatures", who joined Big Tech's push to get Trump censured, impeached, or kicked out of office. Now, I'm disclosing the systemic corruption that Trump uncovered. These revelations have _massive_ implications for the health of every American – including you and your family. For the real story on what ignited Trump's fury,**_[click here NOW!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvcf6g45ln6j9si26u8nsi42vikbo18fq4ogncs8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim0ob1chh2bs)_ ** To Your Good Health,

Al Sears, MD, CNS

name: Connor Boyack
subject: #1 lesson from Virginia’s election
body:
Parents are angry and they are getting organized! Look at what happened in the recent Virginia elections. Education was the is
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeh097ntkkntm2krntlr63lm45t4504tp17etu20_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim0ob1cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjmap34tlme5pbepln61i30pjgsepb9pbke9pj4t3369ibao5icuq62pj6cmoneduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dr662qbbc37m8q6cc3gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)

Friend,

Parents are angry and they are getting organized!

Look at what happened in the recent Virginia elections. **Education was the issue that toppled one of the country 's most popular liberal governors. **
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0jahd0t68ggs6e00s5832tvm4mm7hl135ljqqj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim0ob1cph2bs)
The media STILL claims there's no such thing as CRT in the classroom or socialist indoctrination, despite parents knowing better.

But for parents to truly win, _we have to offer alternatives and solutions. _

I am Connor Boyack, President of Libertas Institute and author of the popular children's book series -- **The Tuttle Twins.**

Here's my solution and mission.

**My goal is to distribute 100,000 copies of the Tuttle Twins to schools, libraries, and families across the country.**

[**Friend, can you please send an urgent donation today of $10, $20, $50, or even $100? Click here to donate and distribute a copy of the Tuttle Twins >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z69ohaggccg99vfb9rg7d7t2qfeu3hun03bkicio_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim0ob1cph2bs)
**For every $10 raised, I am able to send a copy of the Tuttle Twins to a family.**
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsqloku7iona05maaqhl9605bhnblr1emvsl7ac0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim0ob1cph2bs)
So far, Libertas Institute has distributed over 3 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins. This is how we defeat socialist indoctrination. We offer positive solutions.

And if you're not familiar with the Tuttle Twins:

**The Tuttle Twins teaches kids about liberty, limited government, free markets, and personal responsibility.** And the best part? Kids LOVE reading the Tuttle Twins. They enjoy it. It's fun and educational.

We break down complex issues like economics and the Golden Rule into children's stories that are memorable.

_***One more important point ... All online donations are being matched by one of our biggest supporters, John P. You can double your impact! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift.***_

Please send your urgent support today. Every $10 raised distributes a single book.

Donate Any Amount >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z66rvggkg681i5e99ue5tjqm36c1kdpakbd5jdo0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim0ob1cph2bs)_**
Nothing can stop us from spreading the message of liberty to families and making sure children's libraries are full of positive, pro-American books.

name: ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4479uiv12q5b5orq8mntjs22kv5kl6p3kt5vvno_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim0ob6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztim4b0e9f6rqrv2nn3nd95ejbv0b96hek0ibtqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim0ob6c3h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0mt2md186eb9lpltmtptnphjsng8le4u2otjp38_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim0ob6c3h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Replacing 100 Leftist School Board Members
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Peter, Will you join Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. In supporting our campaign to take back our schools from the radical socialist Left? [**_We need your help as we launch a nationwide effort to replace socialist, anti-American school board members with Patriots. Will you please support us?_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58793399:6-JvJe28N:m:1:3298722022:9F45A633DA68EB88F4B3656B5A6BA4DA:r) For too long, the Left has worked to infiltrate schools and indoctrinate our kids with hateful "critical race theory" lessons. **As you may know, Critical Race Theory or "CRT" teaches our children to ****hate****our country,****hate****our history, and****hate****our American values. ** It's being taught in every state across the nation, and it MUST be stopped. If we're not careful, we will soon wake up in a country run by the generation that was trained by their teachers to hate America. And they'll work to destroy everything our country stands for. And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. **_But in the process, we 've neglected smaller local races - like school board - that are often not publicized._** One of the reasons these races get overlooked is that they're discussed as "non-partisan." What that means is radical leftists get to quietly slip into a position of power and waste your tax dollars on "equity" equity consultants and train your children and grandchildren to HATE America. That's the bad news: our nation is under assault by the left, and our children are their number one target. But here's the good news. We can and will stop the radical left from corrupting the minds of an entire generation. My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards and ensure that our children are taught to love and respect America. **Here 's my ****_3R 's Campaign Battle Plan:_****_ _** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from officed **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. [_**But we can 't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC ahead of the 40+ November elections we're targeting?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58793399:6-JvJe28N:m:1:3298722022:9F45A633DA68EB88F4B3656B5A6BA4DA:r) Now, you may not be familiar with me... But you're almost certainly familiar with Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and/or Donald Trump Jr. They know how effective the 1776 Project PAC will be, and you can take their word for it! **> >>> Tucker Carlson:**** "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** _ _ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people." **> >>> Laura Ingraham:****** "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists - help is on the way - a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.:****** "The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of is kinds - specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we "lit a fire" that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the **1776 Project PAC.** **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [_**Help us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, and $100.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58793399:6-JvJe28N:m:1:3298722022:9F45A633DA68EB88F4B3656B5A6BA4DA:r) In closing, my friend Tucker Carlson said "If you're thinking of writing a check to [another group] maybe you should pause and send it to Ryan Girdusky instead." With your help, we will rid our schools of hateful Critical Race Theory by ridding our school boards of radical left-wing activists who despise our Country, our Constitution, and our Conservative American values. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. [_**Will you invest in the future of our country by making a generous contribution to the 1776 Project PAC as we fight to Resign, Recall, or Replace far-left indoctrinators?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58793399:6-JvJe28N:m:1:3298722022:9F45A633DA68EB88F4B3656B5A6BA4DA:r) [**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58793399:6-JvJe28N:m:1:3298722022:9F45A633DA68EB88F4B3656B5A6BA4DA:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58793399:6-JvJe28N:m:1:3298722022:9F45A633DA68EB88F4B3656B5A6BA4DA:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58793399:6-JvJe28N:m:1:3298722022:9F45A633DA68EB88F4B3656B5A6BA4DA:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards and ensure that our children are taught to love and respect America. Here 's my 3R 's Campaign Battle Plan: Resign: we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. Recall: we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from officed Replace: We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. Now, you may not be familiar with me... But you're almost certainly familiar with Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and/or Donald Trump Jr. They know how effective the 1776 Project PAC will be, and you can take their word for it! > >>> Tucker Carlson: "Parents have almost no support, but now they do. The 1776 Project PAC is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people." > >>> Laura Ingraham:** "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists - help is on the way - a new political action committee called the 1776 Project is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." > >>> Donald Trump Jr.:**** "The 1776 Project_ is the very first Political Action Committee of is kinds - specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we "lit a fire" that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the 1776 Project PAC. After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC. In closing, my friend Tucker Carlson said "If you're thinking of writing a check to [another group] maybe you should pause and send it to Ryan Girdusky instead." With your help, we will rid our schools of hateful Critical Race Theory by ridding our school boards of radical left-wing activists who despise our Country, our Constitution, and our Conservative American values. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. ** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC 184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 16, 2021. name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: 6,588 votes from victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvv8oohffd8g3t9renqentrnbvfq63inm7et7ieg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim2o31cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65stgehgm4tdl68p74tr461im0p776mqj7c74s5h68p9kesq61dr6mko7atb5morjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30sllm3g74d366hjjbd77m2qmash5u)
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjr4pcl8m4nq01c4cki44qe68s6oq6335n52u8uo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim2o31cjh2bs)
---
Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. Last year, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z26inr3n4u2csjk5rftk58bov7on2b4o85k3o2vo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim2o31cjh2bs)
[THIS IS WHAT REPUBLICANS LOOK LIKE
HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo2cummgikpnqamr5gi5mj54k4ref59d18qtl4e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim2o31cjh2bs)

Will you please **[chip in $100, $50, or even just $10 right now](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z19pr2e0mrifgtt9s7hql70mgbqqmomsetcq4lro_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim2o31cjh2bs)** to help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for?

I encouraged Monica to try again – a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. **[Monica has my endorsement, but she won’t be able to pull off a win for Republicans everywhere without YOUR HELP](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlqfsm2fg9nvi92ju16sk8mfftl0aoh2b533bm1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim2o31cjh2bs)**.

Monica has set a personal goal of raising $50,000 before November 30th, and I’ve pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. **[Will you chip-in $100, $50, or even $5 to help send a Latina Republican to Congress?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd0rijabhsulgrphum29h7k3lasrtmi118mu4eng_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim2o31cjh2bs)**

[HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmded7q0cdli8efsili90g213g36du3fc8vks7og_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim2o31cjh2bs)
We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas.

We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community.

**Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica’s race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED!**

On behalf of my friend Monica, **[I’m asking you to give generously](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zoggbq7e5fo39rcns2qvim9sliu5cl8f1vo38aqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim2o31cjh2bs)** – whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire Party in the House, and she’ll make us all proud.

[HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr4kasj0p3eg9s45ejnc0ik0c6i80b1et43e2fog_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim2o31cjh2bs)

Respectfully,
Senator Ted Cruz

[Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zavsd8ggbuub5q84e5tqv71acn3sr8rnum9h3ni0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chim2o31cjh2bs)

| Paid for by Monica for Congress
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team Lasry
subject: We can’t hand the Senate back to Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
If we don’t hit our goal, we’ll lose important early momentum in the fight to unseat Ron Johnson. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38706080/316695895/-1086980098?refcode=EM_FR_211117FR_N_TL_90DA_7_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmU4M2FjOS1hYTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=htPLgOEBYeLH2BJ6D101Wtb_WcMxCu99dwsD5mAEaYY=)
---
**** | **** | **URGENT: We need to raise $1,900 online today to stay on track to hit our November goal. If we don’t hit our goal, we’ll lose important early momentum in the fight to unseat Ron Johnson.**

**[CONTRIBUTE $10 NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38706082/316695897/-1086980098?refcode=EM_FR_211117FR_N_TL_90DA_7_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmU4M2FjOS1hYTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=htPLgOEBYeLH2BJ6D101Wtb_WcMxCu99dwsD5mAEaYY=)**
---
****
****
Peter,

We’re counting down the clock until the end of the month, and we only have 14 days to hit our November fundraising goal. Here’s why it’s crucial that we get there:
1. Every month, CNN ranks the top 10 Senate races in the country -- and every month, Wisconsin ranks high. Cook Political also rates this race as one of only THREE tossup Senate elections in the country. **That means this election could decide which party controls the Senate in 2022.**
2. Republicans have made it very clear that they’re not backing down from winning this race, and Ron Johnson is gearing up for his reelection campaign.
3. **The special interest mega-donors are raising millions for Johnson.** This means we have to double down on our efforts to build a giant grassroots campaign today.

We can’t hand Wisconsin -- and the Senate Majority -- back to Mitch McConnell and the extremists in the GOP when everything from voting rights to healthcare is under attack. **But that’s what could happen if we lose.**

name: Matt Castelli
subject: Our listening tour!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
| Team,

When I announced my campaign for Congress in NY-21, I pledged that I’d travel all over our district to hear directly from constituents about your most important concerns and priorities.

This month, we continued to follow through on that pledge - holding our official Campaign Kickoff rally with dozens of supporters and then launching our campaign’s first Listening Tour across all 12 counties that make up the 21st District.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38709610/316707881/-1698130966?utm_campaign=snd-autopilot&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter_poststar&refcode=MC_EM_FR_3MO_211116_1_1&refcode2=447077c1-b047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDcwNzdjMS1iMDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7NgIQnZ5Ej4N-dHVSjlAOAAr7iIiK6Dc_bgc7EI0a6o=&emci=001216f8-2747-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=447077c1-b047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15140246) [**Read more about our campaign kickoff here!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38709616/316707893/-1698130966?utm_campaign=snd-autopilot&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter_poststar&refcode=MC_EM_FR_3MO_211116_1_1&refcode2=447077c1-b047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDcwNzdjMS1iMDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7NgIQnZ5Ej4N-dHVSjlAOAAr7iIiK6Dc_bgc7EI0a6o=&emci=001216f8-2747-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=447077c1-b047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15140246)
---

Over four days, I traveled across the entirety of NY-21 doing the work of a Representative: listening to constituents so that I can be a voice for our district. Whether discussing the need for more affordable housing with community leaders across the North Country, hearing from residents in Watertown about supporting our service members and community around Ft. Drum, or talking with folks about the critical need for rural broadband and the impact of the bipartisan infrastructure bill, I was able to hear firsthand about the most pressing issues facing our communities.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38709619/316707929/1394630540?refcode=MC_EM_FR_3MO_211116_1_1&refcode2=447077c1-b047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDcwNzdjMS1iMDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7NgIQnZ5Ej4N-dHVSjlAOAAr7iIiK6Dc_bgc7EI0a6o=&emci=001216f8-2747-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=447077c1-b047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15140246)
[**If you weren’t able to join us during our Listening Tour, please click here to follow us on Facebook and stay up to date on our future events!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38709622/316707940/1394630540?refcode=MC_EM_FR_3MO_211116_1_1&refcode2=447077c1-b047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDcwNzdjMS1iMDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7NgIQnZ5Ej4N-dHVSjlAOAAr7iIiK6Dc_bgc7EI0a6o=&emci=001216f8-2747-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=447077c1-b047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15140246)

As I spoke with folks across the district, one theme emerged in every single conversation: how long it’s been since anyone saw Elise Stefanik in their community. Not one person I spoke with had seen her show up and listen to their concerns.

I promise to be a different kind of Representative - one who ALWAYS shows up. I’m very excited to continue traveling across our district and talking with you, and with your help, I am ready to bring positive change for NY-21 as your representative in Washington!

Matt Castelli

[**P.S. If you’d like to help support our campaign as we continue to ramp up our efforts, please click here to make a donation. clean_body: | Team, When I announced my campaign for Congress in NY-21, I pledged that I’d travel all over our district to hear directly from constituents about your most important concerns and priorities. This month, we continued to follow through on that pledge - holding our official Campaign Kickoff rally with dozens of supporters and then launching our campaign’s first Listening Tour across all 12 counties that make up the 21st District. | Over four days, I traveled across the entirety of NY-21 doing the work of a Representative: listening to constituents so that I can be a voice for our district. Whether discussing the need for more affordable housing with community leaders across the North Country, hearing from residents in Watertown about supporting our service members and community around Ft. Drum, or talking with folks about the critical need for rural broadband and the impact of the bipartisan infrastructure bill, I was able to hear firsthand about the most pressing issues facing our communities. As I spoke with folks across the district, one theme emerged in every single conversation: how long it’s been since anyone saw Elise Stefanik in their community. Not one person I spoke with had seen her show up and listen to their concerns. I promise to be a different kind of Representative - one who ALWAYS shows up. I’m very excited to continue traveling across our district and talking with you, and with your help, I am ready to bring positive change for NY-21 as your representative in Washington! Matt Castelli = | = | Matt Castelli is a former CIA officer and Director for Counterterrorism at the National Security Council who served in both the Obama and Trump White Houses. He lives in Saratoga County and is running to represent the people of NY’s 21st Congressional District. | ** Paid for by Castelli for Congress Castelli for Congress PO Box 2341 Wilton, NY 12831 United States **

name: Ralph Northam
subject: Stepping up for Abigail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bGHD43X5E1ybSJhobGXY7tHLTT-toX9FwsoPwPYvzeA=/SKSj9XdA0PBF8VMjYndVM61dEuBS6nBGpqvIDdQO90Y=)
---
Friend, I wanted to write to you today to discuss how important it is that we protect our Democratic majority in the House of Representatives in 2022. That starts by re-electing Abigail Spanberger to represent Virginia's 7th Congressional District. Abigail is fighting for policies that improve the lives of Virginians - whether it's access to broadband in rural areas, lower prescription drug costs, or healthcare coverage for Virginians with pre-existing conditions. She is dedicated to advocating for our needs in Congress and delivering results. Outside spending and National Republican groups are already running deceptive ads targeting Abigail. They know this seat is one of the nation's most competitive and will do whatever they can to unseat her. [**Will you consider splitting a contribution between Abigail 's campaign and The Way Ahead today so we can send her back to Washington?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bGHD43X5E1ybSJhobGXY7tHLTT-toX9FwsoPwPYvzeA=/SKSj9XdA0PBF8VMjYndVM61dEuBS6nBGpqvIDdQO90Y=) Our Commonwealth needs thoughtful, dedicated leaders who understand and care about the needs of all of our communities. Abigail has shown through her entire career - from federal law enforcement, to the CIA, to the House of Representatives - that she cares deeply about service. She's exactly the type of person we need representing us. [**I know we 'll see Abigail prevail in 2022, and I'm hoping you'll join me in supporting her as she continues working tirelessly for Virginia by splitting a contribution today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bGHD43X5E1ybSJhobGXY7tHLTT-toX9FwsoPwPYvzeA=/SKSj9XdA0PBF8VMjYndVM61dEuBS6nBGpqvIDdQO90Y=) Thank you for your support. Take care, Ralph Northam

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Defund the Left
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Patriot:

Joe Biden and his woke socialists are drunk on
power. It's time to cut them off and send them home.
You have already heard about House and Senate
conservatives' plans to block funding for Biden's illegal vaccine
mandate. That will be the next big fight in Washington.
But this battle to defund the woke left goes beyond
one bill or one federal agency. Everywhere you look, it seems,
taxpayer-funded anti-Americanism is on the rise.

▶︎ In Virginia, where voters just smacked down
Democrats for their woke extremism, a professor at a state
university wants to destigmatize pedophilia!

▶︎ Joe Biden's Pentagon posted an opening for a
"diversity, equity, and inclusion" consultant to the U.S. Marine
Corps, a job paying $144,000 a year - almost twice as much as
actual Navy captains!

▶︎ The Biden Administration wants to give
$450,000 to the families of illegal immigrants - more than four
times the "death gratuity" we give to survivors of U.S. soldiers
killed in combat!
Enough is enough!
Please help Freedom Caucus conservatives fight back!

Joe Biden and his Democrats are not just spending
billions of dollars we don't have. They are spending YOUR MONEY
on a deliberate campaign to destroy the America we know and love.
If Joe Biden wants to finance child abuse and
illegal immigration, and demote military heroes to second-class
citizens, he can get the money from Hunter's finger-paintings or
his Big Tech billionaire pals, not more taxes or debt.
Conservatives in Congress and the states need to
stand up to this madness. The Democrats are treating the
sovereign American people like an ATM for their anti-American
agenda.
The House Freedom Fund is ready to support leaders
willing to take up this fight, but we need your help.
With inflation ravaging our economy, Critical Race
Theory poisoning our schools, and Big Tech and Big Media covering
it all up, our only hope is the courage and support of patriotic
citizens like you.
Please help us win this fight.

Help us fight the vaccine mandate. Help us fight
racist indoctrination in our classrooms and the degradation of
our military. Help us fight Biden's economic bumbling,
open-borders lawlessness, and foreign disasters. Help us fight
for America today.

Together, we can defund the Left's attacks on our
country and restore America's greatness.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

FREEDOM CAUCUS
CANDIDATES

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates
get the financial support they need to compete with establishment
candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington,
DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate
political action committee that helps elect conservative
candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only
supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and
limited government, and who support policies that promote
liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by
House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.
Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as
charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the
name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year.

PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY
ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM

name: Nathan Dahm
subject: I am protecting election integrity in Oklahoma. Will you join me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Dahm for Senate** ](https://em
body:
That is why I filed SB7X, the "Post-Election Forensic Audit Act of 2021", to call for a forensic audit of the November 2020 election results
| [ ](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VWzVjD3dHmvDW8WR6tw2r5ZnDW26rJbN4z_Bp8N2C5cyc3lLB3V1-WJV7CgHsnV7Q2QR4TZ-mtW8nR_V7412PrdW723qQc1kTMsvW2kGbSS6hpR0MN6ZLgM_N0nhDW8dfkHY4kCK_pW5ggBFS7vMFScW1BQq6M1-5mLcW6NnT917DqvVMW1njp-83gRLbgW6mDFdQ5K7wpxW5R3cCK8Y2xpFW8Lr8M75gMhCGW6MspTt7tnYdTW8kZFW23N8j9cW12F98m1xs76xW4-7YT13MZ_GXW8Q4GxW5DKw9QW7gMsTX60JVYnW3tJR8G8H6ShM3h9N1)
---
Peter,

The 2020 election was full of irregularities across the country, putting the entire process into question.

**Every election needs to be examined,****including Oklahoma's****.**

To make sure our elections are safe, I am leading the fight for election integrity in Oklahoma.

That is why I filed SB7X, the "Post-Election Forensic Audit Act of 2021", to call for a forensic audit of the November 2020 election results.

The bill would require a third party to perform a forensic audit on the three largest counties in Oklahoma, the three smallest, and another three randomly selected counties.

**We need to make sure our elections are trustworthy. Peter, now I need your help** to** ****improve****the integrity of our elections. **

[**Tell Oklahoma politicians to start a forensic audit by signing my petition >> **](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VWzVjD3dHmvDW8WR6tw2r5ZnDW26rJbN4z_Bp8N2C5cyc3lLB3V1-WJV7CgRxWW3-zkPm4GY5-BW1n290R8g2tSXW3ggvYC9jB1qpW5BBlfH93g66lW1vMxF18j98-1W7l1rGJ6L5ZhmW34D4Wz3XLqQPW7Hbx6Q1MW9ZDM_7h-gtVzGZW2KnRr34syhLRW8p6vjp4Q6z7zW21-pq71rhJxcW8nDDq67Fj7TGW8pSQBN4tV1y6F1F0HHXzWNZW4jRDhS4KTQKsW8XxcxT1s6BsSN6L9m1DS-rG0N4nzrTBmklMbW8P-LYj7yhCBY3kZ61) Oklahoma has one of the best election processes in the nation, partially because we have worked over the years to increase accountability measures such as requiring voter identification.

A forensic audit is another accountability measure we can use to make our system even better.

Having secure and trustworthy elections should be a top priority, and I will continue to fight, even if others in positions of leadership oppose these necessary accountability measures.

The 2022 elections cannot have the same irregularities as 2020.

[Add your voice to my petition and show Oklahoma politicians that you care about the integrity of our elections. Click here to sign today >>](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VWzVjD3dHmvDW8WR6tw2r5ZnDW26rJbN4z_Bp8N2C5cyc3lLB3V1-WJV7CgKYjW2P52tx8XGPh9N5fJ-792_L8wW2xpgWb5nBqGPW8P9JTM9dzpqLT7krT5Lb1rRW2KtK9H724D-_W7fZvGK610rw0W2Y8tcZ1M3v-PW6p6hbS4zY92fW63kJDm7jdphyW92s3lJ1Mr391W1Gzscd8SMbSdW26pn5S4pMgfBW2mwStn72tvm-W8mD5Bd67LMTTW5_ZMGC8BPVxlW56m1Lj4vG8YTW1R9nLt3FvMTXW58VWwT8Wy9gjW2YFFwM4DWTn-3m0r1)

Thank you,
---
---
Senator Nathan Dahm
Candidate for United States Senate
Personal cell number: (918) 615-2335
---
| [ **Paid for by Nathan Dahm for Senate** ](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VWzVjD3dHmvDW8WR6tw2r5ZnDW26rJbN4z_Bp8N2C5cyc3lLB3V1-WJV7CgD_nW3yrhRT9jnSTTW258mwd1C9DNHW5y4g2439G7FkW57JZYY5lSsB8W51w9JY8SBgB6W6JY4B7501w36W5FYtQQ4YxwfTW1t4r4R8fX3FzW5fH5n_6-M4d4V8VFX07CDlFTW1xdd3d97dgwBW8qhgh57LT_BZW8Fryhg4SHD7dW9gFxp27NT0xqW6TQQZv2N0w1wW5Kr0G76f_SlFW8GZ_n55wnN9BW4Gps4r6hZmX5W68BgHg9bfLgfW8k9d037KkNWJ3l-W1)

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: It could all come down to New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Friend, New Hampshire is one of the most important states in 2022. No matter who the Republican nominee is, this race is going to be a nail-biter. With the Senate split 50-50, we can't afford to take anything for granted. Maggie Hassan won her Senate seat by only 1,017 votes -- one of the closest in history. With margins like that, you can bet that the GOP is working overtime to restrict access to the freedom to vote – and she’s going to need an army of grassroots supporters to win in 2022. **Two wins in Georgia and 1,017 votes in New Hampshire determined our Senate majority. But Republicans are working to suppress the vote, and we need your help to fight back.** **[Please join me in supporting Maggie Hassan’s Senate campaign. Her race is a must-win for Democrats, and it’s going to be a close one.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38714025/316723341/-1803038125?refcode=e20211117_sa-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2M5MjRiZi1iNTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xusI9QSrOihupdrE_8prSiytw9RBdr_h6Bzb1Dplu4M=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38714028/316723343/-1803038125?refcode=e20211117_sa-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2M5MjRiZi1iNTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xusI9QSrOihupdrE_8prSiytw9RBdr_h6Bzb1Dplu4M=)

[Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38714034/316723350/-1803038125?refcode=e20211117_sa-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2M5MjRiZi1iNTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xusI9QSrOihupdrE_8prSiytw9RBdr_h6Bzb1Dplu4M=)
The future of our democracy is at stake, friend. The GOP is already attacking the fundamental right to vote, and it will only get worse if Mitch McConnell takes back power. If Maggie loses, we could lose our Senate majority.
Republican mega-donors and deep-pocketed super PACs have already spent over $4 million attacking Maggie, and millions more are on the way. With all eyes on this race, she needs a massive surge of grassroots support to fight back and win.

– Stacey Abrams

name: Eric Lynn
subject: Keeping Americans safe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
Iron Dome is now protecting the United States https://www.ericlynnforcongress.com [https://www.ericlynnforcongress.com]Dear friends,
When I worked as Senior Advisor to the Secretary of Defense in the Obama-Biden Administration, I was the lead official on the Iron Dome missile defense system.
This system has saved countless lives by disabling rockets mid-flight. Working with President Obama and the Secretary of Defense to help develop and deploy this system is one of my proudest accomplishments as a public servant, and this past week, we received major news relating to this technology.
For the first time, Iron Dome is being tested to protect the United States domestically!
Globally, the destructive potential of offensive weaponry is constantly evolving, so it’s important that our defense systems move to the next generation of technology as well. I found development proposals for the Iron Dome in the Bush Administration’s discard pile and brought it to the attention of the Secretary of Defense and President Obama. Thankfully, we pursued the project, and its success at stopping missile strikes has been undeniable.
My goals as a Member of Congress will be similar to those when I served in the Pentagon: to keep Americans safe, to protect our allies, and to keep the world peaceful.
I’m asking you to join me in that mission by supporting our campaign. Please, will you chip in today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-irondome-guam]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-irondome-guam?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-irondome-guam?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-irondome-guam?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-irondome-guam?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-irondome-guam?express_lane=true&amoount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-irondome-guam]Iron Dome is my proudest professional achievement so far, but it certainly will not be the last. I look forward to serving in Congress to accomplish our goals and advance our values.
Thank you,
Eric Lynn

Prize can be shared with one (1) guest. Odds depend on number of entries received. name: Derrick Van Orden
subject: Send A Trump-Endorsed Navy SEAL To Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795507:6fCtne2NR:m:1:3253819041:523900BC1114FA2B926B5250FF89C320:r)
---
_SEND A TRUMP-ENDORSED NAVY SEAL TO CONGRESS_
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795507:6fCtne2NR:m:1:3253819041:523900BC1114FA2B926B5250FF89C320:r "EXPRESS DONATE $5")
---
Hey there, it's Derrick Van Orden.

I'm a retired Navy SEAL, Afghanistan War Veteran & Trump-endorsed conservative running to beat Pelosi. I'm a Navy SEAL, so I'm not someone who usually reaches out like this, **[but I'm asking if you will help with just $5?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795507:6fCtne2NR:m:1:3253819041:523900BC1114FA2B926B5250FF89C320:r "but I'm asking if
you will help with just $5?")**

I wanted to take a minute to introduce myself and ask you to join my team of grassroots supporters. Because if I am going to fight back against the Radical Left's attacks, I need people like you, Fellow Conservative, in my corner.

I first answered the call to serve my country at 18 when I enlisted in the US Navy. And after 26 years of military service including multiple combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, I am ready to continue serving this great country in Congress.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795507:6fCtne2NR:m:1:3253819041:523900BC1114FA2B926B5250FF89C320:r)
---
_SEND A TRUMP-ENDORSED NAVY SEAL TO CONGRESS_
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795507:6fCtne2NR:m:1:3253819041:523900BC1114FA2B926B5250FF89C320:r "EXPRESS DONATE $5")
---
But my race will be one of the toughest for Republicans anywhere this time around. Because here's the thing: liberal mega donors already spent millions attacking me in 2020 and are ready to do the same again this year.

Listen, I'm no politician, just an everyday American who loves this country and has dedicated my life to serving it. And right now, America needs more patriots in congress who will put America first, not themselves.

**[I hate to ask, but I need your help to stand up to the Radical Left and fight for our country. There is simply too much at stake and failure is not an option.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795507:6fCtne2NR:m:1:3253819041:523900BC1114FA2B926B5250FF89C320:r "I hate to ask,
but I need your help to stand up to the Radical Left and fight for our country. There is simply too much at stake and failure is not an option.
")
**_SEND A TRUMP-ENDORSED NAVY SEAL TO CONGRESS_
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795507:6fCtne2NR:m:1:3253819041:523900BC1114FA2B926B5250FF89C320:r "EXPRESS DONATE $5")
---
So if you agree that we need more members of congress who put the country over themselves, then help send a Navy SEAL like me to Washington. Because America is on the line in this election, and we can't afford to sit on the sidelines.

Thank you,

Derrick Van Orden
Senior Chief Petty Officer, US Navy (ret.)
_ Derrick Van Orden is a U.S. Navy Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy._
---
| |
* * *

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP 'S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795508:6fCtne2NR:m:1:3253819041:523900BC1114FA2B926B5250FF89C320:r "Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?")**

name: FreeKyleUSA
subject: Emergency request for Kyle Rittenhouse
body:
Both the prosecution and Kyle's defense team have finished their closing arguments, and the jury is now deliberating.
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2id9si87j3kgod1k1lp5ag6jd6q48aagseq0nso_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chhm8oj6c1h2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

Both the prosecution and Kyle's defense team have finished their closing arguments, and the jury is now deliberating.

While the defense laid out the facts, the prosecution hailed the violent mob that attacked Kyle as "full of heroes" and argued with a straight face that the men who lunged at him, bashed him in the head with a skateboard, and pointed a loaded gun in his face were not serious threats to his life.

**This corrupt persecution has been extremely difficult and costly and we're reaching out with an emergency request to support his official legal defense fund.**

**[Will you please help right now? $50 or any amount will go a long a way.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znvt139lc4ta2fk4rllt5hbg04nl6m0mq4kpos0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chhm8oj6c1h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgvm847aoi5sa9oahie9q73k9u80j0oobo4qc24g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chhm8oj6c1h2bs)
|
---
Over the last 2 weeks, the truth has finally come out in a major way and many people have publicly spoken out about how wrong their initial reactions were.

And while some in the media have begun to admit mistakes, many have continued to distort and outright lie to the public. It's a disgusting thing to see.

We have been fighting an extremely uphill battle from the beginning, but with the support of thousands of our fellow Americans we have put up a big fight.

**[Everything is coming to a head right now, and so we ask you, as strongly as possible, to help with a donation of whatever you can.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znhv6a3vm53h8a0h6tr5sjk6830f3ing5f4ljkeg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chhm8oj6c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your unbelievable generosity.

No matter what happens, we will never, ever forget it.

– Team Kyle
|

name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: Heidi Heitkamp coming to Indiana!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
Join us next month! | | | |
---|---
| | Hello, Fellow Democrat \-- We are excited to share this news with you. Our special guest for this year's holiday party is: Heidi Heitkamp. Senator Heitkamp was a proven leader while serving North Dakota in the U.S. Senate, and she's excited to celebrate the hard work Democrats have accomplished since Joe Biden was sworn in as President. From the American Rescue Plan to The Jobs Act, Heidi is ready to share with you how Democrats can deliver for Hoosier families and win at the ballot box in 2022 -- no matter where they live.
