name: Julie Oliver
subject: I’m proud to endorse Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
**I’m happy to share some news with you: today, I gave Derek Marshall my unequivocal endorsement of his run for U.S. Congress.**

**Derek has what it takes to flip a red seat blue in California’s 8th District.** He’s an organizer at heart and understands that being out in his community talking to working people about the issues they battle everyday is the key to building lasting Democratic strength, especially in rural districts. Like me, he knows the importance of building a strong, grassroots community base in his district.

**[That’s why I’m personally asking you today to chip in and invest in Derek’s winning campaign. We need more bold, unapologetically progressive leaders in Congress—we need Derek. Will you chip in to support him today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38716830/316737277/492781650?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDdhZTQzZS1iYjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EHR_K9zKFJ2GuxFbMKXAP0-nneEZwx_ljaKIfT8YOtw=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38716833/316737280/492781650?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDdhZTQzZS1iYjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EHR_K9zKFJ2GuxFbMKXAP0-nneEZwx_ljaKIfT8YOtw=)
**With Derek in Congress, the progressive movement will have another champion** fighting for the popular issues working families care about like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and better jobs and wages. For all these reasons, I’m proud to endorse Derek Marshall for Congress.
**One of the most critical ways than an endorsement helps strengthen a candidate’s race is by supporting their fundraising efforts.** If you supported my candidacy, I’m asking you to throw your support behind Derek. He’s the real deal, and his campaign needs to build up the war chest they will need to take on a corporate-funded, Trump-endorsed Republican.
**[I believe Derek can flip this district blue, but he can’t do it alone. I’m here to invest in Derek, and I hope you will too. Will you chip in a few dollars today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38716835/316737283/492781650?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDdhZTQzZS1iYjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EHR_K9zKFJ2GuxFbMKXAP0-nneEZwx_ljaKIfT8YOtw=)**

In Solidarity,

**Julie Oliver**
Former Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-25

name: Letitia James
subject: Need you by my side, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38717263/316738063/324296880?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODRmYzFlYy1iYjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k4bElS7yLk-VVc4HajTfJhjJIdgNGo2BZpQz8UadLTo=)

Peter, just a few weeks ago, I announced my candidacy for governor of New York. And thanks to your incredible generosity, we're about to reach our first major milestone of this campaign: **$100,000 in generous donations raised online!**

As I launch this historic fight for equality and progress for the everyday working families of this great state, I am so grateful to have fellow fearless fighters on my side. And I want you to be one of them.
When it comes to helping everyday people, you know I never back down from a fight, no matter how large or small – I'll fight tooth and nail to protect the voiceless and defend the vulnerable from this country's wealthiest and most powerful interests.

**But I just can't go it alone, Peter. I need the top fearless fighters on my team to keep this incredible momentum going until the finish line – and that means YOU!**** **

[**Will you make a contribution of $5 or more before midnight tonight? We're just short of our first big campaign milestone, and I need you by my side as I fight for true equality for all New Yorkers.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38717264/316738064/1687198019?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODRmYzFlYy1iYjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k4bElS7yLk-VVc4HajTfJhjJIdgNGo2BZpQz8UadLTo=)
I have always fought – _and will always fight_ – to make meaningful progress for every last New Yorker in this state. That means suing Big Pharma for fueling the opioid crisis. Holding this country's most powerful interests – like Trump and the NRA – firmly accountable. Creating a health-care system that puts patients over profits. And launching an aggressive plan to tackle climate change. And I vow to continue standing on the front lines for equality, because I believe that is the change New York needs.

We're off to an incredible start – but this campaign is not a sprint. It's a marathon, Peter, and we must hit our goals every step of the way – starting with this one. Will you take that step with me?
**[_Rush a donation of $5 or more right now to help me continue fighting to secure equality for those who need it most. A gift of any amount can make all the difference in our fight for progress._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38717265/316738065/1687198019?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODRmYzFlYy1iYjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k4bElS7yLk-VVc4HajTfJhjJIdgNGo2BZpQz8UadLTo=)**

Thanks so much for being on my side in this vital fight.

Letitia James

And I vow to continue standing on the front lines for equality, because I believe that is the change New York needs. We're off to an incredible start – but this campaign is not a sprint. It's a marathon, Peter, and we must hit our goals every step of the way – starting with this one. Will you take that step with me? = Thanks so much for being on my side in this vital fight. Letitia James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Supporting Healthcare Heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Tomorrow, join me in standing with striking UPMC workers who have been on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic and put their lives on the line - all while UPMC posted record profits. Derek, Earlier this year, we saw the largest labor victory in the country take place right here in western Pennsylvania with the successful union election for Pitt faculty. I was proud to serve on the organizing committee and fight for the right to unionize alongside the Steelworkers. Across the country, workers are standing up to corporate greed and fighting for the dignity they deserve. **Tomorrow, join me in standing with UPMC workers who have been on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic. These hidden heroes have put their lives on the line - all while UPMC posted record profits.** It’s past time that UPMC treated these workers like the heroes they are and respect their union rights. Team, we’re _blown away_ by the support we’ve seen for Tom in this race so far -- from labor unions and elected officials to community leaders and every day Marylanders, folks are coming together to elect Tom.

But this is going to be a super competitive race where **every impression matters**. We need to make sure Tom stays ahead of the pack, and yard signs are a critical part of our ground game.

**_[Can we count on you to lend a patch of your yard, window, or walkway to support Tom’s campaign? Get your yard sign here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38720896/316743870/1985460641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDRiMDFkNS1iZjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qSpc1PVkEqMcx8LJDvyL4jjVXaAq817tuVbLb5MyU_o=&emci=06cd14cb-0047-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=144b01d5-bf47-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)_**

body:

| November 2021 Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---
Friends,
As we enter this holiday season of thanks and celebration, I would like to extend my thanks to you for all that you do to support our community efforts! Despite the challenges faced this year, you have done a tremendous job providing leadership and support to those who need it most. I am grateful to be part of such a collaborative and giving community!
---
|
---
---
| | | The Business Ecosystem Alliance for Minorities and Women ([BEAMW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Gbfr4lNUhj5rPl8JdPzp5eu5WM8XVNwDEpJU3TXcFzeTcAINJYQtIuSs-6UNw1yDMtZFoSF7vY6MO3kMN3AO-ou7LnpaIzQZpWFrVkxY1E_tM2AyROiEE_M3xRb2JqONENYzCW6Nln0=&c=B1ZQd-jklKpOoFJJ-701eFdWC16ZN8eHbKS_oXgV1kSGg0B54lhZKg==&ch=ll0t6qfoTInqvf55an6V4kA3pg7qhVNp_jn4UlYWf5tUr6RHtEiClw==)) is off to a stellar start with its work to support women and minority-owned small businesses! After a successful virtual launch in August, BEAMW hosted a Bankers' Roundtable to discuss the BEAMW [report](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Gbfr4lNUhj5rPl8JdPzp5eu5WM8XVNwDEpJU3TXcFzeTcAINJYQtIhlHmt3AokghtCGRujVbVug4VLbewPKxGn6bavTpbECiQQ8xgNxsppOejjOKDCXW017vgmfAErzvOZ5mg5HVdLVLPRrQ7jY7--bxg38M2OCTQ2VUACrmKzwU7tJWl-xyGgKCAQpgCkC1pFpx8b3B1YO26brQAH3GC0wSw3Tse55UkamQhAu_X9FL4fSvJoKYwQ==&c=B1ZQd-jklKpOoFJJ-701eFdWC16ZN8eHbKS_oXgV1kSGg0B54lhZKg==&ch=ll0t6qfoTInqvf55an6V4kA3pg7qhVNp_jn4UlYWf5tUr6RHtEiClw==) and help the banking community develop strategies to reduce barriers faced by women and minority-owned businesses seeking to access capital and to scale their businesses. We have also commenced our call for small businesses to sign up for one-on-one financial preparedness counseling [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Gbfr4lNUhj5rPl8JdPzp5eu5WM8XVNwDEpJU3TXcFzeTcAINJYQtIoNJ_R29cBFMlPLxS89sdAQK-GWriR-keY9cx7lmLyDRXIwU1fMVwnqxhlUYsHeUUOIz4VE_nrlWD5OEPIJ2zlAuhn4hBTMZyw==&c=B1ZQd-jklKpOoFJJ-701eFdWC16ZN8eHbKS_oXgV1kSGg0B54lhZKg==&ch=ll0t6qfoTInqvf55an6V4kA3pg7qhVNp_jn4UlYWf5tUr6RHtEiClw==). Make sure to [sign up](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Gbfr4lNUhj5rPl8JdPzp5eu5WM8XVNwDEpJU3TXcFzeTcAINJYQtIoNJ_R29cBFMlPLxS89sdAQK-GWriR-keY9cx7lmLyDRXIwU1fMVwnqxhlUYsHeUUOIz4VE_nrlWD5OEPIJ2zlAuhn4hBTMZyw==&c=B1ZQd-jklKpOoFJJ-701eFdWC16ZN8eHbKS_oXgV1kSGg0B54lhZKg==&ch=ll0t6qfoTInqvf55an6V4kA3pg7qhVNp_jn4UlYWf5tUr6RHtEiClw==) today!
Check out some of the photos from the BEAMW Bankers' Roundtable!

---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
In an effort to reduce barriers many women and minority businesses face in accessing networks that may assist with facilitating more access to capital, BEAMW launched its first of a series of networking events with banking institutions, small business owners, collaborators, chambers of commerce, and business support organizations. On Tuesday, November 9th BEAMW hosted its Networking Event featuring co-hosts: Texas Capital Bank, Impact HUB Houston, The Greater Houston Black Chamber, East End Chamber of Commerce, TruFund, Houston Minority Supplier Development Council, Houston Community College, Black Business Lab, and The National Association of Minority Contractors - Greater Houston Chapter. The event was an overwhelming success and was a first step in helping small business owners make key connections in an ecosystem focused on breaking down silos and removing obstacles that impact women and minority-owned businesses.
Many Thanks to our co-hosts, the BEAMW Events, and Marketing Committees, and Impact HUB for all your help with making this effort a success! Check out some of the photos from the BEAMW Networking Event!

---
---
|
---
---
CALL FOR VOLUNTEERS TO REBUILD MR. BROWN'S HOME
---
Four years after sustaining damage caused by Harvey, the devastation remaining in 85-year-old Mr. Brown is heartbreaking. I came to know of Mr. Brown because of his plumbing needs stemming from the Texas Winter Storm (Uri) & power outages. His neighbors reached out to me about Mr. Brown because of the work Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization was doing for seniors. In partnership with another non-profit partner (West Street Recovery), we sent plumbers out to help him, but the plumbers alerted me to outrageous circumstances Mr. Brown faced in his home.
We have since removed Mr. Brown from the home, but are excited to announce that Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization is teaming up with SBP USA to assist with repairing/rebuilding Mr. Brown's home so that he may return to a safe, decent home! We need volunteers to sign up to assist with the repairs. Please sign up using this [link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Gbfr4lNUhj5rPl8JdPzp5eu5WM8XVNwDEpJU3TXcFzeTcAINJYQtIk5ViDRe_1c4Viud4rkwrOTRGX64atEplLSpc0-hFvwoIwTQuHFjdNuWF1TUkjgo_bHcLd0QulKc_VDP47WRaXcRfblXDOOgFsjc088zxRKBoZsduMWzFKBCot83mIvxfoE8RHHEYj_-B2nP8r_E7zI=&c=B1ZQd-jklKpOoFJJ-701eFdWC16ZN8eHbKS_oXgV1kSGg0B54lhZKg==&ch=ll0t6qfoTInqvf55an6V4kA3pg7qhVNp_jn4UlYWf5tUr6RHtEiClw==) to volunteer. This holiday season, we need volunteers to assist with rebuilding Mr. Brown's home on Mondays through Saturdays. We are grateful to Melissa Correa & KHOU for highlighting Mr. Brown's journey. To learn more about Mr. Brown's story, click the image below. Please [sign up](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Gbfr4lNUhj5rPl8JdPzp5eu5WM8XVNwDEpJU3TXcFzeTcAINJYQtIk5ViDRe_1c4Viud4rkwrOTRGX64atEplLSpc0-hFvwoIwTQuHFjdNuWF1TUkjgo_bHcLd0QulKc_VDP47WRaXcRfblXDOOgFsjc088zxRKBoZsduMWzFKBCot83mIvxfoE8RHHEYj_-B2nP8r_E7zI=&c=B1ZQd-jklKpOoFJJ-701eFdWC16ZN8eHbKS_oXgV1kSGg0B54lhZKg==&ch=ll0t6qfoTInqvf55an6V4kA3pg7qhVNp_jn4UlYWf5tUr6RHtEiClw==) to help today!

body:
Peter, let me introduce you to my team

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38721675/316748076/145944154?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTIxOGM4NS1jMTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5aFSHv8UUomu-DKFO3lsEjZU3erMxP-rUp2nx2NSlqw=)
---
Peter, running against MAGA Republican Devin Nunes is difficult. Unlike him, I don’t have the same name recognition or billionaire buddies lining up to buy my vote in Congress.

But can I tell you what I’m most proud of? **This groundbreaking campaign is built by small-dollar donors _just like YOU, Peter._**

Sinema has consistently demonstrated that her loyalties lie with her mega-donors and corporate lobbyists — NOT middle and working class Americans.

Arizona Democrats who elected her have been more than disappointed by Sinema’s lack of follow-through with her promises of action on voting rights, climate change, immigration reform, and other issues.

And since being elected, she’s done nothing but actively block the bold, progressive agenda that Democrats are trying to achieve — all because of her own greed and personal gain.

Of course Sinema wants to keep the filibuster so that she can continue using her power to hinder advancement of progressive legislation. Of course Sinema sides with Big Pharma who has donated hundreds of thousands of dollars to her campaign.

**We must hold her accountable for standing in the way of progress.**

That’s why today, we’re supporting the new Primary Sinema PAC, which seeks to lay the groundwork for a primary challenge to oust Kyrsten Sinema. This PAC doesn’t plan to support any one particular challenger, but instead will fund local groups to pressure Sinema and help build necessary support and infrastructure for an eventual candidate.

Primary Sinema is supporting grassroots groups who are leading a fight against Sinema’s professional-gone-personal agenda and helping lay the path for a successful primary challenge. **[It’s time to send Kyrsten Sinema packing. Arizona deserves better. America deserves better. Will you make a donation right now to be split between BTE and Primary Sinema PAC so we can fight for leaders who represent our values and deliver for working-class people?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38722653/316753353/592120458?refcode=211115_FR_midmonth2_primarysinemapac_split_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0OWQyNTQ2LWM2NDctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hOkpetlKHuA33MRb7RKC4KO3DpFqATwTKlOGJ2X6Ab0=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **______[DONATE TODAY >> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38722654/316753354/592120458?refcode=211115_FR_midmonth2_primarysinemapac_split

name: Let's go Brandon!
subject: Your favorite shirt now in BLACK!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | **It 's not just a chant. It's a movement.

And we want to know, have you joined the "Let's Go Brandon!" movement yet?**

It's not too late to join. Start TODAY by claiming a FREE _" Let's Go Brandon!"_ t-shirt, now in BLACK! Just chip in $10 for shipping.

---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR FREE SHIRT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58797048:66nsXe2LN:m:1:3298722022:CE76D1C3537DE7F6B5001E319ABE29F1:r "Generic Button")
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58797048:66nsXe2LN:m:1:3298722022:CE76D1C3537DE7F6B5001E319ABE29F1:r)
---

This new shirt is FLYING off our shelves. **In fact, we will DEFINITELY run out by the end of today!**

**[To guarantee you get your hands on your very own, claim yours by 11:59 PM TONIGHT, or you risk missing out on this hot new product.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58797048:66nsXe2LN:m:1:3298722022:CE76D1C3537DE7F6B5001E319ABE29F1:r "To guarantee you get your hands on your very own, claim yours by 11:59 PM TONIGHT, or you risk missing out on this hot new product. ")**

Don't miss out on this. Join the movement before it's too late by claiming your FREE shirt.

---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR FREE SHIRT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58797048:66nsXe2LN:m:1:3298722022:CE76D1C3537DE7F6B5001E319ABE29F1:r "Generic
Button")
---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58797049:66nsXe2LN:m:1:3298722022:CE76D1C3537DE7F6B5001E319ABE29F1:r "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP 'S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58797049:66nsXe2LN:m:1:3298722022:CE76D1C3537DE7F6B5001E319ABE29F1:r "%%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%, can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58797049:66nsXe2LN:m:1:3298722022:CE76D1C3537DE7F6B5001E319ABE29F1:r "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

---

320 First St SE
Washington, DC 20003

name: Sarah
subject: SL: This is my THIRD time reaching out, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hi -- It's Sarah again.
Should I be worried? I have not received a reply from you. This is my _THIRD_ time reaching out.
We just need a couple more replies. [**Please, respond now and then I promise to stop flooding your inbox.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795994:6wKE_e2NU:m:1:3253819041:5B0B23465EF7CDFA1820209BDACAFCEB:r)
_\-- Sarah_

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795994:6wKE_e2NU:m:1:3253819041:5B0B23465EF7CDFA1820209BDACAFCEB:r)
From: Sarah
Subject: Hi, you weren't responding so I thought I'd check in one more time_

Hi again,
I wasn't planning on doing this but I'm really hoping you'll respond if I try one last time...
**Nearly everyone on this list said they 're on Trump's team, not with the Liberals.** Now I have the task of contacting the last remaining hold outs -- _including you._
[**I was able to extend your deadline to respond for just 10 more minutes. Can you take a moment to answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795994:6wKE_e2NU:m:1:3253819041:5B0B23465EF7CDFA1820209BDACAFCEB:r)
_\-- Sarah_

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795994:6wKE_e2NU:m:1:3253819041:5B0B23465EF7CDFA1820209BDACAFCEB:r)
From: Sarah
Subject: quick question for you_
Hey there,
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795994:6wKE_e2NU:m:1:3253819041:5B0B23465EF7CDFA1820209BDACAFCEB:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795994:6wKE_e2NU:m:1:3253819041:5B0B23465EF7CDFA1820209BDACAFCEB:r)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots. **
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58795994:6wKE_e2NU:m:1:3253819041:5B0B23465EF7CDFA1820209BDACAFCEB:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah
_Republican Headquarters (Team Scalise)_

Beto’s race in Texas and Cheri’s campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina are going to be two of the most competitive and important races of 2022.
[**Will you split a $3 donation between Beto and Cheri to help us elect these incredible leaders in 2022? name: Eddie Geller
subject: 🚩🚩🚩🚩 “Fiscal responsibility” 🚩🚩🚩🚩
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38724626/316762836/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211117midmonth_EG_main_long_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDg0ZmIwMi1jYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9SU5ozRgKH9Bj1jjvqa0ofVZo24e8bxS8zADObeORH8=)
---
Hey, friends —
While the Build Back Better Act slowly (but surely!) makes its way through Congress, I want to talk about two words that _only_ ever come up when Democrats are on the verge of something big: **fiscal responsibility.**
But first, let me just say up front that legislation like the Build Back Better Act is why I’m running for Congress — real solutions for real problems that will deliver real help to the people who need it. **My opponent Scott Franklin could never, would never, and has never.** [**Chip in now to help this campaign deliver a real champion for the people to Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38724628/316762839/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211117midmonth_EG_main_long_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDg0ZmIwMi1jYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9SU5ozRgKH9Bj1jjvqa0ofVZo24e8bxS8zADObeORH8=)
[Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38724630/316762841/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211117midmonth_EG_main_long_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDg0ZmIwMi1jYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9SU5ozRgKH9Bj1jjvqa0ofVZo24e8bxS8zADObeORH8=)
---
Back to my original point, and I’ll keep it very simple:
**The most fiscally responsible thing we could possibly do is _invest in our communities._**
Investing in our communities is a direct investment in our country’s future — and building a better future for our families and children is (I’m, like, 99% sure about this) literally the entire point of holding elected office.
**Laying the groundwork for historic climate action, expansions in health care access, universal pre-K, broadband internet access, reinvestments in education and job training, free community college, and more:** These are investments we can make _right now_ to improve the lives of millions, and, guess what? They’re all in the Build Back Better Act!
[**Will you make a donation to invest in this campaign, so that we can bring real leadership to Washington and invest in the people of Florida’s 15th District by passing legislation that actually improves their lives and sets their children up for the future?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38724632/316762843/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211117midmonth_EG_main_long_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDg0ZmIwMi1jYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9SU5ozRgKH9Bj1jjvqa0ofVZo24e8bxS8zADObeORH8=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

---|---|---
[$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38724640/316762851/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211117midmonth_EG_main_long_abx50&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDg0ZmIwMi1jYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9SU5ozRgKH9Bj1jjvqa0ofVZo24e8bxS8zADObeORH8=) | [$100](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38724642/316762853/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211117midmonth_EG_main_long_abx100&express_lane=true&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDg0ZmIwMi1jYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9SU5ozRgKH9Bj1jjvqa0ofVZo24e8bxS8zADObeORH8=) | [Other](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38724644/316762855/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211117midmonth_EG_main_long_abxother&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDg0ZmIwMi1jYzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9SU5ozRgKH9Bj1jjvqa0ofVZo24e8bxS8zADObeORH8=)
Your dad’s Grand Old Party told us that responsibility means saving dollars, and irresponsibility means spending dollars. Two opposing concepts, easy to remember, and even easier to ram into your voters’ heads over and over and over again — despite it being patently false.
**Let’s talk about what fiscal irresponsibility actually looks like.**
Forcing people to pay outrageous sums to pharmaceutical companies for life-saving medications is fiscally irresponsible.
$1.59 trillion of student loan debt — debt forced onto the very people who are entering the workforce for the first time, amid a pandemic, in this climate — is fiscally irresponsible.
Keeping families trapped in the cycle of poverty is fiscally irresponsible.
Continuing to let the climate crisis go unaddressed and unmitigated will be, I promise you, _catastrophically_ fiscally irresponsible. According to some estimates, inaction on climate change could cost us nearly $800 trillion. (No, that is not a typo.)
**This all means that the most fiscally responsible thing we can do for Florida’s 15th District is to elect someone who will actually step up and invest in our communities. I’ll let you guess who that someone is (hint: it’s _definitely_ not Scott Franklin). clean_body: | | = Hey, friends — While the Build Back Better Act slowly (but surely!) makes its way through Congress, I want to talk about two words that only ever come up when Democrats are on the verge of something big: fiscal responsibility. But first, let me just say up front that legislation like the Build Back Better Act is why I’m running for Congress — real solutions for real problems that will deliver real help to the people who need it. My opponent Scott Franklin could never, would never, and has never. = = Back to my original point, and I’ll keep it very simple: The most fiscally responsible thing we could possibly do is invest in our communities. Investing in our communities is a direct investment in our country’s future — and building a better future for our families and children is (I’m, like, 99% sure about this) literally the entire point of holding elected office. Laying the groundwork for historic climate action, expansions in health care access, universal pre-K, broadband internet access, reinvestments in education and job training, free community college, and more: These are investments we can make right now to improve the lives of millions, and, guess what? They’re all in the Build Back Better Act! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Your dad’s Grand Old Party told us that responsibility means saving dollars, and irresponsibility means spending dollars. Two opposing concepts, easy to remember, and even easier to ram into your voters’ heads over and over and over again — despite it being patently false. Let’s talk about what fiscal irresponsibility actually looks like. Forcing people to pay outrageous sums to pharmaceutical companies for life-saving medications is fiscally irresponsible. $1.59 trillion of student loan debt — debt forced onto the very people who are entering the workforce for the first time, amid a pandemic, in this climate — is fiscally irresponsible. Keeping families trapped in the cycle of poverty is fiscally irresponsible. Continuing to let the climate crisis go unaddressed and unmitigated will be, I promise you, catastrophically fiscally irresponsible. According to some estimates, inaction on climate change could cost us nearly $800 trillion. (No, that is not a typo.) This all means that the most fiscally responsible thing we can do for Florida’s 15th District is to elect someone who will actually step up and invest in our communities. I’ll let you guess who that someone is (hint: it’s definitely not Scott Franklin). = = Thanks for your support, Eddie | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. = | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. Box 1111 11507 Dr Martin Luther King Jr Blvd Mango, FL 33550-9700 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

**LET 'S GO BRANDON!**
Conservatives across the nation are taking a stand against Joe Biden. But this is just the beginning - _**THE RADICAL LEFT CAN 'T STOP US IF EVERY PATRIOT STEPS UP NOW. **_

When you chip in today, not only will you be supporting the **Let 's Go Brandon** Movement, but you will be helping House Conservatives as they fight to FIRE Pelosi and take back the House.

Lauren Boebert

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Major Endorsement Announcement
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
I am deeply excited to announce that I have been endorsed by an additional 22 elected officials from across Maryland. These latest endorsements represent the big tent coalition of diverse communities and political perspectives that our campaign continues to build.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsnov21?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsnov21?amount=20.22]Our growing coalition is united by its desire to speak up and speak out on behalf of Marylanders who deserve a better quality of life, and that starts with reorienting our politics around delivering concrete results every day. I’m committed to creating 100,000 new family-supporting jobs, cancelling student debt for graduates who live, work, and pay taxes in Maryland for 5 years after graduation, expanding home ownership through state backed mortgages, and expanding access to affordable healthcare for all of our communities.
This is one of the biggest moments of our campaign yet -- and we can’t let it go to waste! Fresh off the heels of this major endorsement announcement, will you chip in to help us maintain our momentum and win this competitive race? We’re hoping to raise an additional $5,000 to help us meet our fundraising goal for November, and a groundswell of grassroots support can easily get us there.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsnov21?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsnov21?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsnov21?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsnov21?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsnov21]Anything you can give to support our movement is greatly appreciated. 2022 could be the most expensive election in Maryland’s history, and it's essential that we don’t fall behind on our fundraising goals. If we do, we risk getting outspent by Republican opponents in the General Election.
This latest announcement is yet another indication that our campaign has the widest and deepest support among Democrats statewide. I have the largest number of endorsements of any candidate, and a recent poll has shown that I am leading the Democratic field by a wide margin. It’s evident that we have the momentum in this race -- and with your help, we’re going to pull ahead even further.
Together, we’re going to secure a brighter and stronger future for Maryland’s communities in 2022. Click here to chip in. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsnov21?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/endorsementsnov21?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/4d13015f-0947-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/2f96b12c-d147-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjk2YjEyYy1kMTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xMNaswguYDsC0LrrQbx-1OcNxpRw44yq_t6rB51-HmE=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

body:
Hello! My name is Sam over at Republican HQ. I have a quick question that I was hoping to get your opinion on. [**Right now my data is incomplete -- could you spare ten seconds to answer this one question?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58797143:6QK4ee2NK:m:1:3253819041:931E8FB0E3DC7182827EA50EBC4064A4:r)
As I'm sure you've heard, my favorite President -- Donald J. Trump -- is launching a brand new social media app. I'm so excited to sign up! But when I was combing through the thousands of Patriots who pledged to join, **I was disappointed to see your name not on our official list ...**
I know you're busy but could you do me a favor and respond in the next 10 minutes? _I promise to not bug you again! So will you join?_
**[Yes: I Stand With Trump >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58797143:6QK4ee2NK:m:1:3253819041:931E8FB0E3DC7182827EA50EBC4064A4:r)**
**[No: I Don 't Support Trump >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58797143:6QK4ee2NK:m:1:3253819041:931E8FB0E3DC7182827EA50EBC4064A4:r)**
President Trump is building his very own platform to stop Big Tech from controlling what we can and can't see... censoring strong Conservative voices... and blacklisting content they don't agree with.... _And the Liberals are desperate to stop him._
**Thousands have already signed a petition to BAN his app from the Apple and Google app stores -- they 'll do ANYTHING to stop him.**
President Trump needs to know we have his back.
[**So would you join? I 'll be on the lookout for your answer in 10 minutes from now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58797143:6QK4ee2NK:m:1:3253819041:931E8FB0E3DC7182827EA50EBC4064A4:r)
Thanks for all you do.
\-- Sam
_Republican HQ (From The GOP Whip Office)_

subject: How families win:

body:
We need a government that’s focused on working for working families
#

We need a government that’s focused on working for working families.
Here’s what that means:
🇺🇸 Protecting our democracy
⚖️ Reforming our justice system
💊 Making prescription drugs affordable
🍎 Investing in education
💵 Raising wages
🌎 Taking bold action on climate
🚘 Improving our infrastructure
👨👨👦 Expanding paid family leave
🏥 Affordable healthcare for everybody
🌈 Passing the Equality Act
✊ Strengthening worker’s rights
🗣️ Securing reproductive freedom for all
That’s how families win and how we win.
[Will you pitch in $3 to help Malcolm Kenyatta fight for working families in the United States Senate? Any donation, no matter the size, puts us that much closer to building a government that works for working people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38726626/316771158/-360183459?refcode2=2d8b261c-d247-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211117-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDhiMjYxYy1kMjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tuL9AIVYTW1EDrzjE7rq_tcuo-PaAtg602Xw1mUI4xQ=)

name: Josh Riley
subject: overwhelmed with gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
Since I announced my campaign for Congress, I’ve been overwhelmed by the response.

| _Josh Riley is a Democrat running for Congress to bring Upstate New York Square Deal values to Washington.**If you do not wish to receive important updates about Josh's campaign, please[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f72b97b2-ce47-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/90b79663-d447-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGI3OTY2My1kNDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1sbWtqVIdmUx6QpnuSrz8YhwrYELh0PlZiCPVGdEZG0=&id=106311268).**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38726919/316772899/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-Launch-2-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGI3OTY2My1kNDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1sbWtqVIdmUx6QpnuSrz8YhwrYELh0PlZiCPVGdEZG0=)
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38726920/316772901/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-Launch-2-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGI3OTY2My1kNDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1sbWtqVIdmUx6QpnuSrz8YhwrYELh0PlZiCPVGdEZG0=)
---
Peter,

Since I announced my campaign for Congress, I’ve been overwhelmed by the response. Friends, family, and perfect strangers alike have reached out with kind words, notes of encouragement, and grassroots support.

**I’m touched -- and more importantly -- I’m hopeful. Because this is just the beginning.**

[_**The powerful coalition we’re already forming is proof that Upstate New Yorkers are ready for change. Will you join our movement and chip in $5 or more to flip this seat blue and restore real leadership to our communities?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38726921/316772902/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-Launch-2-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGI3OTY2My1kNDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1sbWtqVIdmUx6QpnuSrz8YhwrYELh0PlZiCPVGdEZG0=)
| [CHIP IN ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38726922/316772903/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-Launch-2-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGI3OTY2My1kNDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1sbWtqVIdmUx6QpnuSrz8YhwrYELh0PlZiCPVGdEZG0=)
---
Right now, Republican Claudia Tenney is taking money from special interests and lining her own pockets with it. Then she goes to Washington and votes for them instead of delivering results for working families--even though the purpose of public service is to serve the public, not enrich oneself.

**That is why we are doing things differently. This is a grassroots campaign focused on bringing people together, lifting each other up, and having each other’s backs.**

[_**Meeting the challenges of this moment won’t be easy. But nothing worth doing is. name: Kayla Williams
subject: Join Wes this Saturday 11/20 at the Silver Spring Parade!
body:
[image: image.png]

Dear Friend:

ICYMI—Wes invites you to walk with him to the Silver Spring Parade this
Saturday, November 20. Can we count on you to be there?

--

Thanksgiving is right around the corner, and this year, we have a lot to be
grateful for. We are grateful for your unyielding support and excited to
invite you to a special Thanksgiving event.

Wes is going to walk in this years’ Silver Spring Thanksgiving Parade. We
invite you to join Wes, his family, and our team—show your support for Wes
and walk the parade.

We will be meeting at the *Town Square Garage on the 6th floor no later
than 8:15 AM. Lineup begins at 8:30 AM. *

*CAN WE COUNT ON YOU TO BE THERE?*
<https://www.mobilize.us/wesmoore/event/423157/>

WHAT: Join Wes at the Silver Spring Thanksgiving Parade

WHEN: Saturday, November 20, no later than 8:15 PM

WHERE: Town Square Garage (786 Ellsworth Dr, Silver
Spring, MD 20910) at 6th Floor

RSVP: https://www.mobilize.us/wesmoore/event/423157/

We are counting on you to be there. Share this with your network—and bring
a friend with you!

Thank you,

Kayla

--
*Kayla B. Williams* (she/her)
*Engagement Organizer*
(973) 303-1963
kayla@wesmoore.com

Twitter <https://twitter.com/iamwesmoore> | Facebook
<https://www.facebook.com/iamwesmoore> | Instagram
<https://www.instagram.com/iamwesmoore/>

Join our team: *wesmoore.com <http://wesmoore.com>*

body:
I can win in Florida – but without you, friend, I cannot compete with GOP millions tipping the scales.
| | |
---
Friend, I'm 2 points behind Marco Rubio in the polls, and experts say this race will come down to who has the resources to compete.

**That's why this is so concerning: Florida can decide Senate control, and I'm currently $11,424 short of my midnight fundraising goal. ****So my team sent me your updated supporter record:**
| | Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Suggested contribution: $5
Today's donation: **PENDING**
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38727305/316775178/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1713-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDA1YTgyZC1kNzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VuD6uExq0ufzrpKlPXFfwv_JbZLkurvSzHoEty-CdbM=)
---
Donations from your state: 68% to goal
**Deadline: 11:59 p.m.**
---
This race is about more than just my unlikely story of opportunity – it's about a meaningful movement for Floridians and the country, it's about defending the Senate. Mitch McConnell only needs one seat to flip a 50/50 Senate – and we can't let Florida be the seat securing him Senate control.

We can win this – CNN is calling this seat a top pickup opportunity – but we have a steep hill to climb. The GOP is pouring more than $10 MILLION into organizing Florida to register a groundbreaking number of Republican voters _._

**Republicans are working in overdrive to make sure no Democrat can flip Florida ever again, friend. This is our moment: It has never been more important to build the infrastructure to fight back, and we need to make early investments. We can't do that if we miss this goal. **
I know this people-powered movement is strong enough to defeat Marco Rubio and the GOP, but we need to raise another $50,000 RIGHT NOW to register more Democratic voters and flip Florida blue**. Please, friend, I'm counting on you to help me reach this goal:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38727306/316775179/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1713-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDA1YTgyZC1kNzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VuD6uExq0ufzrpKlPXFfwv_JbZLkurvSzHoEty-CdbM=)
**[Friend, rush $5 right now to help me close our fundraising gap before midnight tonight, pull ahead of Marco Rubio in the polls and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38727307/316775180/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1713-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDA1YTgyZC1kNzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VuD6uExq0ufzrpKlPXFfwv_JbZLkurvSzHoEty-CdbM=)**

Val Demings

| Friends, Below take a look at my latest Op-Ed published in the Union Leader this past week. It is imperative that we give parents a voice in their childrens' education. That's what we've done here in New Hampshire, and that's what they should be doing down in Washington! \- Chuck
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Sen. Chuck Morse: Parents are being heard from Virginia to New Hampshire**

“I DON’T THINK parents should be telling schools what they should teach.” Those words from former Virginia Governor Terry McAuliffe are why he will not be the future Governor Terry McAuliffe. During a debate with Republican challenger Glenn Youngkin in late September, McAuliffe defended his veto of a bill that would have let parents prevent their children from being exposed to materials they found objectionable.
The power of parents over their children’s education became the central issue of the gubernatorial campaign over the final month, with Youngkin stressing that parents should have ultimate control, while McAuliffe argued that parents should not be able to object to the decisions of public school officials. On election night, Virginia parents settled the question, delivering a shocking upset win to Youngkin in a state that Joe Biden had carried by 10 points just one year ago. The power of parents to guide the education their children receive proved to be decisive in the most watched race in the nation. Democrats attacked Youngkin for standing up for parents, falsely accusing him of wanting to ban books. They called him a racist for opposing the use of Critical Race Theory in public schools, arguing both that CRT didn’t really exist and that opposing it was a sign of White supremacy. Voters didn’t buy the smears. Parents have the power to bring about political change. Politicians ignore them at their peril. In New Hampshire, Republicans at the State House have been listening to parents and empowering them to be more involved in their children’s education. The COVID-19 pandemic put a huge strain on our students, and while some thrived, others struggled. We heard from parents that they needed more choices, and we listened. As part of the state budget, we created Education Freedom Accounts, which give parents the ability to direct how the state’s contribution to an adequate education is used. The program is limited to families earning 300% of the federal poverty level and structured similarly to New Hampshire’s successful Education Tax Credit Scholarship Program. Throughout the budget debate, we were told that expanding school choice would dismantle public education. Nonsense. Most parents will always choose their local district school, but there is no one-size-fits-all approach to schools. Every child learns differently, and EFAs are a way to provide a great education for kids that aren’t thriving in a traditional classroom environment. We provided new choices and parents responded. In the first year of this innovative program, 1,600 families in need have qualified for EFA scholarships. That’s 1,600 kids who will have a better path towards a great education. Parents are concerned that radical left-wing theories such as Critical Race Theory have seeped into our schools. Young kids are taught that they are born privileged and racist. This is unacceptable and should never have been allowed to happen in our schools. So we included anti-discrimination language in the recent state budget, ensuring that schools will not teach that one race is inherently superior or inferior to another. We need to teach our children our history, including those times when America has struggled to live up to our founding ideals. But we must never teach them racist lessons. Parents will be heard. If state legislators, school board members, or gubernatorial candidates ignore them, they will be heard at the voting booth. They will put themselves forward as candidates. They will give support to candidates who are willing to listen. They will rightly demand a greater say in what and how their children are taught. We listened to parents in New Hampshire this year. Glenn Youngkin listened to them in Virginia. I expect their voices to be heard all across the country in 2022. Sen. Chuck Morse (R-Salem) is president of the New Hampshire Senate.

Hello! My name is Sam over at Republican HQ. I have a quick question that I was hoping to get your opinion on. I know you're busy but could you do me a favor and respond in the next 10 minutes? _I promise to not bug you again! So will you join?_
**[Yes: I Stand With Trump >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58798732:6mKv5e2Ne:m:1:3298722022:B97B4080D95D96579673E8ABA42F9C68:r)**

President Trump is building his very own platform to stop Big Tech from controlling what we can and can't see... censoring strong Conservative voices... and blacklisting content they don't agree with.... _And the Liberals are desperate to stop him._
**Thousands have already signed a petition to BAN his app from the Apple and Google app stores -- they 'll do ANYTHING to stop him.**
President Trump needs to know we have his back.
[**So would you join? I 'll be on the lookout for your answer in 10 minutes from now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58798732:6mKv5e2Ne:m:1:3298722022:B97B4080D95D96579673E8ABA42F9C68:r)
Thanks for all you do.
\-- Sam

name: Rod Dorilas
subject: You won't believe what this Congresswoman just said ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
White supremacy is not the greatest threat to our democracy. It's Marxist sympathizers. Do you agree? |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=3e492c15b0414fe9a563e9fa8ec28b85&_t=-i6xIBwwSwp2snPRO5niT27xb2L91N_93pAEisyqz0etbQA1koH2cfpviRqkdmByE1J7FmSrE8b3Z2v-cuA_II3THXLHAkUz6f26nrw2zfW28wC4QaWu1SaqidLKvnRO_a_wzXkbaq36bUJCcb3pEMzvhknP5lcAHnS6zSBoOH4%3D).

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3e492c15b0414fe9a563e9fa8ec28b85&_e=8ebnV_tXmk_TrSLsng3RAl8f77o6Qns5vb6Y9SInc1BabcOdq-Or-KkDfNy_Oqg7oONmwfdr8s161LUD-lS8Iyy7kM5AYoHFO03xIcTkKcim3GrpHYD1gYngd2VoG3BsnLhe2wIERknUnd2QUjwUWkt0QtCK4U_0mPmhxbkyCkQLmvkgWyhDjJo0niT744iEE3srQVSZUiIa_6yYnwVcSMhU4erLz0fWjD2RYDD95YQ_nEylL5D3Y0PBc8q_8zEcbEyHtODpDV-J0CRjQv9uI2SE4F1hg3-RXOMHpheonIPaBKbrXt4CSDHqL9774efo-rdoGkNRoRh8o4c-tXSAffz2NtIg1ATig-y8F4rN3Nu20W-G2liFnxdccvz9R2jeyuhYSQ4tNlVNjiLb6siEaLn0Vp9hwZ-_hvimQUM-1h96CWx83Mg4n5bY05CCBjM0OYroh-bCXutG8Xpt4lzCUw%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

If you follow politics even just a little bit, then you’ll probably have heard of Rep. Cori Bush of Missouri. She’s a pretty spiteful person and has a habit of tweeting things about members of the Republican Party that are racist, false, and just plain deplorable.

Here is her latest tweet – presumably written in response to recent Republican victories in Virginia/New Jersey:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3e492c15b0414fe9a563e9fa8ec28b85&_e=8ebnV_tXmk_TrSLsng3RAl8f77o6Qns5vb6Y9SInc1BabcOdq-Or-KkDfNy_Oqg7oONmwfdr8s161LUD-lS8Iyy7kM5AYoHFO03xIcTkKcim3GrpHYD1gYngd2VoG3BsnLhe2wIERknUnd2QUjwUWkt0QtCK4U_0mPmhxbkyCkQLmvkgWyhDjJo0niT744iEE3srQVSZUiIa_6yYnwVcSMhU4erLz0fWjD2RYDD95YQ_nEylL5D3Y0PBc8q_8zEc4ul4ui4jLRV1ivNiC6KNZrJ_q2_UQ2ggMsSXhuqVvQ8WblP5m8lBg4XeNpE4zHh3STPfDJKooDh01JhBAbYA9hSUM7ZZEu35hVZ3oH5C1I-5Iv3AEMzDXPGE4fADmyAAQUd8OaKwZx1GTGhwhy9INFSDxOWM0HoJD5-ooiPRmC5qyZf_pNboafkc46EyypJ6371yArBr19mV74QzMUkjkA%3D%3D)
As a black man - **who also happens to be a first generation American born to Haitian immigrants** - this kind of rhetoric makes me seethe. Ask anyone who knows me, and they’ll tell you that I’m a very even-keeled man. But this type of reverse racism cannot and should not be tolerated.

My name is Rod Dorilas, REPUBLICAN candidate for Congress in Florida’s 21st congressional district, and I’m writing to you today to tell you that white supremacy is NOT the single greatest threat to our democracy. **The single greatest threat to OUR democracy is the radical socialist and Marxist ideologies/policies being peddled by the Far Left** , of which Ms. Bush is the leader.

**[Today, I’m humbly asking: would you consider making a gift of any amount to my campaign for the U.S. House so that I can challenge the lies Ms. Bush is pushing- straight to her face as a fellow member of Congress? ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3e492c15b0414fe9a563e9fa8ec28b85&_e=8ebnV_tXmk_TrSLsng3RAl8f77o6Qns5vb6Y9SInc1BabcOdq-Or-KkDfNy_Oqg7oONmwfdr8s161LUD-lS8Iyy7kM5AYoHFO03xIcTkKcim3GrpHYD1gYngd2VoG3BsnLhe2wIERknUnd2QUjwUWkt0QtCK4U_0mPmhxbkyCkQLmvkgWyhDjJo0niT744iEE3srQVSZUiIa_6yYnwVcSMhU4erLz0fWjD2RYDD95YQ_nEylL5D3Y0PBc8q_8zEcazPdeaR2fq9BD7DNQPTFQ3_Iwe_3qkil17waINJLokEVGvxsPKz7sPNV3OxInpQOVtkG2UxD7Dh7q3Vx3zp-2Lr_sD9fewaJvc9rKP5GDj34rR3dBG4ze_QYFm8XosD-pgCSCiZiTdXmu1sVmdaZSdGt5GWHkKsz0FwWhnNnOJzAORFd_TvMeNdvHe9t2Rh9AF3konGYh-5tsCKzxeyGWw%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3e492c15b0414fe9a563e9fa8ec28b85&_e=8ebnV_tXmk_TrSLsng3RAl8f77o6Qns5vb6Y9SInc1BabcOdq-Or-KkDfNy_Oqg7oONmwfdr8s161LUD-lS8Iyy7kM5AYoHFO03xIcTkKcim3GrpHYD1gYngd2VoG3BsnLhe2wIERknUnd2QUjwUWkt0QtCK4U_0mPmhxbkyCkQLmvkgWyhDjJo0niT744iEE3srQVSZUiIa_6yYnwVcSMhU4erLz0fWjD2RYDD95YQ_nEylL5D3Y0PBc8q_8zEczLw3rxNqqbFkqaB8JTWM4Fm-mW8_QyCcQEI910EPLE4zuwynxs7KKyZjTG5R6EmcKeT5syWYNJMWE9A3BO6igX4-xXTJBJgxoY3ZZZAyCjUW8VB7bpKVKhfYLyhDmdxv-AIBz98VE3U_jgSOcmmlUyiD3mERvcEYNY-tXVvDR2km2cxna107c15wF6o_uhc6mHj45OQQ1erVUhKkEtiBuA%3D%3D)

[** HELP ME PUT A STOP TO DEMOCRAT RACISM >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3e492c15b0414fe9a563e9fa8ec28b85&_e=8ebnV_tXmk_TrSLsng3RAl8f77o6Qns5vb6Y9SInc1BabcOdq-Or-KkDfNy_Oqg7oONmwfdr8s161LUD-lS8Iyy7kM5AYoHFO03xIcTkKcim3GrpHYD1gYngd2VoG3BsnLhe2wIERknUnd2QUjwUWkt0QtCK4U_0mPmhxbkyCkQLmvkgWyhDjJo0niT744iEE3srQVSZUiIa_6yYnwVcSMhU4erLz0fWjD2RYDD95YQ_nEylL5D3Y0PBc8q_8zEcrXbJFJWh0cB1nrern7u7g_7cEMOCMD_JdaVRguYCvDv-gNhqSln3e_jgRS3YeLmquq6aO4ie3UcOtGrMF1yFPF0XL1ikFf7irOip7nJH68kdk3d3ewK_9VfWZ0ncQ3wMm9BIRVxaJjnxafwzP1awZ9WxCW7RGgoo_24Tyus_7ZXCLr9euVNrqSLGNtrrV3PitV737nhtt5kco-R2rGxhSg%3D%3D)
Frankly, I’m sick and tired of this crap. Ms. Bush believes that African Americans are a monolithic group of people who cannot forge their own path.

Yes, slavery existed in this country for a very long time. And as it so happens, it was abolished a very long time ago. To say that the fallout from slavery is still holding people back is a lie promulgated by Democrats who want to keep black voters from switching to the Republican Party.

It’s GOT TO STOP.

**Every time Ms. Bush takes to twitter to spread her vitriol, she is insulting me and my family personally**.
1. I JOINED THE MILITARY AT 17 YEARS OLD TO SERVE THE STARS AND STRIPES.

2. I UTILIZED THE GI BILL TO PAY FOR MY LAW SCHOOL.

3. I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

4. My parents came to this country from Haiti, the poorest country in the Western Hemisphere, and picked crops in South Florida to make sure that my siblings and I could grow up to live OUR AMERICAN DREAM.

Please consider a gift to my campaign today so that I can let the folks in my district know that they have a choice between a member of the Democrat left and a Republican who believe the best days of the country are still ahead of us.

I don’t care about the color of people’s skin – **we are an EQUAL OPPORTUNITY COUNTRY** - the only thing that matters is whether or not you’re willing to put in the work to achieve your dreams.

Fellow American, If you follow politics even just a little bit, then you’ll probably have heard of Rep. Cori Bush of Missouri. She’s a pretty spiteful person and has a habit of tweeting things about members of the Republican Party that are racist, false, and just plain deplorable. Here is her latest tweet – presumably written in response to recent Republican victories in Virginia/New Jersey: As a black man - who also happens to be a first generation American born to Haitian immigrants - this kind of rhetoric makes me seethe. Ask anyone who knows me, and they’ll tell you that I’m a very even-keeled man. But this type of reverse racism cannot and should not be tolerated. My name is Rod Dorilas, REPUBLICAN candidate for Congress in Florida’s 21st congressional district, and I’m writing to you today to tell you that white supremacy is NOT the single greatest threat to our democracy. The single greatest threat to OUR democracy is the radical socialist and Marxist ideologies/policies being peddled by the Far Left , of which Ms. Bush is the leader. Frankly, I’m sick and tired of this crap. Ms. Bush believes that African Americans are a monolithic group of people who cannot forge their own path. Yes, slavery existed in this country for a very long time. And as it so happens, it was abolished a very long time ago. To say that the fallout from slavery is still holding people back is a lie promulgated by Democrats who want to keep black voters from switching to the Republican Party. It’s GOT TO STOP. Every time Ms. Bush takes to twitter to spread her vitriol, she is insulting me and my family personally. 1. I JOINED THE MILITARY AT 17 YEARS OLD TO SERVE THE STARS AND STRIPES. 2. I UTILIZED THE GI BILL TO PAY FOR MY LAW SCHOOL. 3. I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office. 4. My parents came to this country from Haiti, the poorest country in the Western Hemisphere, and picked crops in South Florida to make sure that my siblings and I could grow up to live OUR AMERICAN DREAM. Fellow Conservative,

My opponent not only admitted that she is going to be supporting President Biden’s $4 trillion, but she is also justifying her support for the socialist agenda based off recent redistricting/empirical data that suggests she is going to have a very hard time winning reelection in a district that just voted for the Republican gubernatorial nominee by 16+ points.

Recently, Abigail Spanberger gave an interview to the New York Times and said that “ _**to be clear, I’m going to have a hard time getting re-elected anyway**_.” Well, I guess that means give into the left flank of the party in the time that you have left in Congress and vote Bernie Sanders’ agenda!

**[Will you chip in $5 to my campaign today to help me make sure that there is zero chance this ultra-vulnerable Democrat congresswoman fails in her re-election bid?](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=0f1448c8b66541b0bac293177c617ac0&_e=WftGh7u47YRASqj8r-Yeu5KzW-FONpLBqlbJCsuhLQ-qKXx3P_5X53bnzCUND8V_acfJrp3_3P4KS3ewV0Jc0Zy-EmWjKhhN49VagxDZUyztngi9ybdcA9MuRV-OPr0rIAZ7fk2xcjdD9jcZ0hYV4jravW5fgDayH9WWHeyKqUv4wgO2G4YLO_VHoBDbuYWOn4iyZdTPgDXpzouxJhIMh2ETmcO0ZVsWqh2gUdtldfqNrakDrTI-I7SIadiAByEj_imUkANhCs1cKlZIflbw8u3Z2SriFj9ZstR6dxnaw-URr_lXGo_pJBXMcMP6pWBgtfaQeowPGO_ElBmlk0Q3v0NZ6RUI4fu22RtGBT8_XW6eAzG61Q2z56aZfI2g1VPp_8-w_rUGKL1We_yNhbtopVXs_qNWahd9Q_CmME7w1DSC3gCzroyv5nfPwV3VLt0f)**

My opponent may be low-hanging fruit, but when Republicans only need 5 seats to win back the House majority, we can’t take anything for granted.

| [**SEND A MODERATE DEM PACKING
** **› › **](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=0f1448c8b66541b0bac293177c617ac0&_e=WftGh7u47YRASqj8r-Yeu5KzW-FONpLBqlbJCsuhLQ-qKXx3P_5X53bnzCUND8V_acfJrp3_3P4KS3ewV0Jc0Zy-EmWjKhhN49VagxDZUyztngi9ybdcA9MuRV-OPr0rIAZ7fk2xcjdD9jcZ0hYV4jravW5fgDayH9WWHeyKqUv4wgO2G4YLO_VHoBDbuYWOn4iyZdTPgDXpzouxJhIMh2ETmcO0ZVsWqh2gUdtldfq4qx3NBXyF886vOaB27pzXu3xr3O1Iu2fu_aRm9tONGkxAYwE-NC8DzeZargjCavyhMGMhWfrj5mwIb-ibso_xEgdkY0SLgL_1UQ_iuqE425G-4PVF4hc_nE--5B_AcBGf3HRBKUvR5UrYNU-ssk6M2gTH5S-JffBD7UmrDq2q7yz92sdvY4NDL7SUH6Ow_RK63yST1uzHncJRvHGO_wFJ)
---

The signs of Abigail’s demise are everywhere. _**The Washington Post**_ just ran an article titled “Control of the U.S. House could be decided in the Richmond suburbs,” coincidently where my opponent lives and a home to thousands of people I’m hoping to represent in Congress.

This race is the real deal, Fellow Conservative. **[That’s why I’m asking you to invest in our operation today.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=0f1448c8b66541b0bac293177c617ac0&_e=WftGh7u47YRASqj8r-Yeu5KzW-FONpLBqlbJCsuhLQ-qKXx3P_5X53bnzCUND8V_acfJrp3_3P4KS3ewV0Jc0Zy-EmWjKhhN49VagxDZUyztngi9ybdcA9MuRV-OPr0rIAZ7fk2xcjdD9jcZ0hYV4jravW5fgDayH9WWHeyKqUv4wgO2G4YLO_VHoBDbuYWOn4iyZdTPgDXpzouxJhIMh2ETmcO0ZVsWqh2gUdtldfrtZG75vJPboinHP2m3lVpcAUzoB45nWbj3BdxsPxj25gMnO85EXgjMNhK0cT6j1yE6BpK7JGn18sd69urDilrCgwgTJtcI7ES7Oox3ih1ugVUiFuoTk9nALIFcbfsQmca_cvSO0scoq62RqZAYLrKVYGoH7uSnlL27LpSrxJLFbpUq_HtvPKGxnXzaMw_zg76i4FypGK-NYybQ173LzI0b)**

Let’s make sure that the scenario in which my opponent is painting in interviews with the New York Times come true.

“ _**There’s a lot of times where a single vote could in fact be the fodder for enough attack ads that my demise is begun**_.”

**[I need money to run ads using her own words against her](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=0f1448c8b66541b0bac293177c617ac0&_e=WftGh7u47YRASqj8r-Yeu5KzW-FONpLBqlbJCsuhLQ-qKXx3P_5X53bnzCUND8V_acfJrp3_3P4KS3ewV0Jc0Zy-EmWjKhhN49VagxDZUyztngi9ybdcA9MuRV-OPr0rIAZ7fk2xcjdD9jcZ0hYV4jravW5fgDayH9WWHeyKqUv4wgO2G4YLO_VHoBDbuYWOn4iyZdTPgDXpzouxJhIMh2ETmcO0ZVsWqh2gUdtldfo-fTP-mEAU_aTDLQPj-wAWlNGdJ7bGt9o1xlgAZXt--X63PYy7hq1-Zq3zSi5Wi1QZ-UY9iXhbfxP-7NOI7cUS15sN2V9LbQiF8HnLqU82yCSMVJ0z_7NqLtal3D1ZVOMFQDqK5JBTy4n5-lI0yA4jdrSLB-7Ayst-ndvGDuz00-Q1Arf1cYIHIY_9IYW3DhdBLHrMudi2PC0oo3NPJXRB)**. Make no mistake, he intentionally chose Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for his morbid video as a symbol. She represents a government that works for the people and uplifts marginalized communities in the face of right-wing white supremacy — and that terrifies Rep. Gosar.
The House of Representatives will soon vote on censuring Gosar — a formal reprimand that has only happened 23 times in the history of the House.
If successful, he will also be stripped of two key committee assignments.

_Rolling Stone_ reports he offered blanket pardons to rioters that attacked the Capitol on January 6, 2021.
Jennifer Gosar, Paul Gosar’s younger sister, called him a “sociopath”, and asked, “Where’s the accountability?”

Friend,

The liberal media is attacking the Rittenhouse trial with everything they have:

* The liberal liars at MSNBC are calling the judge a white supremacist.

* The liberal liars at CNN had one of Rittenhouse's attackers on Anderson Cooper, telling a different story than what he testified at the trial.

* The liberal liars continue to paint Kyle as racist and evil despite any evidence.

**The attacks on truthful reporting have escalated as the liberal bias in the media is being exposed more than ever before. **

Let me tell you how my organization, the Media Research Center (MRC) is defeating the liberal liars in the media. We are the only organization solely dedicated to exposing media bias.

_When the MRC was founded in 1987 over 75% of Americans trusted the liberal bias in the media ... now 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media_.

[**I am asking for your urgent support today to help us expose the lies being told in the Rittenhouse trial. Can you click here to donate $10, $35, $50, or more?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvh32242pj6sbh1s5n0re58qgqbtsrlj0drfqhao_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chjm6pb2clh2bs)

Here is how the Media Research Center is TAKING DOWN the Fake News media:

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.

* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.

* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC's social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh8f632npq76in8ndp8sk346pcakjgk1dh7akj28_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chjm6pb2clh2bs)

Americans are waking up to the bias. Trust in the media is at an all time low. It's in large part due to our work.

But MRC does not have woke corporations supporting us. We rely 100% on Americans who believe in American values of truth over the media.

**I am reaching out to you to help us raise $25,000 online to expand our operations. **

[**Please send an urgent donation today to MRC and support our work.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfp4jda0iu3lqmi1ot1kjscqlihqd29oprnlhv80_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chjm6pb2clh2bs)

Brent Bozell

We rely 100% on Americans who believe in American values of truth over the media. I am reaching out to you to help us raise $25,000 online to expand our operations. Believe in America, not the media. We are winning this battle for truth in reporting. But as we expose the media, their attacks increase. Your support can help us fight back. Thank you, Brent Bozell Founder and President of MRC If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Mary Vought
subject: Senate Primaries
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

Up against the woke, socialist Democrats, every
election matters. But some elections matter more than others.
Next year, the elections that matter most will be
Senate Republican primaries. Joe Biden is lost (in more ways than
one!). And he is dragging his party down so far, even cheating on
election day won't save them. But weak, craven Republicans still
could.
That's why the primary elections are so important -
and why Senate Conservatives Fund is putting all our resources
into those fights.
In North Carolina, Freedom Caucus conservative Rep.
Ted Budd is in a primary fight against former Gov. Pat McCrory -
a career politician most known for raising taxes and endorsing
Common Core. In the Senate, Budd would be a vote to Make America
Great Again. McCrory would be a vote to Make Mitch McConnell
Great Again.
In Alabama, the story is the same. Conservative Rep.
Mo Brooks - who stood shoulder to shoulder with President Donald
Trump throughout his first term - is in a tight race against a
long-time Washington insider backed by big business.

In Ohio, proven conservative fighter Josh Mandel is
running against several shape-shifting, Wall Street-backed
Republicans. Unlike his opponents who talk the talk, Josh has
walked the walk. He's fought the Left on election integrity, the
Second Amendment, Critical Race Theory, and trans ideology in our
schools. He is the pro-God, pro-Trump, pro-America candidate in
this race. That's why corporate money from around the country is
pouring into Ohio to defeat him.

And in Nevada, Navy war veteran and former state
Attorney General Adam Laxalt is up against the Left's machine,
which fears that a strong conservative will win the Republican
nomination and defeat one of the most liberal Democrat
incumbents.

Help flip the Swamp's script by supporting these
four outstanding candidates with a split contribution!
Washington is trying to write a script for how these
primaries will go: put RINOs in red caps and have them mumble
about the border and hope primary voters don't notice their game.
SCF is for conservatives who are sick of the game.
We're not interested in red and blue, or party labels. We want
conservatives - tough, fighting, principled leaders who will
fight for America's values against both parties in Washington.
No more deals. No more cocktail parties. The woke
socialist Left has declared war against our country. SCF is only
interested in Senate candidates ready to take that fight to the
Left... and win it.
These candidates do exist. SCF supports them. But
they can't win unless conservatives around the country support
them too.
Please support these outstanding conservative
candidates with a split contribution today!

Your candidate donations will go instantly to their
campaigns so they have the resources to win.

Thank you for fighting for America's future.
Together, we can change Washington by changing the people we send
there!

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

PRIORITY SENATE CANDIDATES

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem111721 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem111721] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Good afternoon!
This week, I was excited to spend time in our nation’s capital to get ready for the next phase of our campaign.
https://fb.watch/9l0uzHOOEl/ [https://fb.watch/9l0uzHOOEl/]
Click to see my recap above and check out those views!
Walking around the capital, surrounded by the institutions emblematic of our democracy, reaffirmed my commitment to service. Together, we can make the promise of the Constitution a reality.
In service,
Wade
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Support Wade [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem111721] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Wade Herring, lawyer and community volunteer, is running for Congress in Georgia’s First Congressional District. Wade grew up in Macon, Georgia. He has worked with the law firm of HunterMaclean since 1985. Among other volunteer positions, Wade has served as president of the Savannah Bar Association, chair of the trustees at Wesley Monumental United Methodist Church, and board member of Georgia Appleseed. Wade is a graduate of Dartmouth College and the University of Georgia School of Law.Wade lives in Savannah, Georgia with his wife Susan of 39 years. Wade and Susan are the parents of two children, a son who is a lawyer in Atlanta, and a daughter who is a doctor in Winston-Salem, North Carolina.

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Thanksgiving Food Fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Future First Leadership PAC
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_1_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- With Thanksgiving right around the corner, I know many of us are wondering how we'll manage the political fault lines and cultural tripwires we'll encounter around the holiday table. How did we get like this? Too many Americans (including loved ones) have become so toxically tribal that it's tearing apart many friendships, workplaces, churches, and even families. And too many politicians and media outlets choose to feed us a steady diet of fear and lies, which sure does earn them plenty of power and profits. But what's good for them is hurting the rest of us, along with the country we love. It wasn't always this way; it doesn't have to stay this way! That's why I'm launching a brand new video today that uses humor to highlight just how ridiculous things have become, and what we must do to overcome the forces that are tearing us apart.
### **WATCH: Don't Let Thanksgiving End in a Food Fight!**
[****](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRammOwrVwIBZk9XWUx2dr7O&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_1_nd&n=2) | [](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRammOwrVwIBZk9XWUx2dr7O&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_1_nd&n=3 "Watch on YouTube") [Watch on YouTube](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRammOwrVwIBZk9XWUx2dr7O&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_1_nd&n=3)
---
[](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=JgIBoJDRsS4q5gIGXkALndg1i7qvFgndqocsxXiiicY&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_1_nd&n=4 "Share on Facebook") [Share on Facebook](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=JgIBoJDRsS4q5gIGXkALndg1i7qvFgndqocsxXiiicY&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_1_nd&n=4)
---
[](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TqvTBEl6bRlislEO4xguw5QDr8h-NrruogOKcG-C6blSRyQfSrKXejgeAVpI6t7BIg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_1_nd&n=5 "Retweet on Twitter") [Retweet on Twitter](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TqvTBEl6bRlislEO4xguw5QDr8h-NrruogOKcG-C6blSRyQfSrKXejgeAVpI6t7BIg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_1_nd&n=5)
---
I know one silly video isn't going to solve our nation's problems. But I also know it will prompt conversation, inspire people to action, and introduce us to a lot of great Americans discovering Country First for the very first time. That's why it's so important that you share this video far and wide, via email and your social media channels. **Will you share it today?**
Thanks for all you'll do to help us make this video and movement a success. I couldn't do it without you -- and wouldn't want to.
Country First,

Adam
