name: Ed Rollins
subject: Chris Christie just backstabbed President Trump - will you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great America PAC**
body:
The former Governor of New Jersey, Chris Christie, isn’t pulling any punches. | | [](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=de1cf0420d3443e8831502955afc717b&_e=oMyAAMvGmV01zRlo2jNrDCWtLiYXnH_QDcA7kuTOLAlJwG-dg2Nw3pMNsLy8Y09PqkptASK0CJIGOhWgqwcN-QuPpR_DAtokc0VAMVknJTLVRLlVNQ35xNqxFiFKGSTi2UlHPMBLO3WiPrR1OO-X0fOolXatWA60lUVkeVNBCkAr9k1kGkkbLUriOQtjXFkX6JtAmr-4M3KOs7t900_5MDFQPvYZmjMw5FEdu74tJFoK51JlRJ2FXYvOlk2IWi-5I3noivvovgCozEyk5oRKq96gI0CTMYqosVv32ZPdoyEjJTXEMtqRFGnW5H1jjWHrgMwA2Ta3_FnlPGQIjtVH4P7DyQ6HstpzZZrZ_wxGKS-AZX6LvyAY0e4VuF0wO2tEocEx9j8nylsvt7fc7l81TH30mi7sKwwFtt18WMnFz59-tfZj5arGXNTQkgjOEgDE) | Peter,

The former Governor of New Jersey, Chris Christie, isn’t pulling any punches. He’s out at Republican fundraisers slamming his former boss, President Donald Trump - and obviously looking to position himself for the 2024 GOP nomination.

He’s also got a new book out, “Republican Rescue” - in which he apparently lays out his plan to save the Republican Party - from Donald Trump.

In Politico’s recent article _“Christie’s Calculus: Trump is ‘In the Rearview Mirror,’”_ we read that Christie thinks Trump is a “loser” for continuing to protest the stolen 2020 election.

Well, Peter, I was quoted in the Politico article, too - and I stand by what I said then: “To the Trump people he’ll come across as a traitor. And they’ll come after him, big-time...”

[**Peter, the establishment hacks in the media and squishy turncoats like Chris Christie think Donald J. Trump is securely in the “rearview mirror” for Republicans - but what about you?**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=de1cf0420d3443e8831502955afc717b&_e=oMyAAMvGmV01zRlo2jNrDCWtLiYXnH_QDcA7kuTOLAlJwG-dg2Nw3pMNsLy8Y09PqkptASK0CJIGOhWgqwcN-QuPpR_DAtokc0VAMVknJTLVRLlVNQ35xNqxFiFKGSTi2UlHPMBLO3WiPrR1OO-X0fOolXatWA60lUVkeVNBCkAr9k1kGkkbLUriOQtjXFkX6JtAmr-4M3KOs7t900_5MDFQPvYZmjMw5FEdu74tJFohc-NSUxtOgfZZ7Bepz9y1t5ebR56yGhRWY2CeDRi1eCqz8Z98FShpbPvINXVS_B51OifhoSyGjt32XFqsMddRI7R42F93cRKSFm7kn9LUSD2dVDX6OAmi063UpbNbdeiblkRBGMIta66TWZOOO4k4rgDs1jYeTeGXtauCf9ufsUSOLmbHujMMpeSbBzeVrVGBqzZxXfL1TCYOKgKe15jk)

[**Do you still stand with Great America PAC and President Trump policies. clean_body: The former Governor of New Jersey, Chris Christie, isn’t pulling any punches. | | | Peter, The former Governor of New Jersey, Chris Christie, isn’t pulling any punches. He’s out at Republican fundraisers slamming his former boss, President Donald Trump - and obviously looking to position himself for the 2024 GOP nomination. He’s also got a new book out, “Republican Rescue” - in which he apparently lays out his plan to save the Republican Party - from Donald Trump. In Politico’s recent article “Christie’s Calculus: Trump is ‘In the Rearview Mirror,’” we read that Christie thinks Trump is a “loser” for continuing to protest the stolen 2020 election. Well, Peter, I was quoted in the Politico article, too - and I stand by what I said then: “To the Trump people he’ll come across as a traitor. And they’ll come after him, big-time...” And after you do, if you are determined to prove the doubters wrong and see President Donald Trump once more win a historic victory and return to the White House, please match your expressed support with grassroots action that will help us make it happen - make a generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even more to Great America PAC as well! Sincerely, Ed Rollins, Chairman, Great America PAC | | | Paid for by Great America PAC 107 S. name: Team De Gregorio
subject: What They Are Saying: Marine Veteran De Gregorio Takes on Gottheimer
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iwFNRQM_CBRskXvjoh9r7GE3I4Y9bP5YP9XeZ4n7JKsla8RBC0_PtGGg6zrwnd7RRAlB0v740zLZkfnZK0Eh2LQVD-icCRlBBV_hSvAYaGNPm0zaVV7M_D_jxPotabBMS-g405rmaUr4TpZXSDqc4A==&c=n0R714VIqtxL-YndrgEwq4uSFpKUh-8mUV8l-b3vtr2JdQy98fGYYQ==&ch=Rblv8B3VQGcM6BZ3VtqYgbl9a3DeBqVg2rynaiD0U_pZ8wHSDewAhA==)
---
| What They Are Saying: Marine Veteran De Gregorio Takes on Gottheimer
---
|
---
| De Gregorio, a lifelong resident of New Jersey's Bergen County, was a 16-year-old high school student when terrorists attacked the World Trade Center - just 12 miles away - on Sept. 11, 2001.
"None of us will ever forget that day," De Gregorio said in a campaign launch video. "We could hear the roar of the fighter jets over our classroom and we could see the thick black smoke coming from the skyline. ... That was the day I decided to take action and serve my country in uniform." Read [more](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iwFNRQM_CBRskXvjoh9r7GE3I4Y9bP5YP9XeZ4n7JKsla8RBC0_PtB_9A3x4jQFpHtvpg76cz2uFR0zjWr7Dj15rzCwLMKmIVFfp3GQ4SsFYs7Pl9luMAzfg0ejIQzCV1vyIYKiTaH2v26Gg3bfxPtCDnKcDjUKKMrSknIskB-PGx28yTsrik0L4ayFTSrL_Pb3r6FitLVwZyGHV4d1IcaJrgndyeHjII3fctqp_Dyo2aING2X3tpBErhwu-ubU6TaPrBZB14AU=&c=n0R714VIqtxL-YndrgEwq4uSFpKUh-8mUV8l-b3vtr2JdQy98fGYYQ==&ch=Rblv8B3VQGcM6BZ3VtqYgbl9a3DeBqVg2rynaiD0U_pZ8wHSDewAhA==).
---
|
---
| Declaring that the country is "dangerously off course" in his introductory remarks (see below), De Gregorio - who narrates the nearly two-minute video - adds that socialism and Leftist radicalism are "not what I fought for" overseas. Read [more](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iwFNRQM_CBRskXvjoh9r7GE3I4Y9bP5YP9XeZ4n7JKsla8RBC0_PtAo2tEjKQGWJHbhP_zYz1Kl8aaVBoRfMltKO5b_2pSfqqjNI3DpjozE4o_zOwah5rvWZ-kTEmDkCcpZrRYF_WUseXufL45aroek47VUCAK0_UrKds_cW2rYi_jLclouIU4DecXvS2GCVs2dsCXmFwrGabagwtNC5Lw_R7Xr7T8iaeoCTYDgmQ2Ujq2rE-TFH9wOL-SADBb0iEJUwLBLXPWDH_PtJtjrk9aCbHu6Nz1DnRLm8dGLZk-5KNhCmAtgXrwRrz0Gd5jZU6tUVJpuUauEISTsWiuceZCIj_5oBNOTqaQ452n6TtPienqqQb11UOKJDibChNYxEhKMkOyOzLK9aoXautcqLDNffVL4CLYx98aJJc51Y694_dcTNvz0SEg==&c=n0R714VIqtxL-YndrgEwq4uSFpKUh-8mUV8l-b3vtr2JdQy98fGYYQ==&ch=Rblv8B3VQGcM6BZ3VtqYgbl9a3DeBqVg2rynaiD0U_pZ8wHSDewAhA==).
---
|
---
| If he does win, DeGregorio will be many things: the first Republican elected to federal office in Bergen County since 2014, one of around 90 veterans in Congress - the lowest number since World War II - and, at 36, one of Congress's relatively few millennials. But the thing he'll be most of all, he said, is an independent voice. Read [more](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iwFNRQM_CBRskXvjoh9r7GE3I4Y9bP5YP9XeZ4n7JKsla8RBC0_PtAo2tEjKQGWJTH5IlAscnsFVLJ7pdMvVWgoZHcEpVC5K1ZLcEfQsuo3aFaps2TzW9eyfWeDAUlgT1y_Df8Ex82AUt-Xisywm_0yHBkQZr0jFuShZv-sqHGeHBEqXiJZ1QTU0XLCfAT8da0KFGXO9ZRB1ZlhKYmZWvaOCPz8vi0hPRGv0BI-16g51Y4roEmzXvLpyLYKytvdG&c=n0R714VIqtxL-YndrgEwq4uSFpKUh-8mUV8l-b3vtr2JdQy98fGYYQ==&ch=Rblv8B3VQGcM6BZ3VtqYgbl9a3DeBqVg2rynaiD0U_pZ8wHSDewAhA==).
---
|
---
| De Gregorio -- a Republican who served in the Marines for nine years completing tours in Iraq, Afghanistan and Africa -- said in his campaign announcement video that he is running because "our country is dangerously off course." Read [more](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iwFNRQM_CBRskXvjoh9r7GE3I4Y9bP5YP9XeZ4n7JKsla8RBC0_PtAo2tEjKQGWJvY0MbUmIpQJi9tYp-nk9PflFL5_B-P5TyHWX-21lacmmVSPQLbEjeuAuqWjCOOFqPZjJwkldLEZJ64PtVlQm72hR1b4XGSQC_eQZYMFTOqFyPHNiGtcbI1C8ZDpfI5gp1QqSi4tv35KzWWZa2VaBqe_ZTTB9T2OC8bNLm-hM-5FPaRcjTjiQm5RxhTLwHssS&c=n0R714VIqtxL-YndrgEwq4uSFpKUh-8mUV8l-b3vtr2JdQy98fGYYQ==&ch=Rblv8B3VQGcM6BZ3VtqYgbl9a3DeBqVg2rynaiD0U_pZ8wHSDewAhA==).
---
|
---
| "Marine veteran Nick De Gregorio launched a political bid Wednesday to challenge Rep. Josh Gottheimer, D-N.J., a moderate lawmaker labeled by the National Republican Congressional Committee as vulnerable in next year's midterms." Read [more](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iwFNRQM_CBRskXvjoh9r7GE3I4Y9bP5YP9XeZ4n7JKsla8RBC0_PtAo2tEjKQGWJPqiIBtAdB41K7SgC5FJYg5ieC70zO6r7FkQZA1tlXUlNDPPSi9pE32QiTsnQCrC9cywjcmwQf4p26pPsfjObl65JthAtZC9F5_ryxpyc9kBxhOlrAo4uKijJ4KxosHcPVYf0T9nuCTN2rC9enHRqHg2eDRkWNe-u0XRHgqrxucZDptI2qPzmPA==&c=n0R714VIqtxL-YndrgEwq4uSFpKUh-8mUV8l-b3vtr2JdQy98fGYYQ==&ch=Rblv8B3VQGcM6BZ3VtqYgbl9a3DeBqVg2rynaiD0U_pZ8wHSDewAhA==).
---
| | |

| [www.nickfornj.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iwFNRQM_CBRskXvjoh9r7GE3I4Y9bP5YP9XeZ4n7JKsla8RBC0_PtGGg6zrwnd7RRAlB0v740zLZkfnZK0Eh2LQVD-icCRlBBV_hSvAYaGNPm0zaVV7M_D_jxPotabBMS-g405rmaUr4TpZXSDqc4A==&c=n0R714VIqtxL-YndrgEwq4uSFpKUh-8mUV8l-b3vtr2JdQy98fGYYQ==&ch=Rblv8B3VQGcM6BZ3VtqYgbl9a3DeBqVg2rynaiD0U_pZ8wHSDewAhA==)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: We have to pick up the pace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
We are a top target of the corporate special interests who will do and spend whatever it takes to defeat us.
#
Friends,
I know we send you a lot of emails. But in just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important to our chances.
Here is the truth:
In just a few days, our mid-month fundraising drive comes to an end. And when it does, we’re going to take stock of the ads running against us and the resources we need to fight back.
It’s no secret, we are a top target of the corporate special interests who will do and spend whatever it takes to defeat us. They spent millions against us in 2020, and they’re already doing it again in this election.
We won last time because we built the largest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. That’s just a fact. We received millions of donations and ran an unprecedented volunteer effort.
But the dark money groups are already back, and that means we need to rebuild a grassroots campaign of similar size, or even larger, if we’re going to win again.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Media lies about Rittenhouse
body:
The liberal media is attacking the Rittenhouse trial with everything they have: [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8024%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=QhORmPASJx70T4FVS1LfMw&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18618%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sh2GhbAZh8qxotJU7ynGUQ&sysid=1)
Friend,

The liberal media is attacking the Rittenhouse trial with everything they have:

* The liberal liars at MSNBC are calling the judge a white supremacist.

* The liberal liars at CNN had one of Rittenhouse’s attackers on Anderson Cooper, telling a different story than what he testified at the trial.

* The liberal liars continue to paint Kyle as racist and evil despite any evidence.

**The attacks on truthful reporting have escalated as the liberal bias in the media is being exposed more than ever before. **

Let me tell you how my organization, the Media Research Center (MRC) is defeating the liberal liars in the media. We are the only organization solely dedicated to exposing media bias.

_When the MRC was founded in 1987 over 75% of Americans trusted the liberal bias in the media ... now 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media_.

[**I am asking for your urgent support today to help us expose the lies being told in the Rittenhouse trial. Can you click here to donate $10, $35, $50, or more?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18610%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fONcfQ84z%2fq4YU4wVE1buA&sysid=1)

Here is how the Media Research Center is TAKING DOWN the Fake News media:

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.

* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.

* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC’s social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18618%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sh2GhbAZh8qxotJU7ynGUQ&sysid=1)

Americans are waking up to the bias. Trust in the media is at an all time low. It’s in large part due to our work.

But MRC does not have woke corporations supporting us. We rely 100% on Americans who believe in American values of truth over the media.

**I am reaching out to you to help us raise $25,000 online to expand our operations. **

[**Please send an urgent donation today to MRC and support our work.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18613%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SSM5I9P61xlfwLxcTHUoQg&sysid=1)
[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $5,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18618%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sh2GhbAZh8qxotJU7ynGUQ&sysid=1)

Believe in America, not the media.

We are winning this battle for truth in reporting. But as we expose the media, their attacks increase. Your support can help us fight back.

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: Some lessons, and maybe even a wake-up call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Losing just one Senate seat turns challenging into outright impossible. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38729121/316784460/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ1Z_EVG_C_20211117_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDViYTFiZC1kZjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAfO4o7CWc3sMpxC7cH8UlUjJYjvj90urstMaLAyitA=&emci=89efe85c-d847-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=345ba1bd-df47-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9027908)
---
We’ve seen some great wins in 2021 — like Michelle Wu making history as Boston’s new mayor. And while a number of this year’s races didn’t go exactly as we’d hoped, they did provide some lessons and maybe even the wake-up call we needed heading into next year’s midterms. Our shot at the big, structural change we need for our country’s future hangs by just one Senate seat — and with states nationwide finalizing their new congressional maps, some House races are bound to be more competitive than ever before. **That’s why it’s important we build on our grassroots coalition now and not a moment later. And by making a donation today, you’ll be helping grow our movement to fight alongside Elizabeth for more progressive policies and an expanded Democratic majority in Congress.** [_**If it makes sense for you right now, can you pitch in $3 or whatever makes sense to help re-elect Elizabeth, support Warren Democrats across the ballot, and fight for the future of our country?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38729122/316784461/-1292854963?refcode=EMZ1Z_EVG_C_20211117_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDViYTFiZC1kZjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAfO4o7CWc3sMpxC7cH8UlUjJYjvj90urstMaLAyitA=&emci=89efe85c-d847-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=345ba1bd-df47-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9027908) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: Losing just one Senate seat turns challenging into outright impossible. | | | We’ve seen some great wins in 2021 — like Michelle Wu making history as Boston’s new mayor. And while a number of this year’s races didn’t go exactly as we’d hoped, they did provide some lessons and maybe even the wake-up call we needed heading into next year’s midterms. Our shot at the big, structural change we need for our country’s future hangs by just one Senate seat — and with states nationwide finalizing their new congressional maps, some House races are bound to be more competitive than ever before. That’s why it’s important we build on our grassroots coalition now and not a moment later. And by making a donation today, you’ll be helping grow our movement to fight alongside Elizabeth for more progressive policies and an expanded Democratic majority in Congress. | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | Passing some of the more ambitious parts of President Biden’s Build Back Better framework has already been quite challenging. Losing just one Senate seat turns challenging into outright impossible. We’ve got no choice but to build on our existing majorities, and with the type of progressive minds who believe in our vision for America. Early grassroots donations go the furthest because they help us organize right away, so that Democrats just like Elizabeth can get the resources they need to win. Thanks for your continued support, Team Warren = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2021 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Patty Murray
subject: The power is in our hands, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
It’s up to us to beat the GOP and keep the Senate blue.
#
Peter,
While Senate Democrats are working to build on our progress after the infrastructure bill and pass the Build Back Better budget, the Republicans are making their plans to flip the Senate.
They know they have a surefire way to stop President Biden and Senate Democrats’ progress -- and that is to take back our razor-thin majority and install Mitch McConnell as Majority Leader.
**[It’s up to us to beat the GOP and keep the Senate blue. I’m doing everything I can -- but I can only reach my $21,987 fundraising goal with your support. Contribute $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38729834/316788960/881441298?refcode=pm_em_211117_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjg1YTcxNi1lMTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYps1vREc5wweg-0VCsUwdMmT6_nt_btBSXNnjpniqo=)**
From the Senate to the White House, Democrats are making progress for working families. But it’s all riding on the slimmest 50-50 Democratic majority. **_That’s why this fight is so important._** Republicans only need to flip one seat to roll back our work and raise costs for working families.
This deadline is one of our last chances to finish this year ready for Democratic victory in 2022. The power is in our hands -- and I believe we can win the fight for the Senate and our future.
**[We’re racing to meet our mid-month fundraising goal. Will you pitch in $5 or more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38729838/316788963/881441298?refcode=pm_em_211117_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjg1YTcxNi1lMTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYps1vREc5wweg-0VCsUwdMmT6_nt_btBSXNnjpniqo=)**
Thank you,
Patty

body:

Peter,

There's no doubt about it: Anthony Fauci needs to resign.
* _He lied about masks. _
* _He lied about funding gain of function research._
* _And he's never going to tell the truth about the origins of COVID-19._

He's intentionally misled, misinformed, and failed the American people.

But here's the thing: a power-hungry bureaucrat like Fauci is never going to step down on his own accord.

Just look at this recent headline:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58798801:JoRv0e2ZN:m:1:3253819041:432F66B36F06EDBB4EFCE08FB329D08B:r)
That leaves us one choice, Peter. If Fauci won't step down, he must be FIRED.

**[I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58798801:JoRv0e2ZN:m:1:3253819041:432F66B36F06EDBB4EFCE08FB329D08B:r) **

We know if the media's favorite doctor had his way, COVID-19 would NEVER be in the rearview mirror.

You can tell by the way he downplays natural immunity, hypes up any "variant" of the virus, and ignores the most recent, effective treatments for Coronavirus.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy Fauci EVER. He won't sacrifice the power if he has a choice. _That 's why he's basically telling us he's NEVER going to step down. _

But I refuse to allow Fauci's chaos to become permanent. I'm calling on the administration to do what is right and FIRE FAUCI NOW.

Will you join my fight by chipping in today?

name: Dr. Caraveo
subject: Peter, I'm a doctor.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
My family lived the American Dream. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38730332/316792342/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTkyODkwZS1lMzQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CnBDs8gnxCIliElC0gu5nvYh2K58YC6bXXVx2OyMblQ=&emci=d791c144-d647-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fe92890e-e347-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)
---
| | Peter,

I’m a doctor.

I decided to become a pediatrician because I wanted to help people in my community — especially children. While treating Medicaid patients, I quickly realized that families across Colorado needed help in so many more areas than just health care.

I ran for the state legislature and I was able to get real results. I passed legislation to lower prescription drug prices, limit toxic pollution, expand preschool funding, ensure paid leave, and protect renters from eviction during the pandemic.

But there were still so many challenges that just can’t be changed at the state level. So I decided to run for Congress.

Our leaders aren’t doing enough for our communities because they don’t understand our communities.

I’m a first-generation American and a doctor. I will listen to public health officials, prioritize our communities’ needs, and stand up for real Colorado values.

**[But I can’t win this election without the support of grassroots donors like you. clean_body: My family lived the American Dream. | | Peter, I’m a doctor. I decided to become a pediatrician because I wanted to help people in my community — especially children. While treating Medicaid patients, I quickly realized that families across Colorado needed help in so many more areas than just health care. I ran for the state legislature and I was able to get real results. I passed legislation to lower prescription drug prices, limit toxic pollution, expand preschool funding, ensure paid leave, and protect renters from eviction during the pandemic. But there were still so many challenges that just can’t be changed at the state level. So I decided to run for Congress. Our leaders aren’t doing enough for our communities because they don’t understand our communities. I’m a first-generation American and a doctor. I will listen to public health officials, prioritize our communities’ needs, and stand up for real Colorado values. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = With gratitude, Dr. Yadira Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. clean_body: an insurrectionist is running for Congress | | | Derek — Insurrectionist Amanda Chase is running for Congress! The 2022 election cycle is just getting underway and we’re going to need to lay the groundwork early if we want to hold onto this seat and re-elect Abigail Spanberger. There is no way to sugar coat this — Amanda Chase is a radical right-wing extremist running in a swing district that went from Biden to Youngkin this year. The path to holding onto the Democratic majority in Congress runs through Virginia and we’re going to need all hands on deck to protect Abigail Spanberger’s seat. Glenn Youngkin won Abigail’s district by only a little over 37,000 votes. Democrats can hold VA-07, if we work hard and get folks out to vote. If we start organizing now, by Election Day 2022 we’ll have built some of the best grassroots efforts in VA-07 that Virginia has ever seen, but we need your help. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ****=** **=** **=** **=** We appreciate your help and we’re just getting started. name: Derek Schmidt
subject: 🚨🚨We beat Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
This is HUGE news... I wanted you to be among the first to hear. Joe Biden tried to tell states like Kansas that if we accepted federal COVID-19 relie Friend, **This is HUGE news... I wanted you to be among the first to hear. ** Joe Biden tried to tell states like Kansas that if we accepted federal COVID-19 relief funds, we would not be allowed to cut state taxes. **Well, I took him to court. And I am proud to announce that WE WON.** NOWHERE in the Constitution does Joe Biden get the power to micromanage states and how they tax their citizens... And Biden **certainly** lacks the ability to bully states out of providing state-level tax relief that Kansans need so desperately. This is a big win for not just Kansas, but for states all across the country. I am proud to be leading the fight against Joe Biden’s attempts to grow the size of the federal government and intrude further into our daily lives. As governor, I’ll continue to fight back against an overbearing federal government and DEFEND Kansans from the Biden administration and Washington Democrats.
I hope that you will stand with me in my fight against federal overreach. [**Will you join my team to stand strong?**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=3722563ab3f84afca6fbdc2f2b099dfe&_e=jhT5AGeSVQ7VyvAq-U09Usp5MihBFADLvzMtD7bCJLT_A_DJn-8saB-n-3jBNjfpg3cHvO2pj2NyvZYNK55TPGVAI3ATqQfyG2dOjFQpSYNgsVjBH_iQ9jE3giVAAAoi0c9rySx6eeqSEYjUVD75bd49Qo6zIPp0R1XlQnUEJIjHhkLWAFbWIE87EPRi2I1sF1BwYJ8W8gGG9GiIdrBl93dAUx4lBE2l52aig8PtiPz9HfjCcM0c0SRWcR45KHceHwkVyi9le4peKO3s84RuROjqW19rJ6HBQSO-HJjF2xC5LAdDIz4wwlpAQtUROxUpSxvDluMeZKzvJfEz2jOJoYvwzRzks6ER4CTTg0SJzCmidBbaHuwHwHy-DCVCZ9rVBQNeRnCW5JrUwR7TWkNI1YY-mVZwTVQv4y1xn_MUZrwK67AcoX4ckEiLmUXbc0oWESQ_aibG2f6fVCGqAfcoVFnte-zVs08ZMI4Y1bhnadKgLVQmUBKnMhyVgsT-6d3U) clean_body: This is HUGE news... I wanted you to be among the first to hear. Joe Biden tried to tell states like Kansas that if we accepted federal COVID-19 relie Friend, This is HUGE news... I wanted you to be among the first to hear. Joe Biden tried to tell states like Kansas that if we accepted federal COVID-19 relief funds, we would not be allowed to cut state taxes. Well, I took him to court. And I am proud to announce that WE WON. NOWHERE in the Constitution does Joe Biden get the power to micromanage states and how they tax their citizens... And Biden certainly lacks the ability to bully states out of providing state-level tax relief that Kansans need so desperately. This is a big win for not just Kansas, but for states all across the country. I am proud to be leading the fight against Joe Biden’s attempts to grow the size of the federal government and intrude further into our daily lives. As governor, I’ll continue to fight back against an overbearing federal government and DEFEND Kansans from the Biden administration and Washington Democrats. I hope that you will stand with me in my fight against federal overreach. After just one year of living under the Biden administration, the American people – and Kansans in particular – are in desperate need of relief. He’s sent the prices of groceries through the roof... that’s why I’ve proposed cutting the food sales tax. Kansas families simply can’t afford to pay the bills in Joe Biden’s America. –Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

Today the NRA is turning 150. Celebrate the occasion in the best way possible: by making a contribution to Giffords to stop gun violence.

Take Mark’s survey today so he can keep fighting for the kind of progress Virginians want and need.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38732062/316799712/-1032158218?ms=mw_em_211117_1&refcode=mw_em_211117_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzljMGM3Mi1lYjQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k8sch8kiNcycxMRSg63l32ujDBLPZaJvgiR58FZeaRY=&emci=85e7a713-d647-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=979c0c72-eb47-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4568237)_**

The first year of the Biden presidency and 117th Congress has been a big success. Next, Congress will take up President Biden’s historic Build Back Better bill. name: Nick Fulchino
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Hi there,

My name is Nick, and this week is my first week on Team LBR.

I joined yesterday as Congresswoman Blunt Rochester’s Deputy Campaign Manager, and I’m thrilled to be working toward keeping Delaware blue and sending LBR back to Washington for another term.

A big part of my day-to-day activity will be ensuring that we have the resources to build a winning campaign, and I’ve been told that our grassroots army is one of our best sources for fundraising.

That’s why I’m writing to you on my second day in the office: Can you donate $5 right now to help us reach our November goal and continue to expand our reach across Delaware? We’re $1,500 short of where we need to be!
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr_november?refcode=EM_fr_211117nick1_stf_nf_actives_5_ng_na_l1

More from me soon!

Nick Fulchino
Deputy Campaign Manager

Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr_november?refcode=EM_fr_211117nick1_stf_nf_actives_5_ng_na_na_bio&refcode2=biobox]
Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress

Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress

Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Astorino?=
subject: New York is off the rails.
body:
We can make some real changes. | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=1254ae1c02&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
|

Friend:

New York has gone off the rails. Our taxes are rising at an alarming rate, the Democrats are spending hand over fist, our economy is stagnant and crime is spiking. It’s time for REAL CHANGE in New York.

We deserve real LEADERSHIP. Someone to stand up to the out-of-control tax, spend, regulate and mandate policies that are driving hard-working New Yorkers out of the state. We deserve someone who will stand up for taxpayers, our children and public safety. We deserve real LEADERSHIP.

We can’t afford another 4 years of destructive one party, far-left Democrat control in Albany. That’s why I’m running for governor – to bring common-sense back to New York. As the former Westchester County Executive, I know tough decisions need to be made. I know what it takes to balance a budget, protect taxpayers and grow the economy. And I’ll do the same as governor and put New York back on the path to prosperity and freedom.

[**Join my team today. With your support I know we can rescue and rebuild New York.**](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=539b3435eb&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[<< $1,000 >> ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=685f5c89ad&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
|
A contribution big or small will go a long way in sending a message that New Yorkers are through with dangerous one party, far-left Democrat control of our state.

Together we can change things in New York. Transformative change where everyone benefits. Join me today!

[](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=689e2fc335&e=3ca66fc65a)
Rob Astorino
Republican Candidate, Governor of New York
_A Steady Leader... For Challenging Times_

|
[<< Join the Team >> ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=30a0f581e1&e=3ca66fc65a)

|

---
| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=fb0d19d96b&e=3ca66fc65a)._

name: Rand Paul
subject: Hey Biden --

body:
Enough With The Vaccine Mandates!

| | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://trk.klclick.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3Dzyms_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7cqze4CGq24xz99kvoKmDG4HCZhhHhzlfy3k8Mq0-2BQBOgt3H7cORi0g2aENHGVxpE1GB5-2FYhQZ-2F3cQ05ZUrjk65i837l2I2HT9OjnSMoSzzs1xL6tHPXZeehIqtoHUsXtJVyHFyeimV-2FaE1tI-2FLZhwz663gHSz4NAS-2FmJZqAPeVske4MieqC3m8-2FrdGGaKQZjPbbDIAy6steOj1rug4LFrhlXjGVKcDrPp5NYQvk3PBZ-2BhGxthuX89DokDDebVZvk9IzRId-2FhQlDbgE9tDqVBldhLpmEYQN9U2cL-2B3eW8lCRYVIC8GBsO3zml5DvUHe-2F-2BDmF7Ol4OmxdXw-2ByPuDX6ug-3D-3D)
---
| Dear Patriot, I have bad news for you this morning. Joe Biden is doubling down on his vaccine mandates. He's planning to expand them even further. And now millions of Americans may soon be hit by his newest mandate. Biden is already mandating vaccines for all companies with 100 or more employees -- a blatant violation of the Constitution. But he's not stopping there. The Left is now pushing harder than ever for vaccine mandates for young children. In fact, California is already putting one in place for the entire state. This has led parents across California to organize a school "sit-out" in protest of this draconian new law. Numerous other Democrat states are on the verge of putting their own mandates in place as well. The question is -- will a federal mandate be the next in line? If it is, you can rest assured that I will be leading the charge to stop it. Many of my fellow Senators are skittish about opposing Biden's mandates. They are afraid of the wrath of the corporate establishment media. But I am committed to defending your freedom and your family's freedom. And if that means I have to take heat from the media and from the Democratic Party -- so be it. In order to counter their attacks, though, I do need your help. And with a heated Senate election coming up next year, it's never been more important. Will you help me hold on to my Senate seat so that I can fight back against Biden's vaccine mandates? [A generous gift of $100, $50, $25, or $10 would make an enormous difference.](https://trk.klclick.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DJP0n_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7cqze4CGq24xz99kvoKmDG4HCZhhHhzlfy3k8Mq0-2BQBOgt3H7cORi0g2aENHGVxpE1GB5-2FYhQZ-2F3cQ05ZUrjk65i837l2I2HT9OjnSMoSzzs1xL6tHPXZeehIqtoHUsXtJVyHFyeimV-2FaE1tI-2FLZhw-2FJ7DBxY-2Bt6o-2Bnbmpuc-2B-2BVTkNGxrHJg2ZFI6V24hKzlKvBMmdjzKuWOKOIutd2Fn731j6lOxUKfP83MpELy0YXFZNondsh8h8ljxiufHAWsUjgQWvRolLIMHq1Le4oKiOQkezEeC2Ml4AywHQsLg8hm1TNB5vMzUqSFsH05ZDpSYzwLninhH5WYPRebX5WQ6lg-3D-3D) As long as Biden is in power, he will attempt to force his will onto the American people. That's just who he is. But that doesn't mean you and I can't stop him. In fact, the beauty of the American system of government is that we do have the tools to stop people like Joe Biden from implementing their authoritarian schemes. The only way Biden can enact a true federal vaccine mandate, without it being struck down by the courts, is to pass it through Congress. And the Democrats know that -- that's why they have honed in on taking my Senate seat. If they manage to defeat me, the 50-50 tie will be broken instantaneously. The floodgates will open up to the most destructive and authoritarian schemes of the radical Left -- including vaccine mandates for all. The Constitution will be in grave danger. You and I must do everything possible to prevent that. [Please stand with me today and chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 so that I can stay in the Senate and keep fighting.](https://trk.klclick.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3D2eFF_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7cqze4CGq24xz99kvoKmDG4HCZhhHhzlfy3k8Mq0-2BQBOgt3H7cORi0g2aENHGVxpE1GB5-2FYhQZ-2F3cQ05ZUrjk65i837l2I2HT9OjnSMoSzzs1xL6tHPXZeehIqtoHUsXtJVyHFyeimV-2FaE1tI-2FLZhw1u1aQsBu1FKdYHjNsrbXxq9xu-2FBv6Ljwh0XyqfMFyYM4wsa9duE3x528ia1VsWrrqGrFsSr7LaO6SWX1dkXAm0WsBnaBHJEsgmhjdi3hSLozIK0tiPT7p2qgqecqU6MTE2gZU32bM1pqfHvF5zuwYFoX-2FKrViXnWOQDv6D-2FB5KWWjqE57q23Dneh-2FwsVhZYpw-3D-3D) In Liberty, Rand Paul

clean_body: Enough With The Vaccine Mandates! | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, I have bad news for you this morning. Joe Biden is doubling down on his vaccine mandates. He's planning to expand them even further. And now millions of Americans may soon be hit by his newest mandate. Biden is already mandating vaccines for all companies with 100 or more employees -- a blatant violation of the Constitution. But he's not stopping there. The Left is now pushing harder than ever for vaccine mandates for young children. In fact, California is already putting one in place for the entire state. This has led parents across California to organize a school "sit-out" in protest of this draconian new law. Numerous other Democrat states are on the verge of putting their own mandates in place as well. The question is -- will a federal mandate be the next in line? If it is, you can rest assured that I will be leading the charge to stop it. Many of my fellow Senators are skittish about opposing Biden's mandates. They are afraid of the wrath of the corporate establishment media. But I am committed to defending your freedom and your family's freedom. And if that means I have to take heat from the media and from the Democratic Party -- so be it. In order to counter their attacks, though, I do need your help. And with a heated Senate election coming up next year, it's never been more important. Will you help me hold on to my Senate seat so that I can fight back against Biden's vaccine mandates? As long as Biden is in power, he will attempt to force his will onto the American people. That's just who he is. But that doesn't mean you and I can't stop him. In fact, the beauty of the American system of government is that we do have the tools to stop people like Joe Biden from implementing their authoritarian schemes. The only way Biden can enact a true federal vaccine mandate, without it being struck down by the courts, is to pass it through Congress. And the Democrats know that -- that's why they have honed in on taking my Senate seat. If they manage to defeat me, the 50-50 tie will be broken instantaneously. The floodgates will open up to the most destructive and authoritarian schemes of the radical Left -- including vaccine mandates for all. The Constitution will be in grave danger. You and I must do everything possible to prevent that. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | | | **** P.S. Biden's worst vaccine mandate yet is right around the corner. Democrat governors nationwide are forcing draconian vaccine mandates on children in their states -- even if their parents object. Now, unless you and I do something to stop it, a federal mandate may be next in line. I am using my power as a U.S. Senator to stop this from being implemented. And the Democrats know that. That's why they are prioritizing me as one of their top targets for defeat in the upcoming elections. | | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Biden apologized for America once again
body:
COP26 Leaves America with a black eye
---
| | | | | | Volume 17 | November 17, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
The COP26 Summit is over, and American once again suffered an unnecessary black eye as Biden kowtowed to the globalists.

Instead of being a leader on the world stage, Joe Biden once again apologized for America, taking a backseat rather than being a leader, allowing other countries such as China and India to have their way while pledging to reduce carbon emissions to such an extent that it will impact thousands of Colorado jobs and all Coloradans. And in a surprise announcement, the U.S. and China said they would cooperate to limit emissions to address climate change, all while China builds countless coal-fired power plants. Furthermore, do you trust China to live up to any kind of agreement with the US? I don't!

During the COP26 Summit--"Conference of the Parties"--Biden apologized for former President Trump's withdrawal from the Paris Accord, in a speech mocked by a Being-sponsored news agency. Once again, a weak Democrat is prostrating himself and our country, telling world leaders we are "behind the eight ball," and committing to zero emissions by 2050, an unreasonable and devastating goal that other countries simply cannot achieve; not to mention the Left cares not for the destruction that will be reaped upon our economy in the process.

Yet when India balked at phasing out coal mines, the Summit members relented. It seems India gets a pass where the US does not. But make no mistake, coal mines will be shuttered prematurely without sound reason; and if the withdrawal from coal is anything like our withdrawal from Afghanistan, tens of thousands of Coloradans will suffer.

Democrats claim that retraining coal workers to "green" jobs will mitigate the blow to communities in our state that rely on these mines to fuel their economies. But a study by Colorado Mesa University shows that over the long haul, green energy jobs will replace less than 15% of the vacancies left from closing the mines. Furthermore, this push to shut down coal power plants is nonsensical given new clean-coal technologies which capture 99% of emissions.

Who is running the show when it comes to climate change agreements? It seems it is China--who is building hundreds of new coal power plants and mining 80% of the lithium used to make solar batteries--and India.

When making agreements with the world on policy and economy, our leaders must put our country first. American cannot give away its position as a world leader. Unlike Joe Biden and Michael Bennet, I will fight for our country, ensuring we can all affordably heat our homes and power our transportation. I need your help to do this; I simply cannot do it without you.

The U.S. Senate seat in Colorado is winnable, and I have been promised some large-scale donor support, but I need to prove you are with me. To this end, even the smallest donation makes a difference. In the meantime, I'm working round the clock to meet fundraising goals. Please join our cause and stand up with me by donating today.
|
---
| | |
---
| Sebastian Gorka "America First" national radio show
---
| | |
---|---
|

| | | [Listen to Erik's appearance on "America First"](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tJcUjx8AN5zm7y65wo0tAa36jlKytpupPrZKelQyybezejeIGNaeDmszqnwAFv-kLEutymlrC4u9d9zLMRQlmEpNdlFheUerqlaTHgCtjs-eqZOKa9ks3DnQFYmk2BuhCvlyuB5qvDAT2RgibRVBuJBq4tUcXWqFY6lPPDxSaCarW9bQVPd82VRPKNpRtqfv56R0wkTU4vB66rrsrrjRfZAV8iUO1x29bVGXiIZR9twwqPpfSwUbJDJ9LFXyASxF&c=Cy9gvPCk5rlZCDcPCrjMVtWuagSqRqyT7X6R-ccCtv-pryCK_wxPMw==&ch=dwXR9BzcvOW7IeOh_1QFWPJSSE7jSM6UWf4fGBhLHUorLhrwK5P1JQ==)

---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
This past week, I traveled to Morgan, Weld, and El Paso counties to meet the many people who support our cause.

This week, I'll be in Westminster on Friday for a fundraiser, and return to Colorado Springs.

I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail!
| | |

| Can you help?
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado in the U.S. Senate is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for U.S. Senate Staff.

You can listen to the discussion here: | | | == | | | | Campaign Update | | ---|--- | This past week, I traveled to Morgan, Weld, and El Paso counties to meet the many people who support our cause. This week, I'll be in Westminster on Friday for a fundraiser, and return to Colorado Springs. I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail! | | | | Can you help? | Erik's effort to represent Colorado in the U.S. Senate is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today. Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for U.S. Senate Staff. | | | | == | | Aadland For Senate | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com powered by

body:
| | | **URGENT: Republicans propose a new bill to ATTACK PBS' funding**

The decades-long Republican push to DESTROY PBS has reached a critical moment, and we need to know where Democrats stand -- **but we have NO RESPONSE from you on file in our live poll:**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5133?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211117-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211117-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&akid=1958%2E9716520%2E2xaDod)
**Do you support keeping PBS fully funded?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5133?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211117-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211117-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&akid=1958%2E9716520%2E2xaDod)

---

The GOP is going after a familiar target, team -- the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS).

A group of far-right Republicans recently introduced a bill that would **PROHIBIT** all federal funding for one of PBS' main funders, harming a network that has brought free, educational programming into American homes for generations.

But now, GOP senators are ramping up their attacks, too. Ted Cruz just called PBS programming **_“government propaganda,”_** and others are already on-record calling for defunding.

**This is the greatest threat PBS has faced in decades, so we've launched a live poll to find out where Democrats stand._We set a goal of gathering 10,000 responses by midnight, but we still haven’t heard from you!_**
**Do you support keeping PBS fully funded?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5133?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211117-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211117-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&akid=1958%2E9716520%2E2xaDod)

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38732840/316803581/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211117MysonMax_MO_full_SLB_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmYyYTJkZi1mMDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFM6tPo9Cut7kvSwbR9lAJMb9R-MbumhEXEze_pQ3Z0=)
---
A name can say a lot, friends. Take for instance: Michael Maximiliano Ortega, aka Baby Max, or more famously known as my son. It doesn’t sound like much, but consider this — Maximiliano, derived from the Latin name Maximilianus, means “the greatest.” That wasn’t a coincidence. So today, we’re going to talk about Michael “The Greatest” Ortega. Yes, I do mean **the greatest.** And why is that? Well, he’s the biggest, greatest, most powerful reason why I’m running for Congress. Baby Max has centuries of Indigenous resistance coursing through his veins. He is carried by the ancestors who fought tirelessly against violent colonialism, much like what I’ve experienced growing up — and still dealing with to this day. I want to live in a world where Baby Max has clean air to breathe and safe water to drink. I want to live in a world where Baby Max has the ability to afford his own house and put down his own roots. I want to live in a world where Baby Max doesn’t have to make the choice between putting a roof over his head or eating for the night. Actually, you know what? F*ck that. I’m **making** that world happen. Not just for Baby Max, but for you, your friends, your family — todos en nuestra comunidad. I need your help to make it happen, friend. [**If you can, will you chip in a donation today? Your contribution, no matter how small, goes a long way for us:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38732841/316803582/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211117MysonMax_MO_full_SLB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmYyYTJkZi1mMDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFM6tPo9Cut7kvSwbR9lAJMb9R-MbumhEXEze_pQ3Z0=) | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38732842/316803583/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211117MysonMax_MO_full_SLB_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmYyYTJkZi1mMDQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFM6tPo9Cut7kvSwbR9lAJMb9R-MbumhEXEze_pQ3Z0=)

Mike

subject: Michelle + Sonia = A progressive future for Massachusetts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-Díaz
body:

| | Team, **FIRST** , Michelle Wu ran a fantastic campaign to become the next Mayor of Boston, building a broad coalition of grassroots supporters along the way — including Sonia, who called Michelle the “strong local partner we need to deliver bold, transformational change in our state.” **THEN** , Michelle placed first in both the preliminary and general elections, becoming the first woman and the first person of color elected Boston’s mayor in the city’s 199-year history. **NOW** , we’ve got to build on that grassroots momentum and take it statewide for Sonia’s gubernatorial campaign, as we push to make her the first woman of color to hold the corner office on Beacon Hill. Team, with Charlie Baker in the governor’s office, it makes Michelle’s job that much harder. In fact, Charlie Baker has already said he’d water down some of her key policy proposals — we can’t let that happen. We’ve got to elect Sonia the next Governor of Massachusetts, so Michelle and Sonia can deliver progressive leadership together and win the change working families need in our Commonwealth. [_**With just a few more weeks until 2022 and the stakes of this governor’s election so clear, we need your help. clean_body: We can’t help Michelle become the next mayor of Boston only to make her job that much more difficult with Charlie Baker in the governor’s seat. | | | | | Team, FIRST , Michelle Wu ran a fantastic campaign to become the next Mayor of Boston, building a broad coalition of grassroots supporters along the way — including Sonia, who called Michelle the “strong local partner we need to deliver bold, transformational change in our state.” THEN , Michelle placed first in both the preliminary and general elections, becoming the first woman and the first person of color elected Boston’s mayor in the city’s 199-year history. NOW , we’ve got to build on that grassroots momentum and take it statewide for Sonia’s gubernatorial campaign, as we push to make her the first woman of color to hold the corner office on Beacon Hill. Team, with Charlie Baker in the governor’s office, it makes Michelle’s job that much harder. In fact, Charlie Baker has already said he’d water down some of her key policy proposals — we can’t let that happen. We’ve got to elect Sonia the next Governor of Massachusetts, so Michelle and Sonia can deliver progressive leadership together and win the change working families need in our Commonwealth. = = = = With thanks, Team Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. In case you missed it, folks: My friend Beto just joined us in the fight to preserve the future of Texas. Now that we have a winning ticket, we are getting straight to work by building a people-powered movement of everyday Texans all across the state. **We cannot let our momentum go to waste.** Everything we hold dear rests with our commitment to defending our Texas values. We’re up against powerful interests and a well-funded Republican machine that has corrupted our state politics for too long. By bringing people together, we can deliver for _all_ Texans by investing in jobs, education, healthcare, infrastructure, and more. **It's past time we elect leaders willing to solve problems and put people first — not corporations. _\----- Original Message from Mike Collier, November 15, 2021 -----_
We have a winning ticket, patriots.
**Beto O’Rourke is officially running for Governor of Texas against Greg Abbott.**
In 2018, Beto and I campaigned together and turned out a record number of voters that helped Texas Democrats win up and down the ballot.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38732921/316804048/2022723758?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211117_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTIzOWY5Mi1mMTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rg6TXVpW55FcHrTBPuKI1SLN9j73vPRUp-6koad2wWk=)
**Our Democratic slate is stronger than ever.** In 2022, we will build on our work from 2018 and mobilize an electorate that has been frozen in their own homes, burdened with rising property taxes, and sold a vision that puts partisan politics before Texas parents, business owners, and our collective prosperity.
Winning statewide has always been an uphill battle. That’s why we’re building a broad, diverse coalition of everyday Texans and fighting for every vote — rural and urban, red and blue, you name it.
**It’s time to take back our beloved state. Rush a contribution of $5 or any amount to elect honest leadership and support a Democratic takeover in 2022:**

clean_body: Now that we have a winning ticket, we are getting straight to work by building a people-powered movement of everyday Texans all across the state. | In case you missed it, folks: My friend Beto just joined us in the fight to preserve the future of Texas. Now that we have a winning ticket, we are getting straight to work by building a people-powered movement of everyday Texans all across the state. We cannot let our momentum go to waste. Everything we hold dear rests with our commitment to defending our Texas values. We’re up against powerful interests and a well-funded Republican machine that has corrupted our state politics for too long. By bringing people together, we can deliver for all Texans by investing in jobs, education, healthcare, infrastructure, and more. It's past time we elect leaders willing to solve problems and put people first — not corporations. Rush a contribution of any amount if you’re with us: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With your support, Beto and I will fight with everything we have to defeat Dan Patrick and Greg Abbott once and for all. Now let’s finish what we started in 2018 and flip Texas blue. Thanks for being in our corner. Team Collier \----- Original Message from Mike Collier, November 15, 2021 ----- We have a winning ticket, patriots. Beto O’Rourke is officially running for Governor of Texas against Greg Abbott. In 2018, Beto and I campaigned together and turned out a record number of voters that helped Texas Democrats win up and down the ballot. = Our Democratic slate is stronger than ever. In 2022, we will build on our work from 2018 and mobilize an electorate that has been frozen in their own homes, burdened with rising property taxes, and sold a vision that puts partisan politics before Texas parents, business owners, and our collective prosperity. Winning statewide has always been an uphill battle. That’s why we’re building a broad, diverse coalition of everyday Texans and fighting for every vote — rural and urban, red and blue, you name it. It’s time to take back our beloved state. Rush a contribution of $5 or any amount to elect honest leadership and support a Democratic takeover in 2022: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = With a strong Democratic ticket, the Texas GOP will spend the next year answering for a record of hypocrisy, government overreach, and shameful partisanship. body:
We have to fight to protect it.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38733045/316804941/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211117DemocracyFragile_OPPO_DM_A_5_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmFmYTJiOS1mMTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1HvCY3a90UW_2f1SSqmrZd0Ll7rxG7wTX3ANQApKjQ=)
After Virginia experienced a devastating election night, it is clear to me that no state is safe from the patently false conspiracy theories being spread about how the election was ‘stolen.’ While I’m very proud to say that our state is a national leader in American democracy, _Virginia has shown we cannot take anything for granted._
Democracy is _fragile._ [**Will you make a contribution of $10 to ensure that Maggie keeps our democracy strong?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38733047/316804945/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211117DemocracyFragile_OPPO_DM_A_5_G_N_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmFmYTJiOS1mMTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1HvCY3a90UW_2f1SSqmrZd0Ll7rxG7wTX3ANQApKjQ=)

As our fundraising blackout rapidly approaches, I shudder to think what will happen to the voters of New Mexico if Maggie’s opponent wins this election. Her opponents who oppose early voting will be able to continue to fundraise while our campaign won’t be able to raise a dime. What happened in Virginia could happen here.
We need people like Maggie on our side tirelessly fighting to safeguard our democratic right to vote.
**So here is where we’re at: we still need to raise $3,775 before the end of the month. We are not there yet. Maggie is fighting as hard as possible for all of us.[ Will you make a contribution of $10 right now and fight right alongside her?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38733058/316804955/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211117DemocracyFragile_OPPO_DM_A_5_G_N_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmFmYTJiOS1mMTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1HvCY3a90UW_2f1SSqmrZd0Ll7rxG7wTX3ANQApKjQ=)**

| Patriot, The RINO GOP Establishment is actively recruiting candidates to run against me and our campaign to take back CD7. They have performed lopsided polls, donor calls, and are recruiting high-level consultants to run other candidates in the 7th district.
The RINO GOP Establishment is trying to hijack our campaign and make sure that we fail in our mission to take back CD7. I need you to sign our petition, showing the GOP that the people of Colorado and the 7th district stand with me and the America First Movement that we all believe in.
My team will be releasing the signature count to the GOP in an effort to stop their hostile actions against us. Just like the Never Trump movement before us, we are seeing a Never Laurel movement from the establishment and we must stop them before they pick up steam.
Step up today and sign your name so that we can stay in the fight and STOP THE RINOS!
Sincerely,

name: Laurie Bishop
subject: An important announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana
body:
|
---
Team, I wanted you to hear this news from me personally. After evaluating the new congressional map and the impact it will have not only on my race, but on the landscape we find ourselves in up and down the ticket, **I have come to the difficult decision to end my campaign for Congress and focus on the work at hand in the Montana House of Representatives.** Right now, our communities need leaders who know how to listen and work with others, no matter their political affiliation, to deliver results. I believe the best way for me to continue to serve my fellow Montanans is by continuing to lead the Democratic party at the state level. [Watch my farewell video to hear my thoughts on the future of our state and the Democratic party.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38733146/316805110/-803653937?v=YzlD9Isd7Fw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGFmYTJiOS1mMTQ3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KM2QdY8swKSzczc_6iEmiFQa5OEJUSijoFiurw--7_M=&emci=04f4018b-2747-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=44afa2b9-f147-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13640636) I am so thankful to have had this opportunity to run for Congress, and grateful for everyone who joined us — each and every one of you who read my emails, signed a petition, made a grassroots donation, attended an event, or signed up to volunteer made a difference. We ran a campaign focused on people, and I’m so proud of the work we were able to accomplish in just a few months. **Over 1,300 people contributed to our campaign and nearly 80% of the contributions we raised came from Montanans.** I will continue to be a voice for those who feel like politicians have turned their back on them, and I encourage anyone who wants to be a part of building a more inclusive, balanced, and decent future for Montana to start by investing in their own community and running for local office. I am forever grateful for your support on this journey. Thank you and best wishes, Laurie Bishop
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Hey!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country.
|
---
| | | | Peter,

My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country. Here's a play-by-play of what is going on in the fight for the Senate and for Trump's Legacy:

**In just the past few months:**
* Fox News has said my race could be the most expensive ever.
* CNN continues to move my race up on their list of Top 10 seats most likely to flip.
* The DNC and DCCC outraised their Republican counterparts in July.
* My opponent raised $4.6 million in Quarter 2 while spending over $2.2 million in Facebook ads since the launch of her campaign.
* My opponent raised $8.4 million and I was outraised AGAIN last quarter.

**In the last 24 hours since I last emailed you:**
* My liberal opponent has spent almost $20,000 more on ads.

**And by the time you have read this far into the email: **
* A Democrat has already donated $10 to flip the Senate and reverse everything we built under President Trump.

This is what we are up against, Peter. **[To hold our own against the Democrats, will you donate $10 of your own to fight back against the Left?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799603:63vRQS2Nw:m:1:3298722022:73936E1D54E6BDEFA878E293190A62D1:r "To hold our own
against the Democrats, will you donate $10 of your own to fight back against the Left?")**

Thank you,

| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Peter, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799610:63vRQS2Nw:m:1:3298722022:73936E1D54E6BDEFA878E293190A62D1:r "please click here to donate now")**.

Marco Rubio

name: Katherine, me (2)
subject: Deadline TONIGHT
body:
Our extended mid-month deadline is TONIGHT at 11:59 PM. We must meet this new goal if we’re going to catch up to the socialist
_Sponsored message_
Fellow conservative, Our _extended_ mid-month deadline is **TONIGHT** at **11:59 PM.**

We _must_ meet this new goal if we’re going to catch up to the socialist Democrats’ fundraising numbers.

Fellow conservative, the Democrats’ goals are clear.

They want to **raise your taxes** , _indoctrinate your children_ and _erode your freedom._

The only way to stop them is to meet this goal before **tonight** at **11:59 PM** , and I’m counting on you to give 110%.

I can only do so much on my own, and we’ll _never_ take back Trump’s majority without every patriot pulling their weight.

**[Please make a contribution before 11:59 PM TONIGHT so we can meet our EXTENDED deadline and SAVE AMERICA.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqfmmjsbh9hcbnaeg7k6ca57cfgnrvndla0e7518_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chge6ob2c1h2bs)** [**SAVE AMERICA**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zkodsqktevgd5mqhkq841i98io6lv8ncb0mh2oe0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chge6ob2c1h2bs) Thank you, Katherine, Team Scott [**SAVE AMERICA NOW**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9tf43vhft8oe6gei8l0jiqo2qa5m8drkl8n6488_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chge6ob2c1h2bs) Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. We need patriots from across the country to join the fight and do their part to help win back the Senate majority. This is a team effort! subject: Breaking News: GA race now considered “tossup”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
**☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜
Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up**
Peter,

BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in.

Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic."

If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message.

In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters.

Take a look for yourself:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799536:JKOJsS2NT:m:1:3253819041:D0560830FC65E6FCF2D42526B2FC11D9:r)
**I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up.**

While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column.

Therefore, we _must_ increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. If you can make an investment in this critical toss-up race, please know there is no better time than today. **[This is a race in which every SINGLE DOLLAR is going to count. Please chip in $5, $10, $34 or even $100 right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799536:JKOJsS2NT:m:1:3253819041:D0560830FC65E6FCF2D42526B2FC11D9:r)**

My opponent was THE TOP FUNDRAISER IN THE ENTIRE COUNTRY over the last three months. We've got to be able to beat them at their own game.

body:
I have not received a reply from you. This is my THIRD time reaching out.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkr8iqhqovcteqccnvna07fgrhns72va81adsud8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chge6ob1c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sbnc9qn8d3mc6qm1pdhcthb8tlh61jj9cpkesp72t9m69o60tdl6mqj0pj5m4rrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30sllm3jrepj66ljjbd37m2qmash5u)

Hi -- It's Sarah again.
Should I be worried? I have not received a reply from you. This is my _THIRD_ time reaching out.
We just need a couple more replies. [**Please, respond now and then I promise to stop flooding your inbox.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgng9bar173p10dot6f161mfnlm2eg1oe6ot8j6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chge6ob1c3h2bs)
_\-- Sarah_

From: Sarah
Subject: Hi, you weren't responding so I thought I'd check in one more time_

Hi again,
I wasn't planning on doing this but I'm really hoping you'll respond if I try one last time...
**Nearly everyone on this list said they 're on Trump's team, not with the Liberals.** Now I have the task of contacting the last remaining hold outs -- _including you._
[**I was able to extend your deadline to respond for just 10 more minutes. Can you take a moment to answer?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmr44p1he98vbk6tskk5tou3oges6ha3q6vsoueg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chge6ob1c3h2bs)
_\-- Sarah_

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg5fl52mc6uqus0oqegjc0n2jejnqd7spm4323so_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chge6ob1c3h2bs)
From: Sarah
Subject: quick question for you_
Hey there,
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg4n99g7nsmv6k8tm4o8h29av8okbfv35cnusgqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chge6ob1c3h2bs)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4i1fhmuk2fpdv4ig4lnn1mn18nqslb2ocogud9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chge6ob1c3h2bs)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots. **
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0ubj4pfeeemhbmhjqu59bafbicarq9bajr9umn0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7chge6ob1c3h2bs)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah
_Republican Headquarters (Team Scalise)_

name: Fmr. Navy SEAL Rob O'Neill
subject: Didn't think I'd say this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
I don't send emails like this often, but I need to tell you about something important today.
---

Patriot - This is former Navy SEAL Rob O'Neill. I don't send emails like this often, but I need to tell you about something important today. Look, I'm the guy who took out Osama Bin Laden, so I know exactly what it means to be in a tough situation - and that's why I'm asking for your help. Everything is on the line in the must-win race in Wisconsin's Third District, and my good friend and fellow SEAL, Derrick Van Orden, is facing the fight of his life against Nancy Pelosi and the radical left. The Democrats have already raised **$200 MILLION** to smear every Pro-Trump conservative in America - and they will do ANYTHING to crush a common-sense conservative patriot like Derrick. [**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help and hoping you will join me by stepping up and chipping in just $10 right now to help us win this race, flip the seat RED, and send Nancy Pelosi packing. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799663:61p0sS2Nz:m:1:3299561967:C53412AD81FCF729E45956D99FBEEA66:r) I was part of 400 combat missions - and defending America's future has been my life's work. But if we don't step up now, there may not be an America left. **Derrick Van Orden and I took a blood oath to defend this country. Derrick has President Trump 's endorsement, and he has my endorsement-and I hope he has yours too.** This is THE race that will decide the House majority, but we'll NEVER win without your help: ****[**CONTRIBUTE $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799663:61p0sS2Nz:m:1:3299561967:C53412AD81FCF729E45956D99FBEEA66:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799663:61p0sS2Nz:m:1:3299561967:C53412AD81FCF729E45956D99FBEEA66:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799663:61p0sS2Nz:m:1:3299561967:C53412AD81FCF729E45956D99FBEEA66:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799663:61p0sS2Nz:m:1:3299561967:C53412AD81FCF729E45956D99FBEEA66:r)**** ** ** Thank you for your support, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799663:61p0sS2Nz:m:1:3299561967:C53412AD81FCF729E45956D99FBEEA66:r)

Rob O'Neill
Former SEAL Team Combat Veteran **
** ****
Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
---
PO Box 565
Prairie du Chien, WI 53821

The support of grassroots activists like you is invaluable to this
campaign.

It’s how we’ll expand our Democratic majority and ensure everyone has

small-dollar, grassroots support we need to compete with Mitch McConnell
and his dark money friends.

please, will you chip in right now to power our campaign for Senate and

name: Team Kelly
subject: We have some bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
The Washington Post released a poll showing Democrats trail by 23% on a generic ballot in battleground states like Arizona.
#

**Bad News:** The _Washington Post_ released a poll showing Democrats trail by 23% on a generic ballot in battleground states like Arizona. If that’s really the case, there could be some trouble ahead.
**Good News:** Mark Kelly’s not a generic candidate. He’s a leader. He goes to work every single day, pushing past the party politics to deliver real results for Arizona. He’s someone Arizonans trust.
There’s something else that wasn’t captured in the poll: the strength of our campaign.
They didn’t ask about the almost 1 million people who have already contributed to Mark Kelly.
They don’t know that people like you will step up to contribute before all is said and done. And there’s never been a better time than today to do it. So what do you say?
[**Can you please make your first $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign today? We would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211117-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1681_6688874_wfBnbl&akid=1681%2E6688874%2EwfBnbl)

| Peter,
As the holidays approach #TeamGibbons is gearing up for a busy winter season as we continue campaigning in each corner of the Buckeye State.
This week, I met with the Portage County Women's GOP and had a great time discussing my campaign and what I hope to accomplish in the Senate. It was great to see so many strong, conservative women be so passionately committed to America First principals and values.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WaBQKoBB4ST32NVu1LtsqJbemMgVoF_c5Ey_PZSdpTw_HwXBpPH5DIjKYHEooMcB5XPwajz7fFuaB6p-P81vdNn3hSAie-7EWvArcfBVdR7Z1vtNwzd7RCdUSq0S-roHij3s4dkLIft5gd7xopWTB88yXj9_IMq5RIfSaj6xNh5Nfy6MbVClO6wx7Uqz1VFKQohUZF0euuk=&c=wa7P33OOsBtsXiP8Mz73Tlpywpqdy-BgUhCRHR2odFL9tkUGY4JLpA==&ch=xKv2f4ZYiK1Z1DHZLxKrJISN_jv7pFLeYc9nyMVHlByKeaPH0nnjjg==)

| I'll be headed to Cincinnati this Friday for a meet & greet at the Meritage Restaurant and plan to discuss today's most important issues with voters in the region. If you're around the area, please be sure to stop by at 4 p.m. to introduce yourself, hear an update on my campaign, and learn how you can get involved.
