name: Poll Closes in 1 Hour
subject: Straw Poll: Are you a Republican voter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Momentum is on our side.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2vo5c--fgxr-4qqlpo0&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|
| | |
_**First** Biden's job approval hit a record low of 41%.

**Then** 70% of Americans think the economy is in shambles.

**Now** 51% say they would vote Republican over Democrat._

**[That’s why we need to know: if the 2022 election was held today, would you vote Republican?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vo5c-1laoe-4qqlpo2/ "That’s why we need to know: if the 2022 election was held today, would you vote Republican?")**

---
| | | [TAKE POLL NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vo5c-1laof-4qqlpo3/ "TAKE POLL NOW")
---

This is our one and only chance to take back the House. We need Republicans in charge in order to save the future of our country from Biden's disastrous socialist agenda.

_But it won’t be easy_. Pelosi has millions on hand to spend destroying freedom-loving patriots across the nation and obliterating Trump’s allies in Congress.

**[We need to know if you are a committed Republican voter. Take this poll and let us know if you plan to vote republican.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vo5c-1laog-4qqlpo4/ "We need to know if you are a committed republican voter. Take this poll and let us know if you plan to vote republican. ")**

We're showing this list to House Republican Leadership and we want to make sure your name is on it. We need your response **IN THE NEXT HOUR. **

**[Take the Official House Republican Poll NOW and tell us where you stand.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vo5c-1laoh-4qqlpo5/ "Take the Official House Republican Poll NOW and tell us where you stand. ")**

Your decision to vote Republican could be the reason we do or don’t take back the House.

Thank you,

House Republicans

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vo5c-1laoi-4qqlpo6/ "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She’s determined to ERASE Trump’s legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We’re facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vo5c-1laoj-4qqlpo7/ "%%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%, can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2vo5c-1laok-4qqlpo8/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

name: Moms for Childcare
subject: to be honest with you...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
We are falling short of our fundraising goal and candidates are counting on us. Can you help us get there? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38737760/316842722/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4NDIzODBiLTBjNDgtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NvmFzYQRZ3QKL5-w8MBeP4yrwx4sltbfuHmDho3g9DQ=&emci=580045f6-0948-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1842380b-0c48-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, We are more than halfway through the month of November, but we are falling short of our fundraising goal. If we don't meet our goal by the end of this month, we may not have the resources to continue with our childcare fund next year. **[Can you help us save this essential program by chipping in today? We are really counting on you.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38737761/316842723/600483780?refcode=0628&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4NDIzODBiLTBjNDgtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NvmFzYQRZ3QKL5-w8MBeP4yrwx4sltbfuHmDho3g9DQ=)** We have seen an unprecedented number of women run for office during the last election cycle, because of women's organizations like us who were there to support their campaign**.** **[Will you make a contribution today to support our Childcare Fund as we lead this work to elect more moms to office? If all of the people who open this email chipped in just $20, we could fund childcare for all of our 2022 candidates.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38737762/316842724/600483780?refcode=0922&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4NDIzODBiLTBjNDgtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NvmFzYQRZ3QKL5-w8MBeP4yrwx4sltbfuHmDho3g9DQ=)** Moms in Office is working tirelessly to provide targeted support programs for candidates with caregiving responsibilities that will make it possible for them to win big. [**Be one of the 675 or more supporters needed from your area by chipping in what you can and help us fully fund our Childcare Program for 2022. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38737763/316842725/600483780?refcode=0922&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4NDIzODBiLTBjNDgtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NvmFzYQRZ3QKL5-w8MBeP4yrwx4sltbfuHmDho3g9DQ=) Any amount that you are able to donate will have a huge impact on our year-round fundraising work and it will keep our support programs going that are so important for our candidates' success. Thank you for being part of our movement to elect more moms. Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office Katie Porter **#momsquad** |
# **I will chip in to pay for childcare!**
---

clean_body: We are falling short of our fundraising goal and candidates are counting on us. Can you help us get there? Hi Peter, We are more than halfway through the month of November, but we are falling short of our fundraising goal. If we don't meet our goal by the end of this month, we may not have the resources to continue with our childcare fund next year. = We have seen an unprecedented number of women run for office during the last election cycle, because of women's organizations like us who were there to support their campaign. = Moms in Office is working tirelessly to provide targeted support programs for candidates with caregiving responsibilities that will make it possible for them to win big. = Any amount that you are able to donate will have a huge impact on our year-round fundraising work and it will keep our support programs going that are so important for our candidates' success. Thank you for being part of our movement to elect more moms. Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office Katie Porter #momsquad | I will chip in to pay for childcare! = = = = = | | | | ---|---|---|--- Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: Do you miss us?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799918:6Y5FrS2cN:m:1:3298722022:335D36F0B486ACED1A7229091F619327:r)
---
I've said it time and time again: **American strength deters war. Weakness only invites attacks.**

As Secretary of State during the Trump Administration, I always put America first. We were honest, hard-working and treated the world as it is not as we wished it were. But, when the time came, when the situation so-required, we led. Our actions made the world safer and America stronger.

Now, President Biden is demonstrating _weakness_ everywhere you look. He is pushing our allies away and cozying up to our enemies. From Afghanistan to Iran to China, Biden is allowing those who threaten America to run wild without consequences.

Just compare the records between Biden's weakness and our strength:
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799918:6Y5FrS2cN:m:1:3298722022:335D36F0B486ACED1A7229091F619327:r)
---

_We cannot allow these weak policies to continue._ So, how do we stop it? First and foremost, we need to elect more principled conservatives at every level so we can hold the Democrats accountable for their weakness and failed policies.

That's why **[I am asking you to rush a donation to help me fight back against the radical Left and push to elect more America First conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799918:6Y5FrS2cN:m:1:3298722022:335D36F0B486ACED1A7229091F619327:r "I am asking you to
rush a donation to help me fight back against the radical Left and push to elect more America First conservatives.")** We need the resources to go up against the Democrats and their Big Money mega-donors. That's where you come in.

---
| | [RUSH DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799918:6Y5FrS2cN:m:1:3298722022:335D36F0B486ACED1A7229091F619327:r)
---
We cannot just sit idly by and let Biden and the Democrats keep pushing their weak policies that put Americans at risk. All dedicated conservatives must **[take action RIGHT NOW to save America.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799918:6Y5FrS2cN:m:1:3298722022:335D36F0B486ACED1A7229091F619327:r "take action RIGHT NOW to save America.")**

President Biden recently said that the world sits at a critical moment and that the world needs strong American leadership. He was actually right about that.

Unfortunately, that leadership is nowhere to be found from the Biden Administration.

We can and we must change course. **[You can help us do just that by rushing a contribution right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799918:6Y5FrS2cN:m:1:3298722022:335D36F0B486ACED1A7229091F619327:r "You can help us
do just that by rushing a contribution right now.")** Unapologetically American,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58799918:6Y5FrS2cN:m:1:3298722022:335D36F0B486ACED1A7229091F619327:r)
---

**From:** Colleen Coyle
**Date:** Nov 16, 2021 at 8:54 PM
**Subject:** re: budget update
**To:** Rebecca Kleefisch
---
Rebecca,
---
I wanted to follow up with you after the mid-month deadline on where we stand in terms of the new $500,000 goal and what that means for the budget.
---
As things stand, it’s looking like we’ll need a little more than 8,000 donations by year’s end to reach our goal.
---
**Additionally, I’ve secured the November match we discussed, so all things considered, we really only need another 4,000 donations over the next few weeks to keep pace.**
---
I think it would be beneficial for you to share this **[secure matching link](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=b1301602d57648098096a8d4eba7961e&_e=Bp1ZjQ5BNgFiXIwD0K8HITS_DkwMhGL6U12BO6qPOp7TdIxj1U7EpVPQ2gSuG5kxNzSqHNOSiBFZizQxT82NM2lK2raKJLJYrJu2BrGRi5_Csvlh9zgY5G_78MkrGlH6jv5PcKmhP_gEHiCUC7W6bKivHP--bpe9WT83fdwelYObu59ErH7SzhnkeMp2Chp7mNRk2L1PlCw6sTVf0FX5h1AH7GNAuClDWFDMZXGQ7hApsZ8ClTGrxTHm7aFX6kfM3GVRk-vbjCJ7S2e8OqrmVltdB189x2jFRII_8uvC9jE3zl-Dh3VKEPINxMtFPnlrUT-GXq-WD6R3DsUU5iF3GFOzOPjElIcLiNCDBXqNZd8gu0va07_SeTao7JV6NuQkFvFFD_dU4ZaGT0RW6ZqEOsO3JHUtQGN8IzM1bqGMUnTONgxWCfRg46p5BbjtOR4zv9N__qkmIG1-5WSkiM9y57-RhBIuNiiut61aXSSAJ9XVI5nU5LmWLDJOmpdAtAe2ZsBaufm0H0XXXxyoTmm-cQ%3D%3D)** with all your grassroots supporters this week to make sure the impacts of their gifts are maximized.
---
If every supporter on file contributes through this link, we’ll be all set to hit the new goal.
---
Thank you -- and as always, let’s win this!
-CC

clean_body: Updated budget numbers from our finance director. | Friend -- please see below from our Finance Director, Colleen. She’s been working day and night to secure this match and ensure we hit our new $500,000 goal to close out 2021. With Election Day less than a year out, we’re kicking things into high gear, and I would just hate to have to tell Colleen that this limited-time match went to waste. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Colleen Coyle Date: Nov 16, 2021 at 8:54 PM Subject: re: budget update To: Rebecca Kleefisch Rebecca, I wanted to follow up with you after the mid-month deadline on where we stand in terms of the new $500,000 goal and what that means for the budget. As things stand, it’s looking like we’ll need a little more than 8,000 donations by year’s end to reach our goal. Additionally, I’ve secured the November match we discussed, so all things considered, we really only need another 4,000 donations over the next few weeks to keep pace. I think it would be beneficial for you to share this with all your grassroots supporters this week to make sure the impacts of their gifts are maximized. If every supporter on file contributes through this link, we’ll be all set to hit the new goal. Thank you -- and as always, let’s win this! -CC Sent from my iPad Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

Danny Davis is one of the most corporate funded Democrats in congress. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s9cgyQ2jNCllj6x9_KRjHFd0Rxs1AcwDGbOvgIl5-mXbvwUFVOjGUJ2sapDJUERDmnV4UT4yW-tqiPbOj0DlM13h15JEz5w8WziictdrX7mrTcj1oH3hUHM3L8drphpeGcWSAhmMIZR-vkzgLipu3pFm5E6BirGbivz7oJiKYWSV2OJgsqVIHaJI8cltprgX83DhBvH8LlADRlONe7QUhkpmcv_UDyRdTt15LwqRfaRLFQOi6VB2yJ1pV20_PM19Z5NIPbgzwiy2MJyCjZ6IFbdMBzPBgrjvzk0ah1bZTgk-h3kQ-4A8IVXmo9xldD5yiA/3h3/JBm6nJSoQS-0Ui-mCLFw_w/h0/z_P2JOFEh_ni0huYUQATfHiP5czmc-zlr6v7GJkBepY) Team, We just learned that 73% of Danny Davis’s fundraising comes from corporate, Pro-Business PACs. He has been ranked the third highest recipient of corporate Pro-Business PAC money among Democrats in Congress, according to People’s Campaign Research Project. This is not a bronze medal to be proud of. **[Our campaign is for the people, by the people. We accept no corporate money. Can you chip in $7 right now to show the power of grassroots movements?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfdiXRgl_WFsF2XHpHofBJkXXCwpJfmZEUrAzlxdbbKchaov6WjjJevKcDU2t3re5w9Il8TI0qID8RlhMpyKisSKwIUVs_AQ1SIuBCqt73INOvkWsWBpcqPtAly4rWxmryqy8Zeqcp1Nyx01S3G441K9PjCejQkBvjAYw28ijInrfknEY_2BgL9UkaGLiqPoVP7JIE6sjVVmykVOnZWpSeqFwlEEbustAAS8w2I0vvhcmiRVAhT4qIgykxpbtj_dn00VG8dO46TU5drWoJfJx9ECjBH8yblmt7nLQ_JZftOoYKfBD1mZ7DAL_t0cxmSGDEYZWTtO9z4TAFyQM0sWekP_GzU_-XZFTBCVPUgQx0ZBM/3h3/JBm6nJSoQS-0Ui-mCLFw_w/h1/QK706kLNRRGhZAlYWTElaj-Ry8ULlBd_lvJ7X6mVbGg)** [Donate now](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfdiXRgl_WFsF2XHpHofBJkWw7dRbjgq6QNKy6Dnno_eKNOoYixfH0p1i5K6c6P_JaC7yDoMW9Rg_ECQCI0o1QPFxNTj_sINv2FUV-xtKCF34qtbsPss8JKSyxjosuBxe-ClNmO9CPYZvbeZOif0_wWdU22EC-LKtDFhic2a7kt6lae7M4EGoMXvTVbfZAz2jl5isGvoptaciASLJUkHMNp7e_QLtXiP0FGhowdzidERUiTNabqodjxGnQUBC6lnzrvu3Wu_WZwcwXQgC_rUYRHeU-wcSZi3ky6lPg1jX-WRQVAL0d6gAsjNS-pe4J02swQzRbEuqDDCkaqUw3mLcGqsvsqq71bUTur658MXcgxHU/3h3/JBm6nJSoQS-0Ui-mCLFw_w/h2/emSq3fJZoVL6F8XnKXs1hRy_eo30Nsp1aRhJELDffuY) Friend, there is no doubt that our system of campaign finance is broken. It is easier for politicians to allow their fundraising to be dominated by rich corporate interests and ignore everyday voters. It is even legal. But it is unethical, and the opposite of every value the Democratic party is supposed to represent. The Democratic party is supposed to be the party of working people. The party that knows these seats belong to the people, not the highest corporate bidder. I _know_ we can return the Democratic Party to the people it is supposed to represent, but not if we keep the same representation that fights for corporations harder than working families. We need a leader who has the courage to choose people over profits, and the energy to fight for those people every single day. **[It is not easy choosing the harder path and standing with people over corporations, but it is the right thing to do. clean_body: Danny Davis is one of the most corporate funded Democrats in congress. | | | Team, We just learned that 73% of Danny Davis’s fundraising comes from corporate, Pro-Business PACs. He has been ranked the third highest recipient of corporate Pro-Business PAC money among Democrats in Congress, according to People’s Campaign Research Project. This is not a bronze medal to be proud of. Friend, there is no doubt that our system of campaign finance is broken. It is easier for politicians to allow their fundraising to be dominated by rich corporate interests and ignore everyday voters. It is even legal. But it is unethical, and the opposite of every value the Democratic party is supposed to represent. The Democratic party is supposed to be the party of working people. The party that knows these seats belong to the people, not the highest corporate bidder. I know we can return the Democratic Party to the people it is supposed to represent, but not if we keep the same representation that fights for corporations harder than working families. We need a leader who has the courage to choose people over profits, and the energy to fight for those people every single day. Thank you, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

Peter, I’m proud to say that just days ago, President Biden signed his bipartisan infrastructure bill -- a plan that will put billions back into transportation, broadband, utilities, and climate policy -- into law.

This is a HUGE win for working families across the country, Peter.

Make no mistake: This bill was only made possible by the leadership of President Biden and his down-ballot Democrats. **_The best way to build on our momentum is to add even more Democrats to the House and Senate._**

name: Team Booker
subject: Did you see this email from Mama Hearn, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we want to
make sure you saw this email from Charles’ mom, Earletta Hearn, yesterday
— it’s right below in case you missed it.

Since she reached out yesterday, many of you reached out and chipped in
with a gift to our movement. But we’re just a few hours away from our
deadline, and we’re still more than 150 donations away from our goal.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13209?refcode=em20211117-1240&t=1001&akid=1240%2E346206%2EV625sn ]After you get a chance to read (or reread) Earletta Hearn’s email, will
you please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to our
campaign today? We can’t do this without you, and hitting this goal will
show everyone the strength of our grassroots movement:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13209?refcode=em20211117-1240&t=1002&akid=1240%2E346206%2EV625sn ]Contribute $5

— Team Booker

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Ms. Earletta Hearn [info@charlesbooker.org]
Date: Tue, Nov 16, 2021
Subject: Can you help my son, Charles?
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]

Hi Peter, it’s
Earletta Hearn. My son is Charles Booker.

I recently found a photo of Charles with my mama and daddy, and I know if
they were still here they would be so proud of him.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13209?refcode=em20211117-1240&t=1003&akid=1240%2E346206%2EV625sn ][IMG]

But I’m not just writing to you today to share cute photos of my son
Charles (even though I have plenty!)

I’m reaching out because the team told me that we’re now at the middle of
the month and they’re racing to reach a fundraising deadline tomorrow.
They’re trying to reach 300 donors from emails alone so that the campaign
can continue amplifying CJ’s bold message for change.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13209?refcode=em20211117-1240&t=1023&akid=1240%2E346206%2EV625sn ]I know it would mean a lot to the team and Charles if I helped today
to raise some money for this fundraising goal. So I’m asking: Will you
chip in $5 or anything you can so my CJ can defeat Rand
Paul?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13209?refcode=em20211117-1240&t=1024&akid=1240%2E346206%2EV625sn ]Contribute $5

Words can’t describe how proud I am of my CJ. He’s fought the good fight
his entire life and has overcome so much.

When he was growing up our family didn’t have much. We sometimes had to
stretch to make ends meet, there were times we didn’t have light or
electricity — but by God’s grace, we survived.

When you live in one of the poorest neighborhoods in Kentucky, hardship is
no stranger. All around us, we saw families struggling to put food on the
table, mamas grieving the deaths of their children lost to gun violence,
and folks losing hope in the American Dream. It’s easy to become
discouraged, witnessing that kind of suffering. But for CJ, it lit a fire
in him.

If we want a fighter in the Senate — someone who will look out for
families like yours and mine — there’s no one better than CJ. But before
he can fight for us, we need to fight for him and make sure his team has
the funds to power their massive grassroots organizing strategy.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13209?refcode=em20211117-1240&t=1025&akid=1240%2E346206%2EV625sn ]So if you can afford to chip in $100, $20, or even just $1 — every
little bit counts. If we all pitch in whatever we can, we’ll reach this
goal in time for tomorrow’s deadline!

Thank you,

Mama Hearn

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211117-1240-footer&t=1026&refcode2=1240_346206_V625sn&akid=1240%2E346206%2EV625sn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1240%2E346206%2EV625sn

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom Declares Permanent Emergency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Simplest Legislation](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqqSrow9Tm3vyVDw7EjF-hhgUZnielucmBm4HQThfjva42RCEHmowgErsJmkSZ1GMY&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_17&n=1) School boards across California are passing resolutions opposing Newsom’s student vaccine mandate. Yesterday, I supported a similar resolution passed by the El Dorado County Board of Supervisors. We remain the only state with this radical mandate, yet Newsom refuses to lift it. Worse, he says he’ll continue the State of Emergency as long as COVID is around. In other words, he plans to permanently abolish constitutional government. As Dan Walters writes, Newsom intends to "govern by decree" indefinitely, "further eroding the American concept of checks and balances.” That's why the Legislature must act. When we reconvene, I’m insisting a vote be held on ACR 46, the simplest legislation I've ever authored: "_The Legislature, in accordance with Section 8629 of the Government Code, declares that the state of emergency proclaimed by Governor Gavin Newsom on March 4, 2020, is at an end and that the emergency powers granted to the Governor as a result of that proclamation are terminated._ " From the beginning, Newsom saw COVID as an “opportunity for a new progressive era.” He’s used that “opportunity” to inflict on us the nation’s worst and most regressive outcomes. But we’re fighting back like never before – for our kids, for our Constitution, for our state’s future. [Support citizen-backed representation](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0JHWSzI75LyWvC6h1sivRLtVVWDof7SVZORZZbP1UPz4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_17&n=2) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAyku6VFmv_D6DztfdpX5k1czC69In8k_adQ0KWP7w6UXQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_17&n=3) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_17&n=4)California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_17&n=5).

name: Finance Team, Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate
subject: Your supporter record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
This is your last chance to help us reach our November mid-month fundraising goal.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211117-399-footer-ak&t=2&akid=399%2E90090%2EMqqbUs)
Morgan has been hard at work traveling across Ohio to Morganize and host community events. Last night the Finance Team had the opportunity to sit with Morgan and go over our mid-month fundraising numbers.
While we were looking at our finances your supporter record stuck out to us. Our campaign is built on transparency so we wanted to share what we found next to your name:
* * *
**_Your Official Team Morgan Harper Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No, not yet! **Suggested Donation:** $3 **[Contribute $3](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14689?refcode=em20211117-399&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=399%2E90090%2EMqqbUs)**
---
_(* If you've donated recently, in the mail, or with a different email address, your record might not yet reflect your contribution. Thank you for your support!)_
* * *
The truth is, we depend on small-dollar donations that we receive from emails just like this to power our campaign. If we fall behind in November, we don’t have millions in fossil fuel, corporate, or super PAC money to fall back on — _and we’re proud of that_.
Morgan has already challenged Tim Ryan to host debates, spoken at rallies for abortion rights, raised over $500,000 last quarter, and launched our volunteer organizing program to build our campaign. **_[To keep the momentum going, can you become part of the movement and make your first critical contribution to our campaign before midnight tonight?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14690?t=6&akid=399%2E90090%2EMqqbUs)_**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14689?refcode=em20211117-399&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=399%2E90090%2EMqqbUs)**
Thank you for all you do,
The Finance Team
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14690?t=26&akid=399%2E90090%2EMqqbUs)
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211117-399-footer&t=27&refcode2=399_90090_MqqbUs&akid=399%2E90090%2EMqqbUs)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Media's lies about Rittenhouse
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58793902:69fEAS2NY:m:1:3253819041:98CBF7D6A546549B268662CBC9D43101:r)
Peter,

The liberal media is attacking the Rittenhouse trial with everything they have:

* The liberal liars at MSNBC are calling the judge a white supremacist.

* The liberal liars at CNN had one of Rittenhouse's attackers on Anderson Cooper, telling a different story than what he testified at the trial.

* The liberal liars continue to paint Kyle as racist and evil despite any evidence.

**The attacks on truthful reporting have escalated as the liberal bias in the media is being exposed more than ever before. **

Let me tell you how my organization, the Media Research Center (MRC) is defeating the liberal liars in the media. We are the only organization solely dedicated to exposing media bias.

_When the MRC was founded in 1987 over 75% of Americans trusted the liberal bias in the media ... now 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media_.

[**I am asking for your urgent support today to help us expose the lies being told in the Rittenhouse trial. Can you click here to donate $10, $35, $50, or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58793902:69fEAS2NY:m:1:3253819041:98CBF7D6A546549B268662CBC9D43101:r)

Here is how the Media Research Center is TAKING DOWN the Fake News media:

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.

* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.

* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC's social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58793902:69fEAS2NY:m:1:3253819041:98CBF7D6A546549B268662CBC9D43101:r)

Americans are waking up to the bias. Trust in the media is at an all time low. It's in large part due to our work.

But MRC does not have woke corporations supporting us. We rely 100% on Americans who believe in American values of truth over the media.

**I am reaching out to you to help us raise $25,000 online to expand our operations. **

[**Please send an urgent donation today to MRC and support our work.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58793902:69fEAS2NY:m:1:3253819041:98CBF7D6A546549B268662CBC9D43101:r)
[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $5,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58793902:69fEAS2NY:m:1:3253819041:98CBF7D6A546549B268662CBC9D43101:r)

Believe in America, not the media.

We are winning this battle for truth in reporting. But as we expose the media, their attacks increase. Your support can help us fight back.

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

name: Tina for Oregon
subject: Become a founding supporter of our campaign
body:
Peter, I'm running for Governor to bring people together to fight for a future of opportunity and justice for every Oregonian.

A successful campaign takes all of us, and we're counting on founding supporters to help us get off to a strong start. Will you donate $10 or whatever you can today to become a founding supporter of our campaign?

Contribute: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tinafororegon?refcode=postemailsignupautoreplyemail&amount=10

Oregonians are living through a devastating pandemic, the intensifying impacts of climate change, and the economic disruptions that leave too many behind. We must get past the politics of division and focus on making real, meaningful progress for families across our state.

Together, we can reckon with the legacies of injustice and inequality to build a great future for Oregon.

Onward,
Tina

I don’t have special interest groups pouring millions into my campaign. I’m powered by Americans like YOU who believe in me and the conservative values I stand for. Nancy Pelosi thinks we can’t sustain our enthusiasm after our huge win. Let’s prove her wrong by CRUSHING the first deadline since we FLIPPED Virginia. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Bernie won’t vote for a bloated defense budget
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

For months, conservative Democrats and Republicans have voiced their
concern about the deficit and national debt. They’ve argued the United
States doesn’t have enough resources to expand Medicare, guarantee paid
leave, and address the climate crisis. Yet, these same politicians are
championing a bloated defense budget, including kickbacks for defense and
technology companies.

Soon, the Senate will vote on the $778 billion National Defense
Authorization Act, which is $37 billion more than President Trump’s last
defense budget. We can use these BILLIONS to take care of people with
Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, canceling student loan debt, housing
for all, and free public college. Bernie agrees, that’s why he won’t vote
for this military spending bill.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84393?refcode=em20211117-20542&t=1002&akid=20542%2E1203867%2EghqgXW ]Bernie Sanders tweet that reads: We need to get our priorities right. I
will vote NO on the National Defense Authorization Act.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84393?refcode=em20211117-20542&t=1022&akid=20542%2E1203867%2EghqgXW ]Are you with us against this outrageous budget? Donate what you can
today as Justice Democrats in Congress join Bernie to fight the
military-industrial complex. We need to spend less on war and more on
funding our progressive priorities.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84393?refcode=em20211117-20542&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20542%2E1203867%2EghqgXW ]Contribute $3

The conservative Democrats and Republicans who fought investments for
working families and cut popular, progressive policy proposals from the
Build Back Better Act are the same members of Congress championing
needless defense spending.

No one ever asks how we can “afford” our massive military spending. Yet
Bernie and Justice Democrats have to defend investments for working
people.

We’re transforming the Democratic party so it’s a party that will fight
for climate action, housing, and health care — not defense contractors and
the military-industrial complex. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84393?refcode=em20211117-20542&t=1024&akid=20542%2E1203867%2EghqgXW ]Support our work today with a
$3 donation. We don’t take a cent from defense contractor
PACs that fund Republicans and corporate Democrats, so we need your help.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84393?refcode=em20211117-20542&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=20542%2E1203867%2EghqgXW ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=20542%2E1203867%2EghqgXW ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=20542%2E1203867%2EghqgXW ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211117-20542-footer&t=1028&refcode2=20542_1203867_ghqgXW&akid=20542%2E1203867%2EghqgXW

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=20542%2E1203867%2EghqgXW

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jessica?=
subject: Help us build a movement in the 1st District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ameena 4 Congress
body:
Dr. Ameena is running for Congress to bring investments in the 1st District, but she needs your help! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4312f07def7d/help-us-build-a-movement-in-the-1st-district?e=5fba611a2c)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
# We need your help to build this movement in the 1st District.
The holiday's are coming up, a time for family gatherings and food. It's also been a great time to talk to the families that live in the 1st District. These are families that are looking for greater investments in the District: investments in healthcare, housing, education, and community programs. We have started phone banks and door-knocking to meet more of our neighbors and talk to them about Ameena's progressive vision. It's a vision where no one is left behind. This holiday season, one way you can help is to share that vision with your friends and family. You can do that by sharing content on our [Facebook](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=b0878a7215&e=5fba611a2c) and [Twitter](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=a26255dc13&e=5fba611a2c) accounts. By liking and sharing her content, you will help draw attention to our work. You can also help by sharing a donor page with your family and friends. You can tell them why supporting Dr. Ameena is important to you. We can help you create your own [personal Act Blue page](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=7bdc52603f&e=5fba611a2c). Or you can [use this campaign page](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=1b4088c189&e=5fba611a2c).

Thank you for helping us build this movement in the 1st District!

XO

Jessica

name: Blake Cilwick, Winter for Montana
subject: Team Winter’s last chance to make a first impression
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA
body:
We can’t afford to lose our one chance at starting this campaign off with the resources to win. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynpQyDRB3rJEZeQn0LFIXVsTjN42yK5GrRjm5AvG6QvKhstpVJy_D3AtK2kh5MsAKqInIVI7b400HddmoE7gb2y93jBZm8PFtw4NAXkazInTyI49-52q2yDpUZrT5bhNhi0sUTK7D2vaAYNaDP5zqx_GPtKuoVwVtNIJZDrpPyQsu3t613l9vTE9amjoeLWyDs-6K0f2jRVIFgbg0EeeVQ2otuZ5SsDtQqvF0p82_RBY9BbjNOQ9fEONpSxVd3am-w-ISgoqcBUW2tG0tHdKoIc6YAhPzOyAzFm0LnrqQyCDfyGg6RTKusTs4ZRP2Lobl9w7DOSyGpdLTqm84tmrSEHQKgl0IMMf-18nHD7DX7Zp8L-kJMOqjy3RPIuf_3NOsINHlQMMddneL1Hf7cveTVcUzTO2IxbZ8u6PzsctLgWl7cvMgg2WwnBZJHwSjOSrk/3h3/dV_qLdugS6etltfjwQZG7Q/h0/ISjtMUg1CfCg9lEirxItf8mi9qUEVqA9Aa6fxhYW6xs) Friend,

Tonight at midnight will mark the end of the two-week period since Tom launched this campaign to restore stability and safety for the working people of Montana — and that means today is also our last chance to reach our $5,000 grassroots launch goal.

I’m working with Tom because he knows that, together, we can bring back a Montana where everyone has a fair shot. As Tom said on day 1 of this race: “It used to feel safe and free here. We can be what we once were — a place that values good clean work, fair play, and equal opportunity.”

With under a day left to reach our goal, your fellow supporters have already contributed $4,137 toward this goal — over 80% of the way there. We can still make it, but only if people like you who have been waiting step up now.
**** _**[Contribute $3 before the end of today to help reach our $5,000 grassroots launch goal. Help Tom Winter bring Montana back.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynpQyDRB3rJEZeQn0LFIXVsTjN42yK5GrRjm5AvG6QvKhstpVJy_D3AtK2kh5MsAKqInIVI7b400HddmoE7gb2vcJuAYN86Aq0McdCQZ-CWF06XoqPQYKCim9Eus9AXltFJNQ3iitoXNWdJOqh_H2kCTUT8vHVmwQTR7_g8PMvmMBr8WE0KW6dpFW3gG_TyG5MWpPktXLtms1JomKLgOf5y9qwb78jqDqNHJkyBsD1GiPms4erNzbFx569eG6_7CTgnACxcD5VGPpP3xOYd9Yz4iIHeB4PXU7Rnk1mnwOv3taWcYSLNnFd-m7s3XR3iKiR9pNjio8I4II_XobeUxkkAPuPs0idpirEOhrho2HjkQEV4hNe4N0B9GyeeuvYojj-hP7rZpi2MsHIgOw-ILClo3MHW-ImZzE5dtTz6nbOeGcniEb7eVvi_UVJPqNhs4E/3h3/dV_qLdugS6etltfjwQZG7Q/h1/xkC7k_3t53wADdYamIS39poZG1X4u05hq66HaT5TfW8)** _

Tom’s running for Congress to ensure working Montanans can thrive again. Out-of-state billionaires who think our home is their playground aren’t going to fuel this race.

Thank you for standing with us today.

Blake Cilwick
Campaign Manager

clean_body: We can’t afford to lose our one chance at starting this campaign off with the resources to win. | | | Friend, Tonight at midnight will mark the end of the two-week period since Tom launched this campaign to restore stability and safety for the working people of Montana — and that means today is also our last chance to reach our $5,000 grassroots launch goal. I’m working with Tom because he knows that, together, we can bring back a Montana where everyone has a fair shot. As Tom said on day 1 of this race: “It used to feel safe and free here. We can be what we once were — a place that values good clean work, fair play, and equal opportunity.” With under a day left to reach our goal, your fellow supporters have already contributed $4,137 toward this goal — over 80% of the way there. We can still make it, but only if people like you who have been waiting step up now. ** Tom’s running for Congress to ensure working Montanans can thrive again. Out-of-state billionaires who think our home is their playground aren’t going to fuel this race. Thank you for standing with us today. Blake Cilwick Campaign Manager Winter for Montana P.S. ** | PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana PO Box 8248 Missoula, MT 59807 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Winter for Montana, please .

Fellow Conservative -

In less than a year, we could be sending Nancy Pelosi packing, re-gaining leadership of the House, and taking our country back from the radical Left. _But only if every single Republican is committed to making that happen._

I’ll be blunt, Fellow Conservative: **at the pace we’re raising money right now, we will NOT secure a red majority.**

Democrats are consistently outraising Republicans and launching multi-million-dollar attacks at us. If we don’t make some critical changes immediately, I’m afraid the radical Democrats will keep the razor-thin majority and crush us in the mid-terms.

Hi – earlier this month in Washington, Kevin McCarthy tried his best to stop the passage of a historic investment in our country’s infrastructure.

He voted _against_ clean water for Californians, _against_ good union jobs, and _against_ funding for roads and bridges, **but luckily for America, he failed.**

If we don’t beat him and ensure he never becomes Speaker of the House, next time he tries to stand in the way of progress, we might not be so lucky.

clean_body: That’s all McCarthy does. | | | Hi – earlier this month in Washington, Kevin McCarthy tried his best to stop the passage of a historic investment in our country’s infrastructure. He voted against clean water for Californians, against good union jobs, and against funding for roads and bridges, but luckily for America, he failed. If we don’t beat him and ensure he never becomes Speaker of the House, next time he tries to stand in the way of progress, we might not be so lucky. | | | _**It is absolutely critical we defeat Nancy Pelosi and her allies - but honestly doing so will not be an easy feat. That's why we are reaching out to you Fellow Conservative, a dedicated America First Trump Patriot.**_

You’re a reliable patriot we can count on – and now we need 9 MORE PATRIOTS to step up ASAP. 900% matching has been activated to catch up to the dark money the Democrats have pouring in.

_Now it’s YOUR TURN – We are counting on you, so please use your personalized link below for 9X impact - you only have 9 mins:

body:
Hey Friends, Thank you for signing up for email updates from Nate and our team. We’re grateful to have you on board... Nate’s counting on your support to RESTORE BALANCE to Congress on November 8, 2022! Nate is a proud veteran of the 101st Airborne and father of four who is EXTREMELY concerned about our nation’s future. He’s fed up with the self-inflicted insanity in our country, from the “Defund the Police” radicals in the streets of our cities to this cancel culture movement targeting conservative thought and speech. He’s running to SERVE our great nation once again, and help save America this nonsense. We’re going to be very busy in the weeks and months ahead, and will be sending frequent updates. Please take this one quick action to ensure our messages reach your inbox: _Add info@sandvigforcongress.com to your address book, contacts, or safe senders list. This will help keep our emails out of your ‘Junk’ or ‘Spam’ folder_. Thank you, again, for signing up for our email updates. Peter,

The Biden administration’s gross federal overreach has reached new heights.

With the latest OSHA vaccine mandate, the Democrats prove they will do ANYTHING to give the government more power.

This isn’t about public health; this is about personal power. If President Biden was serious about ending this pandemic, he would have instituted these mandates on day one of his presidency.

Instead, he has been grasping at straws for any way to control Americans.

When I’m Governor of Nevada, I won’t allow the federal government to dictate to Nevadans.

But I need to get there to do that.

| Friend,
---
| Biden may be asleep at the wheel, but Americans have woken up to his back-breaking price increases. Since taking office, we’ve been hit with a whopping 59.1% price increase at the pumps. This out-of-control inflation will cause long lasting damage to our economy if we don’t do something to keep it in check. body:
We are fighting to ensure fair representation for every Ohio voter. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2uxzgeXNJ1tOjTBLZo-mutk-g4c-buO1xT1bA2UdJmcxdMsevPYMih0imkqFRJgDmgtXHRBEqrFAmXKo9WB_wEtkCsOSAdFkyTJWy7h-zDxIKkdqAu2MKZKmuaP78goXYyN-Rkse8bSv4fKgpcRLwYUBBEtk00OXHk7KheUfzK-U8vzUiritUxM7KGvAn6WsD1R1FzR18YLPDbIQqvt7C5juXBNXyCUV9bwpIyXD0YC3t1JMC_xf_xajFmMSwGBknCz7CSxAaKlD-quVieb133AH_3g1_J_H_rbSRxslwqISCPVKD0shqqqN4DZMAMqqXP5i-baNdfcW1ci8aYp2Wazx4pIU8sgruGKtbNfACGC56kuQ3CrBSfo-A9JExl3mC96LaFYJ47netHhfskNVzLWpEgUg31-gowTMEJupPYLLLB/3h3/WYrB5Ol8SEWxX3VvDNLVtQ/h0/UlHOpU6eIGJAOodQ3REHA8wkE4ETtJXfTCOY1UfdMyg)

| | Team,

Republicans' commitment to the destruction of our democracy is appalling. Despite Ohioans’ demands for fair representation, **Republicans are trying to force a map into law that tilts the scale in a way that violates both common sense and the Constitution.**

**This is not democracy, this is _tyranny_.** Desperate for redemption in the aftermath of last year’s elections, Republicans are willing to destroy the foundation of our democracy for their political gain.

**The most recent map nearly guarantees a Republican win for 87% percent of Ohio’s Congressional seats for the next decade,** shutting out the voices of thousands of Ohioans, and leaving them with little recourse. We cannot sit by and allow this extreme gerrymandering to stand.

The people of this district deserve fair representation, and we are committed to doing whatever it takes to ensure that. Ohio’s House of Representatives is set to vote on the most recent map in the next 24 hours, and it’s urgent that we prepare to fight this to the finish. It will be a costly legal battle, but it can be won.

**[URGENT: We need to raise $1,000 in the next 24 hours to prepare for the fight against the power grab of Ohio’s GOP. clean_body: We are fighting to ensure fair representation for every Ohio voter. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Team, Republicans' commitment to the destruction of our democracy is appalling. Despite Ohioans’ demands for fair representation, Republicans are trying to force a map into law that tilts the scale in a way that violates both common sense and the Constitution. This is not democracy, this is tyranny. Desperate for redemption in the aftermath of last year’s elections, Republicans are willing to destroy the foundation of our democracy for their political gain. The most recent map nearly guarantees a Republican win for 87% percent of Ohio’s Congressional seats for the next decade, shutting out the voices of thousands of Ohioans, and leaving them with little recourse. We cannot sit by and allow this extreme gerrymandering to stand. The people of this district deserve fair representation, and we are committed to doing whatever it takes to ensure that. Ohio’s House of Representatives is set to vote on the most recent map in the next 24 hours, and it’s urgent that we prepare to fight this to the finish. It will be a costly legal battle, but it can be won. Donald J. Trump November 17th, 2021
When the Broken Old Crow, Mitch McConnell, agreed to a two-month extension, he allowed the Democrats to get their act together and pass the $1.2 Trillion “Non-Infrastructure” Green New Deal Bill, which is a disaster for America in that only 11% of the money will be spent on REAL Infrastructure, with most being spent on Green New Deal nonsense, with big tax increases. Its actual cost is over $2 Trillion, but the bigger disaster is yet to come in the next, much larger version of the Green New Deal, which some people say will be $5 Trillion. This was all allowed by Mitch McConnell’s incompetence and now I understand that a couple Republican Senators may get on board so that they can have yet another and even bigger victory, for the Democrats, while at the same time ensuring massive Inflation and the destruction of our Country as we know it. This is what happens when you allow a guy who lost an Election to take over the Office of the President. He obviously had no mandate, but they’re changing our Country and everything it stands for. Mitch McConnell couldn’t stop the first Bill so 19 Senators, including himself, joined in. That’s what he does—if you can’t beat them, join them. If he wasn’t so stupid and didn’t give the two-month extension, he could have stopped it all. Now he and his RINO friends will allow a much bigger and far worse Bill to pass, ruining our Country while giving the Democrats a great political lift, all at the same time. People, with the help of the Fake News Media, have already forgotten about the horrendous Afghanistan withdrawal, an economy and jobs that are in shambles, and so many other things. The good news is, they can’t forget about Inflation because it’s hitting them right in the face. This is the Broken Old Crow’s fault. He could have won it all using the Debt Ceiling—they were ready to fold. Now the Democrats have a big victory and the wind at their back. McConnell is a fool and he damn well better stop their “Dream of Communism Bill” and keep his Senators in line, or he should resign now, something he should have done a long time ago. Use the Debt Ceiling like it should have been used, you Old Broken Crow, to do so would hurt our Country far less than this horrible Bill. Any Republican in the House or Senate who votes for this Bill will never ever get a Trump Endorsement. Thank you, and good luck!

Everyone knows I love our Military and our proud Soldiers who have been so horribly disrespected by Joe Biden. Trump November 17th, 2021 ICYMI: “Biden’s broken promise: Build Back Better will force 30% of middle class families to pay higher taxes” Read the full article by Keith Griffith with the Daily Mail . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump November 17th, 2021 ICYMI: “Biden’s misery index makes Carter presidency seem like the good old days” Read the full article by David N. Bossie for Fox News . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump November 17th, 2021 When the Broken Old Crow, Mitch McConnell, agreed to a two-month extension, he allowed the Democrats to get their act together and pass the $1.2 Trillion “Non-Infrastructure” Green New Deal Bill, which is a disaster for America in that only 11% of the money will be spent on REAL Infrastructure, with most being spent on Green New Deal nonsense, with big tax increases. Its actual cost is over $2 Trillion, but the bigger disaster is yet to come in the next, much larger version of the Green New Deal, which some people say will be $5 Trillion. This was all allowed by Mitch McConnell’s incompetence and now I understand that a couple Republican Senators may get on board so that they can have yet another and even bigger victory, for the Democrats, while at the same time ensuring massive Inflation and the destruction of our Country as we know it. This is what happens when you allow a guy who lost an Election to take over the Office of the President. He obviously had no mandate, but they’re changing our Country and everything it stands for. Mitch McConnell couldn’t stop the first Bill so 19 Senators, including himself, joined in. That’s what he does—if you can’t beat them, join them. If he wasn’t so stupid and didn’t give the two-month extension, he could have stopped it all. Now he and his RINO friends will allow a much bigger and far worse Bill to pass, ruining our Country while giving the Democrats a great political lift, all at the same time. People, with the help of the Fake News Media, have already forgotten about the horrendous Afghanistan withdrawal, an economy and jobs that are in shambles, and so many other things. The good news is, they can’t forget about Inflation because it’s hitting them right in the face. This is the Broken Old Crow’s fault. He could have won it all using the Debt Ceiling—they were ready to fold. Now the Democrats have a big victory and the wind at their back. McConnell is a fool and he damn well better stop their “Dream of Communism Bill” and keep his Senators in line, or he should resign now, something he should have done a long time ago. Use the Debt Ceiling like it should have been used, you Old Broken Crow, to do so would hurt our Country far less than this horrible Bill. Any Republican in the House or Senate who votes for this Bill will never ever get a Trump Endorsement. Thank you, and good luck! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump November 16th, 2021 A very sad sight watching yesterday as the Taliban had a major Military parade displaying much of the $85 Billion of Military equipment the United States surrendered to them. clean_body: Nominate a small business below to participate in a “Shark Tank” style event in Springfield on Nov 22nd. | | Team, Between the COVID-19 shutdown and Illinois’ high taxes, it’s been a tough time for small business owners. As governor, Sully would change that - but while he’s campaigning, he thought the least he could do is offer support to our small businesses. And he came up with an outside-the-box way to do it! We’ll let Sully explain: Nominate a small business below to participate in a “Shark Tank” style event in Springfield on Nov 22nd. Participants will receive expertise and advice from some of the best business people in the state, and compete to win cash prizes! Are you a small business owner? name: Erica Smith
subject: Ted Budd doesn’t think we need a Build Back Better Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Here’s what I have to say to Ted Budd.
#
In case you missed it, Ted Budd recently slammed the Build Back Better spending bill on Fox News live saying, **_“It’s trying to fix problems that aren’t real problems.”_**
**WOW.** I guess lower healthcare costs, lower prescription drug prices, infrastructure like roads and bridges, reduced child poverty, lower education costs, _and more_ aren’t “real problems” for Ted Budd.
[**_North Carolinians deserve a U.S. Senator who will fight for everyday, working-class people — not out-of-touch, corporate-backed politicians like Ted Budd. If you’re with me, will you please donate $5 today so we can build a people-powered, people-centered movement to flip North Carolina blue._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/26587?t=1&akid=639%2E3698%2Ee5mH3V)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/26903?refcode=em20211117-639&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=639%2E3698%2Ee5mH3V)**
It’s easy for Ted Budd to say that these aren’t “real problems” because he’s a corporate politician who hasn’t lived the issues he’s talking about.
I’m a dirt-road Democrat. I grew up on my family farm with my five siblings where we picked cucumbers and corn on the very same land where my ancestors were enslaved not that long ago.
**I almost lost everything** because I couldn’t afford to take the time off I needed to, and childcare wasn’t affordable by any means. I’ve had my own personal struggles with our broken healthcare system when my son needed breathing equipment that insurance refused to cover. I’ve had to take on a part-time job just to keep the family from going bankrupt.
[**_Your donation of $5 today can help send me to the U.S. Senate where I’m committed to fighting for progressive ideals to solve these REAL problems. Fighting for North Carolinians is what I’ve always done and always will do_****.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/26587?t=21&akid=639%2E3698%2Ee5mH3V)
Thank you for everything,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211117-639-footer&t=22&refcode2=639_3698_e5mH3V&akid=639%2E3698%2Ee5mH3V)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Folks -- we just got AWFUL news: | A draft map shows that our district could be shifting -- and it may be on the verge of becoming a Republican-leaning district. this is music to House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy’s ears. His MAGA Republicans put a target on my back and are gunning to flip this seat red. | | | | | | Look here -- our Democratic Majority is fragile. Kevin McCarthy predicted Republicans could flip 60 seats next year... If they flip the house, it will RUIN Joe Biden’s entire presidency. We can’t let Republicans take over our Valley. There’s too much at stake. | | | | | | Counting on you, Rep. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Team WisGOP
subject: 🚨 Madison mandates vaccines for poll workers🚨
body:
The City of Madison announced a vaccine mandate for poll workers -- just two weeks before the November 30th deadline for county party officials to submit poll worker names ahead of 2022 elections.

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=madison_vaccine_mandate_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- Earlier this week, the City of Madison announced a **[vaccine mandate](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TiRluoQrSxROGkQpXzGKlauhMwn2vzA02AUZe4OemDvYX-9NXclSWxwx5swjtAiU2YUTxm2TavuWZzTP_ry5ZPI&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=madison_vaccine_mandate_v3&n=2)** for poll workers -- just two weeks before the November 30th deadline for county party officials to submit poll worker names ahead of 2022 elections. The City of Madison’s decision to unilaterally impose new requirements is a departure from our election laws and a dangerous slippery slope, and it should sound alarms for any Wisconsinite concerned about election integrity and fairness in our democratic process. The Republican Party of Wisconsin released the following statement from Chairman Paul Farrow:
> **_“This week, Madison has again decided to use fear to circumvent election integrity. Mandating vaccines for poll workers, at a time when even the Wisconsin Elections Commission’s decision to limit Special Voting Deputies is being challenged in the courts, is only meant to restrict the public from realizing fair and open elections._** **_“This is a prime example of shady behavior from election officials that sows distrust in the democratic process, and we are evaluating options to ensure that the City of Madison cannot further damage voter confidence.”_**
You can view this release online on our website **[here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R72aAQRdpUWAFwuxNARiAWA0WnHxOYcn6d3zsAL2JR-zYfXX_Cm1-uJyonOuHDpTMSgHo-ZaZfvMdnuq3IFRetj5Ae7XHFvAuVowxt_Nr5L&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=madison_vaccine_mandate_v3&n=3)**. Thanks, Team WisGOP
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=madison_vaccine_mandate_v3&n=4).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=madison_vaccine_mandate_v3&n=5) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=madison_vaccine_mandate_v3&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=madison_vaccine_mandate_v3&n=7), software for leaders.
